originalText: מִשְׁלֵי שְׁלֹמֹה בֶן־דָּוִד מֶלֶךְ יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: The proverbs of Solomon the son of David, king of Israel;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָדַעַת חָכְמָה וּמוּסָר לְהָבִין אִמְרֵי בִינָה׃
englishText: To know wisdom and instruction; To comprehend the words of understanding;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָקַחַת מוּסַר הַשְׂכֵּל צֶדֶק וּמִשְׁפָּט וּמֵישָׁרִים׃
englishText: To receive the discipline of wisdom, Justice, and right, and equity;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָתֵת לִפְתָאיִם עָרְמָה לְנַעַר דַּעַת וּמְזִמָּה׃
englishText: To give prudence to the simple, To the young man knowledge and discretion;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׁמַע חָכָם וְיוֹסֶף לֶקַח וְנָבוֹן תַּחְבֻּלוֹת יִקְנֶה׃
englishText: That the wise man may hear, and increase in learning, And the man of understanding may attain unto wise counsels;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְהָבִין מָשָׁל וּמְלִיצָה דִּבְרֵי חֲכָמִים וְחִידֹתָם׃
englishText: To understand a proverb, and a figure; The words of the wise, and their dark sayings.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִרְאַת יְהוָה רֵאשִׁית דָּעַת חָכְמָה וּמוּסָר אֱוִילִים בָּזוּ׃
englishText: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of knowledge; But the foolish despise wisdom and discipline.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁמַע בְּנִי מוּסַר אָבִיךָ וְאַל־תִּטֹּשׁ תּוֹרַת אִמֶּךָ׃
englishText: Hear, my son, the instruction of thy father, And forsake not the teaching of thy mother;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לִוְיַת חֵן הֵם לְרֹאשֶׁךָ וַעֲנָקִים לְגַרְגְּרֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: For they shall be a chaplet of grace unto thy head, And chains about thy neck.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנִי אִם־יְפַתּוּךָ חַטָּאִים אַל־תֹּבֵא׃
englishText: My son, if sinners entice thee, Consent thou not.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־יֹאמְרוּ לְכָה אִתָּנוּ נֶאֶרְבָה לְדָם נִצְפְּנָה לְנָקִי חִנָּם׃
englishText: If they say: ‘Come with us, Let us lie in wait for blood, Let us lurk for the innocent without cause;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נִבְלָעֵם כִּשְׁאוֹל חַיִּים וּתְמִימִים כְּיוֹרְדֵי בוֹר׃
englishText: Let us swallow them up alive as the grave, and whole, as those that go down into the pit;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־הוֹן יָקָר נִמְצָא נְמַלֵּא בָתֵּינוּ שָׁלָל׃
englishText: We shall find all precious substance, We shall fill our houses with spoil;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גּוֹרָלְךָ תַּפִּיל בְּתוֹכֵנוּ כִּיס אֶחָד יִהְיֶה לְכֻלָּנוּ׃
englishText: Cast in thy lot among us; Let us all have one purse’—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנִי אַל־תֵּלֵךְ בְּדֶרֶךְ אִתָּם מְנַע רַגְלְךָ מִנְּתִיבָתָם׃
englishText: My son, walk not thou in the way with them, restrain thy foot from their path;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי רַגְלֵיהֶם לָרַע יָרוּצוּ וִימַהֲרוּ לִשְׁפָּךְ־דָּם׃
englishText: For their feet run to evil, and they make haste to shed blood.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־חִנָּם מְזֹרָה הָרָשֶׁת בְּעֵינֵי כָל־בַּעַל כָּנָף׃
englishText: For in vain the net is spread in the eyes of any bird;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהֵם לְדָמָם יֶאֱרֹבוּ יִצְפְּנוּ לְנַפְשֹׁתָם׃
englishText: And these lie in wait for their own blood, they lurk for their own lives.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֵּן אָרְחוֹת כָּל־בֹּצֵעַ בָּצַע אֶת־נֶפֶשׁ בְּעָלָיו יִקָּח׃
englishText: So are the ways of every one that is greedy of gain; it taketh away the life of the owners thereof.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָכְמוֹת בַּחוּץ תָּרֹנָּה בָּרְחֹבוֹת תִּתֵּן קוֹלָהּ׃
englishText: Wisdom crieth aloud in the streets, she uttereth her voice in the broad places;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּרֹאשׁ הֹמִיּוֹת תִּקְרָא בְּפִתְחֵי שְׁעָרִים בָּעִיר אֲמָרֶיהָ תֹאמֵר׃
englishText: She calleth at the head of the noisy streets, at the entrances of the gates, in the city, she uttereth her words:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַד־מָתַי פְּתָיִם תְּאֵהֲבוּ פֶתִי וְלֵצִים לָצוֹן חָמְדוּ לָהֶם וּכְסִילִים יִשְׂנְאוּ־דָעַת׃
englishText: ’How long, ye thoughtless, will ye love thoughtlessness? And how long will scorners delight them in scorning, And fools hate knowledge?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תָּשׁוּבוּ לְתוֹכַחְתִּי הִנֵּה אַבִּיעָה לָכֶם רוּחִי אוֹדִיעָה דְבָרַי אֶתְכֶם׃
englishText: Turn you at my reproof; behold, I will pour out my spirit unto you, I will make known my words unto you.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַעַן קָרָאתִי וַתְּמָאֵנוּ נָטִיתִי יָדִי וְאֵין מַקְשִׁיב׃
englishText: Because I have called, and ye refused, I have stretched out my hand, and no man attended,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתִּפְרְעוּ כָל־עֲצָתִי וְתוֹכַחְתִּי לֹא אֲבִיתֶם׃
englishText: But ye have set at nought all my counsel, and would none of my reproof;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־אֲנִי בְּאֵידְכֶם אֶשְׂחָק אֶלְעַג בְּבֹא פַחְדְּכֶם׃
englishText: I also, in your calamity, will laugh, I will mock when your dread cometh;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּבֹא כשאוה [כְשׁוֹאָה ] פַּחְדְּכֶם וְאֵידְכֶם כְּסוּפָה יֶאֱתֶה בְּבֹא עֲלֵיכֶם צָרָה וְצוּקָה׃
englishText: When your dread cometh as a storm, and your calamity cometh on as a whirlwind; When trouble and distress come upon you.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָז יִקְרָאֻנְנִי וְלֹא אֶעֱנֶה יְשַׁחֲרֻנְנִי וְלֹא יִמְצָאֻנְנִי׃
englishText: Then will they call me, but I will not answer, they will seek me earnestly, but they shall not find me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּחַת כִּי־שָׂנְאוּ דָעַת וְיִרְאַת יְהֹוָה לֹא בָחָרוּ׃
englishText: For that they hated knowledge, and did not choose the fear of the LORD;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־אָבוּ לַעֲצָתִי נָאֲצוּ כָּל־תּוֹכַחְתִּי׃
englishText: They would none of my counsel, they despised all my reproof.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיֹאכְלוּ מִפְּרִי דַרְכָּם וּמִמֹּעֲצֹתֵיהֶם יִשְׂבָּעוּ׃
englishText: Therefore shall they eat of the fruit of their own way, and be filled with their own devices.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי מְשׁוּבַת פְּתָיִם תַּהַרְגֵם וְשַׁלְוַת כְּסִילִים תְּאַבְּדֵם׃
englishText: For the waywardness of the thoughtless shall slay them, and the confidence of fools shall destroy them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְשֹׁמֵעַ לִי יִשְׁכָּן־בֶּטַח וְשַׁאֲנַן מִפַּחַד רָעָה׃
englishText: But whoso hearkeneth unto me shall dwell securely, and shall be quiet without fear of evil.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנִי אִם־תִּקַּח אֲמָרָי וּמִצְוֺתַי תִּצְפֹּן אִתָּךְ׃
englishText: My son, if thou wilt receive my words, And lay up my commandments with thee;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְהַקְשִׁיב לַחָכְמָה אָזְנֶךָ תַּטֶּה לִבְּךָ לַתְּבוּנָה׃
englishText: So that thou make thine ear attend unto wisdom, And thy heart incline to discernment;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אִם לַבִּינָה תִקְרָא לַתְּבוּנָה תִּתֵּן קוֹלֶךָ׃
englishText: Yea, if thou call for understanding, And lift up thy voice for discernment;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־תְּבַקְשֶׁנָּה כַכָּסֶף וְכַמַּטְמוֹנִים תַּחְפְּשֶׂנָּה׃
englishText: If thou seek her as silver, And search for her as for hid treasures;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָז תָּבִין יִרְאַת יְהוָה וְדַעַת אֱלֹהִים תִּמְצָא׃
englishText: Then shalt thou understand the fear of the LORD, And find the knowledge of God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־יְהוָה יִתֵּן חָכְמָה מִפִּיו דַּעַת וּתְבוּנָה׃
englishText: For the LORD giveth wisdom, Out of His mouth cometh knowledge and discernment;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וצפן [יִצְפֹּן] לַיְשָׁרִים תּוּשִׁיָּה מָגֵן לְהֹלְכֵי תֹם׃
englishText: He layeth up sound wisdom for the upright, He is a shield to them that walk in integrity;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִנְצֹר אָרְחוֹת מִשְׁפָּט וְדֶרֶךְ חסידו [חֲסִידָיו] יִשְׁמֹר׃
englishText: That He may guard the paths of justice, And preserve the way of His godly ones. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָז תָּבִין צֶדֶק וּמִשְׁפָּט וּמֵישָׁרִים כָּל־מַעְגַּל־טוֹב׃
englishText: Then shalt thou understand righteousness and justice, And equity, yea, every good path.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־תָבוֹא חָכְמָה בְלִבֶּךָ וְדַעַת לְנַפְשְׁךָ יִנְעָם׃
englishText: For wisdom shall enter into thy heart, And knowledge shall be pleasant unto thy soul;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְזִמָּה תִּשְׁמֹר עָלֶיךָ תְּבוּנָה תִנְצְרֶכָּה׃
englishText: Discretion shall watch over thee, Discernment shall guard thee;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְהַצִּילְךָ מִדֶּרֶךְ רָע מֵאִישׁ מְדַבֵּר תַּהְפֻּכוֹת׃
englishText: To deliver thee from the way of evil, From the men that speak froward things;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַעֹזְבִים אָרְחוֹת יֹשֶׁר לָלֶכֶת בְּדַרְכֵי־חֹשֶׁךְ׃
englishText: Who leave the paths of uprightness, To walk in the ways of darkness;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַשְּׂמֵחִים לַעֲשׂוֹת רָע יָגִילוּ בְּתַהְפֻּכוֹת רָע׃
englishText: Who rejoice to do evil, And delight in the frowardness of evil;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר אָרְחֹתֵיהֶם עִקְּשִׁים וּנְלוֹזִים בְּמַעְגְּלוֹתָם׃
englishText: Who are crooked in their ways, And perverse in their paths;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְהַצִּילְךָ מֵאִשָּׁה זָרָה מִנָּכְרִיָּה אֲמָרֶיהָ הֶחֱלִיקָה׃
englishText: To deliver thee from the strange woman, Even from the alien woman that maketh smooth her words;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַעֹזֶבֶת אַלּוּף נְעוּרֶיהָ וְאֶת־בְּרִית אֱלֹהֶיהָ שָׁכֵחָה׃
englishText: That forsaketh the lord of her youth, And forgetteth the covenant of her God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי שָׁחָה אֶל־מָוֶת בֵּיתָהּ וְאֶל־רְפָאִים מַעְגְּלֹתֶיהָ׃
englishText: For her house sinketh down unto death, And her paths unto the shades;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־בָּאֶיהָ לֹא יְשׁוּבוּן וְלֹא־יַשִּׂיגוּ אָרְחוֹת חַיִּים׃
englishText: None that go unto her return, Neither do they attain unto the paths of life;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְמַעַן תֵּלֵךְ בְּדֶרֶךְ טוֹבִים וְאָרְחוֹת צַדִּיקִים תִּשְׁמֹר׃
englishText: That thou mayest walk in the way of good men, And keep the paths of the righteous.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־יְשָׁרִים יִשְׁכְּנוּ אָרֶץ וּתְמִימִים יִוָּתְרוּ בָהּ׃
englishText: For the upright shall dwell in the land, And the whole-hearted shall remain in it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּרְשָׁעִים מֵאֶרֶץ יִכָּרֵתוּ וּבוֹגְדִים יִסְּחוּ מִמֶּנָּה׃
englishText: But the wicked shall be cut off from the land, And the faithless shall be plucked up out of it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנִי תּוֹרָתִי אַל־תִּשְׁכָּח וּמִצְוֺתַי יִצֹּר לִבֶּךָ׃
englishText: My son, forget not my teaching; But let thy heart keep my commandments;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אֹרֶךְ יָמִים וּשְׁנוֹת חַיִּים וְשָׁלוֹם יוֹסִיפוּ לָךְ׃
englishText: For length of days, and years of life, And peace, will they add to thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֶסֶד וֶאֱמֶת אַל־יַעַזְבֻךָ קָשְׁרֵם עַל־גַּרְגְּרוֹתֶיךָ כָּתְבֵם עַל־לוּחַ לִבֶּךָ׃
englishText: Let not kindness and truth forsake thee; Bind them about thy neck, write them upon the table of thy heart;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמְצָא־חֵן וְשֵׂכֶל־טוֹב בְּעֵינֵי אֱלֹהִים וְאָדָם׃
englishText: So shalt thou find grace and good favour In the sight of God and man.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּטַח אֶל־יְהוָה בְּכָל־לִבֶּךָ וְאֶל־בִּינָתְךָ אַל־תִּשָּׁעֵן׃
englishText: Trust in the LORD with all thy heart, And lean not upon thine own understanding.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּכָל־דְּרָכֶיךָ דָעֵהוּ וְהוּא יְיַשֵּׁר אֹרְחֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: In all thy ways acknowledge Him, And He will direct thy paths.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תְּהִי חָכָם בְּעֵינֶיךָ יְרָא אֶת־יְהוָה וְסוּר מֵרָע׃
englishText: Be not wise in thine own eyes; Fear the LORD, and depart from evil;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רִפְאוּת תְּהִי לְשָׁרֶּךָ וְשִׁקּוּי לְעַצְמוֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: It shall be health to thy navel, And marrow to thy bones.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּבֵּד אֶת־יְהוָה מֵהוֹנֶךָ וּמֵרֵאשִׁית כָּל־תְּבוּאָתֶךָ׃
englishText: Honour the LORD with thy substance, And with the first-fruits of all thine increase;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיִמָּלְאוּ אֲסָמֶיךָ שָׂבָע וְתִירוֹשׁ יְקָבֶיךָ יִפְרֹצוּ׃
englishText: So shall thy barns be filled with plenty, And thy vats shall overflow with new wine.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מוּסַר יְהוָה בְּנִי אַל־תִּמְאָס וְאַל־תָּקֹץ בְּתוֹכַחְתּוֹ׃
englishText: My son, despise not the chastening of the LORD, Neither spurn thou His correction;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אֶת אֲשֶׁר יֶאֱהַב יְהוָה יוֹכִיחַ וּכְאָב אֶת־בֵּן יִרְצֶה׃
englishText: For whom the LORD loveth He correcteth, Even as a father the son in whom he delighteth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׁרֵי אָדָם מָצָא חָכְמָה וְאָדָם יָפִיק תְּבוּנָה׃
englishText: Happy is the man that findeth wisdom, And the man that obtaineth understanding.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי טוֹב סַחְרָהּ מִסְּחַר־כָּסֶף וּמֵחָרוּץ תְּבוּאָתָהּ׃
englishText: For the merchandise of it is better than the merchandise of silver, And the gain thereof than fine gold.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְקָרָה הִיא מפניים [מִפְּנִינִים] וְכָל־חֲפָצֶיךָ לֹא יִשְׁווּ־בָהּ׃
englishText: She is more precious than rubies; And all the things thou canst desire are not to be compared unto her.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֹרֶךְ יָמִים בִּימִינָהּ בִּשְׂמֹאולָהּ עֹשֶׁר וְכָבוֹד׃
englishText: Length of days is in her right hand; In her left hand are riches and honour.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דְּרָכֶיהָ דַרְכֵי־נֹעַם וְכָל־נְתִיבוֹתֶיהָ שָׁלוֹם׃
englishText: Her ways are ways of pleasantness, And all her paths are peace.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵץ־חַיִּים הִיא לַמַּחֲזִיקִים בָּהּ וְתֹמְכֶיהָ מְאֻשָּׁר׃
englishText: She is a tree of life to them that lay hold upon her, And happy is every one that holdest her fast.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה בְּחָכְמָה יָסַד־אָרֶץ כּוֹנֵן שָׁמַיִם בִּתְבוּנָה׃
englishText: The LORD by wisdom founded the earth; By understanding He established the heavens.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּדַעְתּוֹ תְּהוֹמוֹת נִבְקָעוּ וּשְׁחָקִים יִרְעֲפוּ־טָל׃
englishText: By His knowledge the depths were broken up, And the skies drop down the dew.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנִי אַל־יָלֻזוּ מֵעֵינֶיךָ נְצֹר תֻּשִׁיָּה וּמְזִמָּה׃
englishText: My son, let not them depart from thine eyes; Keep sound wisdom and discretion;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיִהְיוּ חַיִּים לְנַפְשֶׁךָ וְחֵן לְגַרְגְּרֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: So shall they be life unto thy soul, And grace to thy neck.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָז תֵּלֵךְ לָבֶטַח דַּרְכֶּךָ וְרַגְלְךָ לֹא תִגּוֹף׃
englishText: Then shalt thou walk in thy way securely, And thou shalt not dash thy foot.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־תִּשְׁכַּב לֹא־תִפְחָד וְשָׁכַבְתָּ וְעָרְבָה שְׁנָתֶךָ׃
englishText: When thou liest down, thou shalt not be afraid; Yea, thou shalt lie down, and thy sleep shall be sweet.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּירָא מִפַּחַד פִּתְאֹם וּמִשֹּׁאַת רְשָׁעִים כִּי תָבֹא׃
englishText: Be not afraid of sudden terror, Neither of the destruction of the wicked, when it cometh;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־יְהוָה יִהְיֶה בְכִסְלֶךָ וְשָׁמַר רַגְלְךָ מִלָּכֶד׃
englishText: For the LORD will be thy confidence, And will keep thy foot from being caught.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּמְנַע־טוֹב מִבְּעָלָיו בִּהְיוֹת לְאֵל ידיך [יָדְךָ] לַעֲשׂוֹת׃
englishText: Withhold not good from him to whom it is due, When it is in the power of thy hand to do it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תֹּאמַר לרעיך [לְרֵעֲךָ ] לֵךְ וָשׁוּב וּמָחָר אֶתֵּן וְיֵשׁ אִתָּךְ׃
englishText: Say not unto thy neighbour: ‘Go, and come again, And to-morrow I will give’; when thou hast it by thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תַּחֲרֹשׁ עַל־רֵעֲךָ רָעָה וְהוּא־יוֹשֵׁב לָבֶטַח אִתָּךְ׃
englishText: Devise not evil against thy neighbour, Seeing he dwelleth securely by thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תרוב [תָּרִיב] עִם־אָדָם חִנָּם אִם־לֹא גְמָלְךָ רָעָה׃
englishText: Strive not with a man without cause, If he have done thee no harm.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תְּקַנֵּא בְּאִישׁ חָמָס וְאַל־תִּבְחַר בְּכָל־דְּרָכָיו׃
englishText: Envy thou not the man of violence, And choose none of his ways.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי תוֹעֲבַת יְהוָה נָלוֹז וְאֶת־יְשָׁרִים סוֹדוֹ׃
englishText: For the perverse is an abomination to the LORD; But His counsel is with the upright.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְאֵרַת יְהוָה בְּבֵית רָשָׁע וּנְוֵה צַדִּיקִים יְבָרֵךְ׃
englishText: The curse of the LORD is in the house of the wicked; But He blesseth the habitation of the righteous.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־לַלֵּצִים הוּא־יָלִיץ ולעניים [וְלַעֲנָוִים] יִתֶּן־חֵן׃
englishText: If it concerneth the scorners, He scorneth them, But unto the humble He giveth grace.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּבוֹד חֲכָמִים יִנְחָלוּ וּכְסִילִים מֵרִים קָלוֹן׃
englishText: The wise shall inherit honour; But as for the fools, they carry away shame.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁמְעוּ בָנִים מוּסַר אָב וְהַקְשִׁיבוּ לָדַעַת בִּינָה׃
englishText: Hear, ye children, the instruction of a father, And attend to know understanding.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֶקַח טוֹב נָתַתִּי לָכֶם תּוֹרָתִי אַל־תַּעֲזֹבוּ׃
englishText: For I give you a good taking; Forsake ye not my teaching.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־בֵן הָיִיתִי לְאָבִי רַךְ וְיָחִיד לִפְנֵי אִמִּי׃
englishText: For I was a son unto my father, Tender and an only one in front of my mother.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּרֵנִי וַיֹּאמֶר לִי יִתְמָךְ־דְּבָרַי לִבֶּךָ שְׁמֹר מִצְוֺתַי וֶחְיֵה׃
englishText: And he taught me, and said unto me: ‘Let thy heart hold fast my words, Keep my commandments, and live;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קְנֵה חָכְמָה קְנֵה בִינָה אַל־תִּשְׁכַּח וְאַל־תֵּט מֵאִמְרֵי־פִי׃
englishText: Get wisdom, get understanding; Forget not, neither decline from the words of my mouth;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תַּעַזְבֶהָ וְתִשְׁמְרֶךָּ אֱהָבֶהָ וְתִצְּרֶךָּ׃
englishText: Forsake her not, and she will preserve thee; Love her, and she will keep thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רֵאשִׁית חָכְמָה קְנֵה חָכְמָה וּבְכָל־קִנְיָנְךָ קְנֵה בִינָה׃
englishText: The beginning of wisdom is: Get wisdom; Yea, with all thy getting get understanding.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סַלְסְלֶהָ וּתְרוֹמְמֶךָּ תְּכַבֵּדְךָ כִּי תְחַבְּקֶנָּה׃
englishText: Extol her, and she will exalt thee; She will bring thee to honour, when thou dost embrace her.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּתֵּן לְרֹאשְׁךָ לִוְיַת־חֵן עֲטֶרֶת תִּפְאֶרֶת תְּמַגְּנֶךָּ׃
englishText: She will give to thy head a chaplet of grace; A crown of glory will she bestow on thee.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁמַע בְּנִי וְקַח אֲמָרָי וְיִרְבּוּ לְךָ שְׁנוֹת חַיִּים׃
englishText: Hear, O my son, and receive my sayings; And the years of thy life shall be many.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּדֶרֶךְ חָכְמָה הֹרֵתִיךָ הִדְרַכְתִּיךָ בְּמַעְגְּלֵי־יֹשֶׁר׃
englishText: I have taught thee in the way of wisdom; I have led thee in paths of uprightness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּלֶכְתְּךָ לֹא־יֵצַר צַעֲדֶךָ וְאִם־תָּרוּץ לֹא תִכָּשֵׁל׃
englishText: When thou goest, thy step shall not be straitened; And if thou runnest, thou shalt not stumble.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַחֲזֵק בַּמּוּסָר אַל־תֶּרֶף נִצְּרֶהָ כִּי־הִיא חַיֶּיךָ׃
englishText: Take fast hold of instruction, let her not go; Keep her, for she is thy life.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּאֹרַח רְשָׁעִים אַל־תָּבֹא וְאַל־תְּאַשֵּׁר בְּדֶרֶךְ רָעִים׃
englishText: Enter not into the path of the wicked, And walk not in the way of evil men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פְּרָעֵהוּ אַל־תַּעֲבָר־בּוֹ שְׂטֵה מֵעָלָיו וַעֲבוֹר׃
englishText: Avoid it, pass not by it; Turn from it, and pass on.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא יִשְׁנוּ אִם־לֹא יָרֵעוּ וְנִגְזְלָה שְׁנָתָם אִם־לֹא יכשולו [יַכְשִׁילוּ׃]
englishText: For they sleep not, except they have done evil; And their sleep is taken away, unless they cause some to fall.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לָחֲמוּ לֶחֶם רֶשַׁע וְיֵין חֲמָסִים יִשְׁתּוּ׃
englishText: For they eat the bread of wickedness, And drink the wine of violence.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֹרַח צַדִּיקִים כְּאוֹר נֹגַהּ הוֹלֵךְ וָאוֹר עַד־נְכוֹן הַיּוֹם׃
englishText: But the path of the righteous is as the light of dawn, That shineth more and more unto the perfect day.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דֶּרֶךְ רְשָׁעִים כָּאֲפֵלָה לֹא יָדְעוּ בַּמֶּה יִכָּשֵׁלוּ׃
englishText: The way of the wicked is as darkness; They know not at what they stumble.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנִי לִדְבָרַי הַקְשִׁיבָה לַאֲמָרַי הַט־אָזְנֶךָ׃
englishText: My son, attend to my words; Incline thine ear unto my sayings.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־יַלִּיזוּ מֵעֵינֶיךָ שָׁמְרֵם בְּתוֹךְ לְבָבֶךָ׃
englishText: Let them not depart from thine eyes; Keep them in the midst of thy heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־חַיִּים הֵם לְמֹצְאֵיהֶם וּלְכָל־בְּשָׂרוֹ מַרְפֵּא׃
englishText: For they are life unto those that find them, And health to all their flesh.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִכָּל־מִשְׁמָר נְצֹר לִבֶּךָ כִּי־מִמֶּנּוּ תּוֹצְאוֹת חַיִּים׃
englishText: Above all that thou guardest keep thy heart; For out of it are the issues of life.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָסֵר מִמְּךָ עִקְּשׁוּת פֶּה וּלְזוּת שְׂפָתַיִם הַרְחֵק מִמֶּךָּ׃
englishText: Put away from thee a froward mouth, And perverse lips put far from thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵינֶיךָ לְנֹכַח יַבִּיטוּ וְעַפְעַפֶּיךָ יַיְשִׁרוּ נֶגְדֶּךָ׃
englishText: Let thine eyes look right on, And let thine eyelids look straight before thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פַּלֵּס מַעְגַּל רַגְלֶךָ וְכָל־דְּרָכֶיךָ יִכֹּנוּ׃
englishText: Make plain the path of thy feet, And let all thy ways be established.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תֵּט־יָמִין וּשְׂמֹאול הָסֵר רַגְלְךָ מֵרָע׃
englishText: Turn not to the right hand nor to the left; Remove thy foot from evil.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנִי לְחָכְמָתִי הַקְשִׁיבָה לִתְבוּנָתִי הַט־אָזְנֶךָ׃
englishText: My son, attend unto my wisdom; Incline thine ear to my understanding;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִשְׁמֹר מְזִמּוֹת וְדַעַת שְׂפָתֶיךָ יִנְצֹרוּ׃
englishText: That thou mayest preserve discretion, And that thy lips may keep knowledge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי נֹפֶת תִּטֹּפְנָה שִׂפְתֵי זָרָה וְחָלָק מִשֶּׁמֶן חִכָּהּ׃
englishText: For the lips of a strange woman drop honey, And her mouth is smoother than oil;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַחֲרִיתָהּ מָרָה כַלַּעֲנָה חַדָּה כְּחֶרֶב פִּיּוֹת׃
englishText: But her end is bitter as wormwood, Sharp as a two-edged sword.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַגְלֶיהָ יֹרְדוֹת מָוֶת שְׁאוֹל צְעָדֶיהָ יִתְמֹכוּ׃
englishText: Her feet go down to death; Her steps take hold on the nether-world;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֹרַח חַיִּים פֶּן־תְּפַלֵּס נָעוּ מַעְגְּלֹתֶיהָ לֹא תֵדָע׃
englishText: Lest she should walk the even path of life, Her ways wander, but she knoweth it not.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעַתָּה בָנִים שִׁמְעוּ־לִי וְאַל־תָּסוּרוּ מֵאִמְרֵי־פִי׃
englishText: Now therefore, O ye children, hearken unto me, And depart not from the words of my mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַרְחֵק מֵעָלֶיהָ דַרְכֶּךָ וְאַל־תִּקְרַב אֶל־פֶּתַח בֵּיתָהּ׃
englishText: Remove thy way far from her, And come not nigh the door of her house;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פֶּן־תִּתֵּן לַאֲחֵרִים הוֹדֶךָ וּשְׁנֹתֶיךָ לְאַכְזָרִי׃
englishText: Lest thou give thy vigour unto others, And thy years unto the cruel;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פֶּן־יִשְׂבְּעוּ זָרִים כֹּחֶךָ וַעֲצָבֶיךָ בְּבֵית נָכְרִי׃
englishText: Lest strangers be filled with thy strength, And thy labours be in the house of an alien;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְנָהַמְתָּ בְאַחֲרִיתֶךָ בִּכְלוֹת בְּשָׂרְךָ וּשְׁאֵרֶךָ׃
englishText: And thou moan, when thine end cometh, When thy flesh and thy body are consumed,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאָמַרְתָּ אֵיךְ שָׂנֵאתִי מוּסָר וְתוֹכַחַת נָאַץ לִבִּי׃
englishText: And say: ‘How have I hated instruction, And my heart despised reproof;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלֹא־שָׁמַעְתִּי בְּקוֹל מוֹרָי וְלִמְלַמְּדַי לֹא־הִטִּיתִי אָזְנִי׃
englishText: Neither have I hearkened to the voice of my teachers, Nor inclined mine ear to them that instructed me!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּמְעַט הָיִיתִי בְכָל־רָע בְּתוֹךְ קָהָל וְעֵדָה׃
englishText: I was well nigh in all evil In the midst of the congregation and assembly.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁתֵה־מַיִם מִבּוֹרֶךָ וְנֹזְלִים מִתּוֹךְ בְּאֵרֶךָ׃
englishText: Drink waters out of thine own cistern, And running waters out of thine own well.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָפוּצוּ מַעְיְנֹתֶיךָ חוּצָה בָּרְחֹבוֹת פַּלְגֵי־מָיִם׃
englishText: Let thy springs be dispersed abroad, And courses of water in the streets.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִהְיוּ־לְךָ לְבַדֶּךָ וְאֵין לְזָרִים אִתָּךְ׃
englishText: Let them be only thine own, And not strangers’with thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהִי־מְקוֹרְךָ בָרוּךְ וּשְׂמַח מֵאֵשֶׁת נְעוּרֶךָ׃
englishText: Let thy fountain be blessed; And have joy of the wife of thy youth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַיֶּלֶת אֲהָבִים וְיַעֲלַת־חֵן דַּדֶּיהָ יְרַוֻּךָ בְכָל־עֵת בְּאַהֲבָתָהּ תִּשְׁגֶּה תָמִיד׃
englishText: A lovely hind and a graceful doe, Let her breasts satisfy thee at all times; With her love be thou ravished always.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלָמָּה תִשְׁגֶּה בְנִי בְזָרָה וּתְחַבֵּק חֵק נָכְרִיָּה׃
englishText: Why then wilt thou, my son, be ravished with a strange woman, And embrace the bosom of an alien?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי נֹכַח עֵינֵי יְהוָה דַּרְכֵי־אִישׁ וְכָל־מַעְגְּלֹתָיו מְפַלֵּס׃
englishText: For the ways of man are before the eyes of the LORD, And He maketh even all his paths.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַווֹנוֹתָיו יִלְכְּדֻנוֹ אֶת־הָרָשָׁע וּבְחַבְלֵי חַטָּאתוֹ יִתָּמֵךְ׃
englishText: His own iniquities shall ensnare the wicked, And he shall be holden with the cords of his sin.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוּא יָמוּת בְּאֵין מוּסָר וּבְרֹב אִוַּלְתּוֹ יִשְׁגֶּה׃
englishText: He shall die for lack of instruction; And in the greatness of his folly he shall reel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנִי אִם־עָרַבְתָּ לְרֵעֶךָ תָּקַעְתָּ לַזָּר כַּפֶּיךָ׃
englishText: My son, if thou art become surety for thy neighbour, If thou hast struck thy hands for a stranger—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נוֹקַשְׁתָּ בְאִמְרֵי־פִיךָ נִלְכַּדְתָּ בְּאִמְרֵי־פִיךָ׃
englishText: Thou art snared by the words of thy mouth, Thou art caught by the words of thy mouth—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֲשֵׂה זֹאת אֵפוֹא בְּנִי וְהִנָּצֵל כִּי בָאתָ בְכַף־רֵעֶךָ לֵךְ הִתְרַפֵּס וּרְהַב רֵעֶיךָ׃
englishText: Do this now, my son, and deliver thyself, Seeing thou art come into the hand of thy neighbour; Go, humble thyself, and urge thy neighbour.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּתֵּן שֵׁנָה לְעֵינֶיךָ וּתְנוּמָה לְעַפְעַפֶּיךָ׃
englishText: Give not sleep to thine eyes, nor slumber to thine eyelids.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִנָּצֵל כִּצְבִי מִיָּד וּכְצִפּוֹר מִיַּד יָקוּשׁ׃
englishText: Deliver thyself as a gazelle from the hand [of the hunter], And as a bird from the hand of the fowler.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֵךְ־אֶל־נְמָלָה עָצֵל רְאֵה דְרָכֶיהָ וַחֲכָם׃
englishText: Go to the ant, thou sluggard; Consider her ways, and be wise;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר אֵין־לָהּ קָצִין שֹׁטֵר וּמֹשֵׁל׃
englishText: Which having no chief, Overseer, or ruler,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תָּכִין בַּקַּיִץ לַחְמָהּ אָגְרָה בַקָּצִיר מַאֲכָלָהּ׃
englishText: Provideth her bread in the summer, And gatherest her food in the harvest.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַד־מָתַי עָצֵל תִּשְׁכָּב מָתַי תָּקוּם מִשְּׁנָתֶךָ׃
englishText: How long wilt thou sleep, O sluggard? When wilt thou arise out of thy sleep?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְעַט שֵׁנוֹת מְעַט תְּנוּמוֹת מְעַט חִבֻּק יָדַיִם לִשְׁכָּב׃
englishText: ’Yet a little sleep, a little slumber, A little folding of the hands to sleep’—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבָא־כִמְהַלֵּךְ רֵאשֶׁךָ וּמַחְסֹרְךָ כְּאִישׁ מָגֵן׃
englishText: So shall thy poverty come as a runner, And thy want as an armed man.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָדָם בְּלִיַּעַל אִישׁ אָוֶן הוֹלֵךְ עִקְּשׁוּת פֶּה׃
englishText: A base person, a man of iniquity, Is he that walketh with a froward mouth; .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קֹרֵץ בְּעֵינָו מֹלֵל בְּרַגְלָו מֹרֶה בְּאֶצְבְּעֹתָיו׃
englishText: That winketh with his eyes, that scrapeth with his feet, That pointeth with his fingers;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּהְפֻּכוֹת בְּלִבּוֹ חֹרֵשׁ רָע בְּכָל־עֵת מדנים [מִדְיָנִים] יְשַׁלֵּחַ׃
englishText: Frowardness is in his heart, he deviseth evil continually; He soweth discord.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־כֵּן פִּתְאֹם יָבוֹא אֵידוֹ פֶּתַע יִשָּׁבֵר וְאֵין מַרְפֵּא׃
englishText: Therefore shall his calamity come suddenly; On a sudden shall he be broken, and that without remedy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֶׁשׁ־הֵנָּה שָׂנֵא יְהוָה וְשֶׁבַע תועבות [תּוֹעֲבַת] נַפְשׁוֹ׃
englishText: There are six things which the LORD hateth, Yea, seven which are an abomination unto Him:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵינַיִם רָמוֹת לְשׁוֹן שָׁקֶר וְיָדַיִם שֹׁפְכוֹת דָּם־נָקִי׃
englishText: Haughty eyes, a lying tongue, And hands that shed innocent blood;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֵב חֹרֵשׁ מַחְשְׁבוֹת אָוֶן רַגְלַיִם מְמַהֲרוֹת לָרוּץ לָרָעָה׃
englishText: A heart that deviseth wicked thoughts, Feet that are swift in running to evil;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָפִיחַ כְּזָבִים עֵד שָׁקֶר וּמְשַׁלֵּחַ מְדָנִים בֵּין אַחִים׃
englishText: A false witness that breatheth out lies, And he that soweth discord among brethren.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נְצֹר בְּנִי מִצְוַת אָבִיךָ וְאַל־תִּטֹּשׁ תּוֹרַת אִמֶּךָ׃
englishText: My son, keep the commandment of thy father, And forsake not the teaching of thy mother;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קָשְׁרֵם עַל־לִבְּךָ תָמִיד עָנְדֵם עַל־גַּרְגְּרֹתֶךָ׃
englishText: Bind them continually upon thy heart, Tie them about thy neck.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּהִתְהַלֶּכְךָ תַּנְחֶה אֹתָךְ בְּשָׁכְבְּךָ תִּשְׁמֹר עָלֶיךָ וַהֲקִיצוֹתָ הִיא תְשִׂיחֶךָ׃
englishText: When thou walkest, it shall lead thee, When thou liest down, it shall watch over thee; And when thou awakest, it shall talk with thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי נֵר מִצְוָה וְתוֹרָה אוֹר וְדֶרֶךְ חַיִּים תּוֹכְחוֹת מוּסָר׃
englishText: For the commandment is a lamp, and the teaching is light, And reproofs of instruction are the way of life;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִשְׁמָרְךָ מֵאֵשֶׁת רָע מֵחֶלְקַת לָשׁוֹן נָכְרִיָּה׃
englishText: To keep thee from the evil woman, From the smoothness of the alien tongue.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תַּחְמֹד יָפְיָהּ בִּלְבָבֶךָ וְאַל־תִּקָּחֲךָ בְּעַפְעַפֶּיהָ׃
englishText: Lust not after her beauty in thy heart; Neither let her captivate thee with her eyelids.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי בְעַד־אִשָּׁה זוֹנָה עַד־כִּכַּר לָחֶם וְאֵשֶׁת אִישׁ נֶפֶשׁ יְקָרָה תָצוּד׃
englishText: For on account of a harlot a man is brought to a loaf of bread, But the adulteress hunteth for the precious life.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲיַחְתֶּה אִישׁ אֵשׁ בְּחֵיקוֹ וּבְגָדָיו לֹא תִשָּׂרַפְנָה׃
englishText: Can a man take fire in his bosom, And his clothes not be burned?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־יְהַלֵּךְ אִישׁ עַל־הַגֶּחָלִים וְרַגְלָיו לֹא תִכָּוֶינָה׃
englishText: Or can one walk upon hot coals, And his feet not be scorched?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֵּן הַבָּא אֶל־אֵשֶׁת רֵעֵהוּ לֹא יִנָּקֶה כָּל־הַנֹּגֵעַ בָּהּ׃
englishText: So he that goeth in to his neighbour’s wife; Whosoever toucheth her shall not go unpunished.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יָבוּזוּ לַגַּנָּב כִּי יִגְנוֹב לְמַלֵּא נַפְשׁוֹ כִּי יִרְעָב׃
englishText: Men do not despise a thief, if he steal To satisfy his soul when he is hungry;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְנִמְצָא יְשַׁלֵּם שִׁבְעָתָיִם אֶת־כָּל־הוֹן בֵּיתוֹ יִתֵּן׃
englishText: But if he be found, he must restore sevenfold, He must give all the substance of his house.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֹאֵף אִשָּׁה חֲסַר־לֵב מַשְׁחִית נַפְשׁוֹ הוּא יַעֲשֶׂנָּה׃
englishText: He that committeth adultery with a woman lacketh understanding; He doeth it that would destroy his own soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֶגַע־וְקָלוֹן יִמְצָא וְחֶרְפָּתוֹ לֹא תִמָּחֶה׃
englishText: Wounds and dishonour shall he get, And his reproach shall not be wiped away. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־קִנְאָה חֲמַת־גָּבֶר וְלֹא־יַחְמוֹל בְּיוֹם נָקָם׃
englishText: For jealousy is the rage of a man, And he will not spare in the day of vengeance.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יִשָּׂא פְּנֵי כָל־כֹּפֶר וְלֹא־יֹאבֶה כִּי תַרְבֶּה־שֹׁחַד׃
englishText: He will not regard any ransom; Neither will he rest content, though thou givest many gifts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנִי שְׁמֹר אֲמָרָי וּמִצְוֺתַי תִּצְפֹּן אִתָּךְ׃
englishText: My son, keep my words, And lay up my commandments with thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁמֹר מִצְוֺתַי וֶחְיֵה וְתוֹרָתִי כְּאִישׁוֹן עֵינֶיךָ׃
englishText: Keep my commandments and live, And my teaching as the apple of thine eye.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קָשְׁרֵם עַל־אֶצְבְּעֹתֶיךָ כָּתְבֵם עַל־לוּחַ לִבֶּךָ׃
englishText: Bind them upon thy fingers, Write them upon the table of thy heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱמֹר לַחָכְמָה אֲחֹתִי אָתְּ וּמֹדָע לַבִּינָה תִקְרָא׃
englishText: Say unto wisdom: ‘Thou art my sister’, And call understanding thy kinswoman;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִשְׁמָרְךָ מֵאִשָּׁה זָרָה מִנָּכְרִיָּה אֲמָרֶיהָ הֶחֱלִיקָה׃
englishText: That they may keep thee from the strange woman, From the alien woman that maketh smooth her words.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי בְּחַלּוֹן בֵּיתִי בְּעַד אֶשְׁנַבִּי נִשְׁקָפְתִּי׃
englishText: For at the window of my house I looked forth through my lattice;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וָאֵרֶא בַפְּתָאיִם אָבִינָה בַבָּנִים נַעַר חֲסַר־לֵב׃
englishText: And I beheld among the thoughtless ones, I discerned among the youths, A young man void of understanding,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֹבֵר בַּשּׁוּק אֵצֶל פִּנָּהּ וְדֶרֶךְ בֵּיתָהּ יִצְעָד׃
englishText: Passing through the street near her corner, And he went the way to her house;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֶשֶׁף־בְּעֶרֶב יוֹם בְּאִישׁוֹן לַיְלָה וַאֲפֵלָה׃
englishText: In the twilight, in the evening of the day, In the blackness of night and the darkness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהִנֵּה אִשָּׁה לִקְרָאתוֹ שִׁית זוֹנָה וּנְצֻרַת לֵב׃
englishText: And, behold, there met him a woman With the attire of a harlot, and wily of heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֹמִיָּה הִיא וְסֹרָרֶת בְּבֵיתָהּ לֹא־יִשְׁכְּנוּ רַגְלֶיהָ׃
englishText: She is riotous and rebellious, Her feet abide not in her house;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פַּעַם בַּחוּץ פַּעַם בָּרְחֹבוֹת וְאֵצֶל כָּל־פִּנָּה תֶאֱרֹב׃
englishText: Now she is in the streets, now in the broad places, And lieth in wait at every corner.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהֶחֱזִיקָה בּוֹ וְנָשְׁקָה־לּוֹ הֵעֵזָה פָנֶיהָ וַתֹּאמַר לוֹ׃
englishText: So she caught him, and kissed him, And with an impudent face she said unto him:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זִבְחֵי שְׁלָמִים עָלָי הַיּוֹם שִׁלַּמְתִּי נְדָרָי׃
englishText: ’Sacrifices of peace-offerings were due from me; This day have I paid my vows.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־כֵּן יָצָאתִי לִקְרָאתֶךָ לְשַׁחֵר פָּנֶיךָ וָאֶמְצָאֶךָּ׃
englishText: Therefore came I forth to meet thee, To seek thy face, and I have found thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַרְבַדִּים רָבַדְתִּי עַרְשִׂי חֲטֻבוֹת אֵטוּן מִצְרָיִם׃
englishText: I have decked my couch with coverlets, With striped cloths of the yarn of Egypt.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נַפְתִּי מִשְׁכָּבִי מֹר אֲהָלִים וְקִנָּמוֹן׃
englishText: I have perfumed my bed With myrrh, aloes, and cinnamon.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְכָה נִרְוֶה דֹדִים עַד־הַבֹּקֶר נִתְעַלְּסָה בָּאֳהָבִים׃
englishText: Come, let us take our fill of love until the morning; Let us solace ourselves with loves.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אֵין הָאִישׁ בְּבֵיתוֹ הָלַךְ בְּדֶרֶךְ מֵרָחוֹק׃
englishText: For my husband is not at home, He is gone a long journey;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צְרוֹר־הַכֶּסֶף לָקַח בְּיָדוֹ לְיוֹם הַכֵּסֶא יָבֹא בֵיתוֹ׃
englishText: He hath taken the bag of money with him; He will come home at the full moon.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִטַּתּוּ בְּרֹב לִקְחָהּ בְּחֵלֶק שְׂפָתֶיהָ תַּדִּיחֶנּוּ׃
englishText: With her much fair speech she causeth him to yield, With the blandishment of her lips she enticeth him away.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹלֵךְ אַחֲרֶיהָ פִּתְאֹם כְּשׁוֹר אֶל־טָבַח יָבוֹא וּכְעֶכֶס אֶל־מוּסַר אֱוִיל׃
englishText: He goeth after her straightway, As an ox that goeth to the slaughter, Or as one in fetters to the correction of the fool;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַד יְפַלַּח חֵץ כְּבֵדוֹ כְּמַהֵר צִפּוֹר אֶל־פָּח וְלֹא־יָדַע כִּי־בְנַפְשׁוֹ הוּא׃
englishText: Till an arrow strike through his liver; As a bird hasteneth to the snare— And knoweth not that it is at the cost of his life.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעַתָּה בָנִים שִׁמְעוּ־לִי וְהַקְשִׁיבוּ לְאִמְרֵי־פִי׃
englishText: Now therefore, O ye children, hearken unto me, And attend to the words of my mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־יֵשְׂטְ אֶל־דְּרָכֶיהָ לִבֶּךָ אַל־תֵּתַע בִּנְתִיבוֹתֶיהָ׃
englishText: Let not thy heart decline to her ways, Go not astray in her paths.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־רַבִּים חֲלָלִים הִפִּילָה וַעֲצֻמִים כָּל־הֲרֻגֶיהָ׃
englishText: For she hath cast down many wounded; Yea, a mighty host are all her slain.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דַּרְכֵי שְׁאוֹל בֵּיתָהּ יֹרְדוֹת אֶל־חַדְרֵי־מָוֶת׃
englishText: Her house is the way to the nether-world, Going down to the chambers of death.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲלֹא־חָכְמָה תִקְרָא וּתְבוּנָה תִּתֵּן קוֹלָהּ׃
englishText: Doth not wisdom call, And understanding put forth her voice?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּרֹאשׁ־מְרוֹמִים עֲלֵי־דָרֶךְ בֵּית נְתִיבוֹת נִצָּבָה׃
englishText: In the top of high places by the way, Where the paths meet, she standeth;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְיַד־שְׁעָרִים לְפִי־קָרֶת מְבוֹא פְתָחִים תָּרֹנָּה׃
englishText: Beside the gates, at the entry of the city, At the coming in at the doors, she crieth aloud:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲלֵיכֶם אִישִׁים אֶקְרָא וְקוֹלִי אֶל־בְּנֵי אָדָם׃
englishText: ’Unto you, O men, I call, And my voice is to the sons of men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָבִינוּ פְתָאיִם עָרְמָה וּכְסִילִים הָבִינוּ לֵב׃
englishText: O ye thoughtless, understand prudence, And, ye fools, be ye of an understanding heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁמְעוּ כִּי־נְגִידִים אֲדַבֵּר וּמִפְתַּח שְׂפָתַי מֵישָׁרִים׃
englishText: Hear, for I will speak excellent things, And the opening of my lips shall be right things.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אֱמֶת יֶהְגֶּה חִכִּי וְתוֹעֲבַת שְׂפָתַי רֶשַׁע׃
englishText: For my mouth shall utter truth, And wickedness is an abomination to my lips.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּצֶדֶק כָּל־אִמְרֵי־פִי אֵין בָּהֶם נִפְתָּל וְעִקֵּשׁ׃
englishText: All the words of my mouth are in righteousness, There is nothing perverse or crooked in them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֻּלָּם נְכֹחִים לַמֵּבִין וִישָׁרִים לְמֹצְאֵי דָעַת׃
englishText: They are all plain to him that understandeth, And right to them that find knowledge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קְחוּ־מוּסָרִי וְאַל־כָּסֶף וְדַעַת מֵחָרוּץ נִבְחָר׃
englishText: Receive my instruction, and not silver, And knowledge rather than choice gold.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־טוֹבָה חָכְמָה מִפְּנִינִים וְכָל־חֲפָצִים לֹא יִשְׁווּ־בָהּ׃
englishText: For wisdom is better than rubies, And all things desirable are not to be compared unto her.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲ‍נִי־חָכְמָה שָׁכַנְתִּי עָרְמָה וְדַעַת מְזִמּוֹת אֶמְצָא׃
englishText: I wisdom dwell with prudence, And find out knowledge of devices.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִרְאַת יְהוָה שְׂנֹאת רָע גֵּאָה וְגָאוֹן וְדֶרֶךְ רָע וּפִי תַהְפֻּכוֹת שָׂנֵאתִי׃
englishText: The fear of the LORD is to hate evil; Pride, and arrogancy, and the evil way, And the froward mouth, do I hate.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִי־עֵצָה וְתוּשִׁיָּה אֲנִי בִינָה לִי גְבוּרָה׃
englishText: Counsel is mine, and sound wisdom; I am understanding, power is mine.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּי מְלָכִים יִמְלֹכוּ וְרוֹזְנִים יְחֹקְקוּ צֶדֶק׃
englishText: By me kings reign, And princes decree justice.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּי שָׂרִים יָשֹׂרוּ וּנְדִיבִים כָּל־שֹׁפְטֵי צֶדֶק׃
englishText: By me princes rule, And nobles, even all the judges of the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲנִי אהביה [אֹהֲבַי] אֵהָב וּמְשַׁחֲרַי יִמְצָאֻנְנִי׃
englishText: I love them that love me, And those that seek me earnestly shall find me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֹשֶׁר־וְכָבוֹד אִתִּי הוֹן עָתֵק וּצְדָקָה׃
englishText: Riches and honour are with me; Yea, enduring riches and righteousness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב פִּרְיִי מֵחָרוּץ וּמִפָּז וּתְבוּאָתִי מִכֶּסֶף נִבְחָר׃
englishText: My fruit is better than gold, yea, than fine gold; And my produce than choice silver.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּאֹרַח־צְדָקָה אֲהַלֵּך בְּתוֹךְ נְתִיבוֹת מִשְׁפָּט׃
englishText: I walk in the way of righteousness, In the midst of the paths of justice;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְהַנְחִיל אֹהֲבַי יֵשׁ וְאֹצְרֹתֵיהֶם אֲמַלֵּא׃
englishText: That I may cause those that love me to inherit substance, And that I may fill their treasuries.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה קָנָנִי רֵאשִׁית דַּרְכּוֹ קֶדֶם מִפְעָלָיו מֵאָז׃
englishText: The LORD made me as the beginning of His way, The first of His works of old.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֵעוֹלָם נִסַּכְתִּי מֵרֹאשׁ מִקַּדְמֵי־אָרֶץ׃
englishText: I was set up from everlasting, from the beginning, Or ever the earth was.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּאֵין־תְּהֹמוֹת חוֹלָלְתִּי בְּאֵין מַעְיָנוֹת נִכְבַּדֵּי־מָיִם׃
englishText: When there were no depths, I was brought forth; When there were no fountains abounding with water.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּטֶרֶם הָרִים הָטְבָּעוּ לִפְנֵי גְבָעוֹת חוֹלָלְתִּי׃
englishText: Before the mountains were settled, Before the hills was I brought forth;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַד־לֹא עָשָׂה אֶרֶץ וְחוּצוֹת וְרֹאשׁ עָפְרוֹת תֵּבֵל׃
englishText: While as yet He had not made the earth, nor the fields, Nor the beginning of the dust of the world.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּהֲכִינוֹ שָׁמַיִם שָׁם אָנִי בְּחוּקוֹ חוּג עַל־פְּנֵי תְהוֹם׃
englishText: When He established the heavens, I was there; When He set a circle upon the face of the deep,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּאַמְּצוֹ שְׁחָקִים מִמָּעַל בַּעֲזוֹז עִינוֹת תְּהוֹם׃
englishText: When He made firm the skies above, When the fountains of the deep showed their might,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּשׂוּמוֹ לַיָּם חֻקּוֹ וּמַיִם לֹא יַעַבְרוּ־פִיו בְּחוּקוֹ מוֹסְדֵי אָרֶץ׃
englishText: When He gave to the sea His decree, That the waters should not transgress His commandment, When He appointed the foundations of the earth;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וָאֶהְיֶה אֶצְלוֹ אָמוֹן וָאֶהְיֶה שַׁעֲשֻׁעִים יוֹם יוֹם מְשַׂחֶקֶת לְפָנָיו בְּכָל־עֵת׃
englishText: Then I was by Him, as a nursling; And I was daily all delight, Playing always before Him,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְשַׂחֶקֶת בְּתֵבֵל אַרְצוֹ וְשַׁעֲשֻׁעַי אֶת־בְּנֵי אָדָם׃
englishText: Playing in His habitable earth, And my delights are with the sons of men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעַתָּה בָנִים שִׁמְעוּ־לִי וְאַשְׁרֵי דְּרָכַי יִשְׁמֹרוּ׃
englishText: Now therefore, ye children, hearken unto me; For happy are they that keep my ways.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁמְעוּ מוּסָר וַחֲכָמוּ וְאַל־תִּפְרָעוּ׃
englishText: Hear instruction, and be wise, And refuse it not.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׁרֵי אָדָם שֹׁמֵעַ לִי לִשְׁקֹד עַל־דַּלְתֹתַי יוֹם יוֹם לִשְׁמֹר מְזוּזֹת פְּתָחָי׃
englishText: Happy is the man that hearkeneth to me, Watching daily at my gates, waiting at the posts of my doors.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי מֹצְאִי מצאי [מָצָא] חַיִּים וַיָּפֶק רָצוֹן מֵיְהוָה׃
englishText: For whoso findeth me findeth life, And obtaineth favour of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְחֹטְאִי חֹמֵס נַפְשׁוֹ כָּל־מְשַׂנְאַי אָהֲבוּ מָוֶת׃
englishText: But he that misseth me wrongeth his own soul; All they that hate me love death.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָכְמוֹת בָּנְתָה בֵיתָהּ חָצְבָה עַמּוּדֶיהָ שִׁבְעָה׃
englishText: Wisdom hath builded her house, she hath hewn out her seven pillars;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טָבְחָה טִבְחָהּ מָסְכָה יֵינָהּ אַף עָרְכָה שֻׁלְחָנָהּ׃
englishText: She hath prepared her meat, she hath mingled her wine; she hath also furnished her table.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁלְחָה נַעֲרֹתֶיהָ תִקְרָא עַל־גַּפֵּי מְרֹמֵי קָרֶת׃
englishText: She hath sent forth her maidens, she calleth, upon the highest places of the city:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־פֶתִי יָסֻר הֵנָּה חֲסַר־לֵב אָמְרָה לּוֹ׃
englishText: ’Whoso is thoughtless, let him turn in hither’; as for him that lacketh understanding, she saith to him:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְכוּ לַחֲמוּ בְלַחֲמִי וּשְׁתוּ בְּיַיִן מָסָכְתִּי׃
englishText: 'Come, eat of my bread, and drink of the wine which I have mingled.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עִזְבוּ פְתָאיִם וִחְיוּ וְאִשְׁרוּ בְּדֶרֶךְ בִּינָה׃
englishText: Forsake all thoughtlessness, and live; and walk in the way of understanding.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֹסֵר לֵץ לֹקֵחַ לוֹ קָלוֹן וּמוֹכִיחַ לְרָשָׁע מוּמוֹ׃
englishText: He that correcteth a scorner getteth to himself shame, and he that reproveth a wicked man, it becometh unto him a blot.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תּוֹכַח לֵץ פֶּן־יִשְׂנָאֶךָּ הוֹכַח לְחָכָם וְיֶאֱהָבֶךָּ׃
englishText: Reprove not a scorner, lest he hate thee; reprove a wise man, and he will love thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תֵּן לְחָכָם וְיֶחְכַּם־עוֹד הוֹדַע לְצַדִּיק וְיוֹסֶף לֶקַח׃
englishText: Give to a wise man, and he will be yet wiser; teach a righteous man, and he will increase in learning.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּחִלַּת חָכְמָה יִרְאַת יְהוָה וְדַעַת קְדֹשִׁים בִּינָה׃
englishText: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom, and the knowledge of the All-holy is understanding.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־בִי יִרְבּוּ יָמֶיךָ וְיוֹסִיפוּ לְּךָ שְׁנוֹת חַיִּים׃
englishText: For by me thy days shall be multiplied, and the years of thy life shall be increased.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־חָכַמְתָּ חָכַמְתָּ לָּךְ וְלַצְתָּ לְבַדְּךָ תִשָּׂא׃
englishText: If thou art wise, thou art wise for thyself; And if thou scornest, thou alone shalt bear it.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵשֶׁת כְּסִילוּת הֹמִיָּה פְּתַיּוּת וּבַל־יָדְעָה מָּה׃
englishText: The woman Folly is riotous; She is thoughtless, and knoweth nothing.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיָשְׁבָה לְפֶתַח בֵּיתָהּ עַל־כִּסֵּא מְרֹמֵי קָרֶת׃
englishText: And she sitteth at the door of her house, On a seat in the high places of the city,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִקְרֹא לְעֹבְרֵי־דָרֶךְ הַמְיַשְּׁרִים אֹרְחוֹתָם׃
englishText: To call to them that pass by, Who go right on their ways:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־פֶתִי יָסֻר הֵנָּה וַחֲסַר־לֵב וְאָמְרָה לּוֹ׃
englishText: ’Whoso is thoughtless, let him turn in hither’; And as for him that lacketh understanding, she saith to him:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַיִם־גְּנוּבִים יִמְתָּקוּ וְלֶחֶם סְתָרִים יִנְעָם׃
englishText: ’Stolen waters are sweet, And bread eaten in secret is pleasant.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלֹא־יָדַע כִּי־רְפָאִים שָׁם בְּעִמְקֵי שְׁאוֹל קְרֻאֶיהָ׃
englishText: But he knoweth not that the shades are there; that her guests are in the depths of the nether-world.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִשְׁלֵי שְׁלֹמֹה בֵּן חָכָם יְשַׂמַּח־אָב וּבֵן כְּסִיל תּוּגַת אִמּוֹ׃
englishText: The proverbs of Solomon. A wise son maketh a glad father; but a foolish son is the grief of his mother.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יוֹעִילוּ אוֹצְרוֹת רֶשַׁע וּצְדָקָה תַּצִּיל מִמָּוֶת׃
englishText: Treasures of wickedness profit nothing; but righteousness delivereth from death.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יַרְעִיב יְהוָה נֶפֶשׁ צַדִּיק וְהַוַּת רְשָׁעִים יֶהְדֹּף׃
englishText: The LORD will not suffer the soul of the righteous to famish; but He thrusteth away the desire of the wicked.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָאשׁ עֹשֶׂה כַף־רְמִיָּה וְיַד חָרוּצִים תַּעֲשִׁיר׃
englishText: He becometh poor that dealeth with a slack hand; but the hand of the diligent maketh rich.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֹגֵר בַּקַּיִץ בֵּן מַשְׂכִּיל נִרְדָּם בַּקָּצִיר בֵּן מֵבִישׁ׃
englishText: A wise son gathereth in summer; but a son that doeth shamefully sleepeth in harvest.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּרָכוֹת לְרֹאשׁ צַדִּיק וּפִי רְשָׁעִים יְכַסֶּה חָמָס׃
englishText: Blessings are upon the head of the righteous; but the mouth of the wicked concealeth violence.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֵכֶר צַדִּיק לִבְרָכָה וְשֵׁם רְשָׁעִים יִרְקָב׃
englishText: The memory of the righteous shall be for a blessing; but the name of the wicked shall rot.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֲכַם־לֵב יִקַּח מִצְוֺת וֶאֱוִיל שְׂפָתַיִם יִלָּבֵט׃
englishText: The wise in heart will receive commandments; but a prating fool shall fall.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹלֵךְ בַּתֹּם יֵלֶךְ בֶּטַח וּמְעַקֵּשׁ דְּרָכָיו יִוָּדֵעַ׃
englishText: He that walketh uprightly walketh securely; but he that perverteth his ways shall be found out.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קֹרֵץ עַיִן יִתֵּן עַצָּבֶת וֶאֱוִיל שְׂפָתַיִם יִלָּבֵט׃
englishText: He that winketh with the eye causeth sorrow; and a prating fool shall fall.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְקוֹר חַיִּים פִּי צַדִּיק וּפִי רְשָׁעִים יְכַסֶּה חָמָס׃
englishText: The mouth of the righteous is a fountain of life; but the mouth of the wicked concealeth violence.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׂנְאָה תְּעוֹרֵר מְדָנִים וְעַל כָּל־פְּשָׁעִים תְּכַסֶּה אַהֲבָה׃
englishText: Hatred stirreth up strifes; but love covereth all transgressions.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּשִׂפְתֵי נָבוֹן תִּמָּצֵא חָכְמָה וְשֵׁבֶט לְגֵו חֲסַר־לֵב׃
englishText: In the lips of him that hath discernment wisdom is found; but a rod is for the back of him that is void of understanding.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֲכָמִים יִצְפְּנוּ־דָעַת וּפִי־אֱוִיל מְחִתָּה קְרֹבָה׃
englishText: Wise men lay up knowledge; but the mouth of the foolish is an imminent ruin.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹן עָשִׁיר קִרְיַת עֻזּוֹ מְחִתַּת דַּלִּים רֵישָׁם׃
englishText: The rich man’s wealth is his strong city; the ruin of the poor is their poverty.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פְּעֻלַּת צַדִּיק לְחַיִּים תְּבוּאַת רָשָׁע לְחַטָּאת׃
englishText: The wages of the righteous is life; The increase of the wicked is sin.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֹרַח לְחַיִּים שׁוֹמֵר מוּסָר וְעוֹזֵב תּוֹכַחַת מַתְעֶה׃
englishText: He is in the way of life that heedeth instruction; But he that forsaketh reproof erreth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְכַסֶּה שִׂנְאָה שִׂפְתֵי־שָׁקֶר וּמוֹצִא דִבָּה הוּא כְסִיל׃
englishText: He that hideth hatred is of lying lips; And he that uttereth a slander is a fool.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּרֹב דְּבָרִים לֹא יֶחְדַּל־פָּשַׁע וְחֹשֵׂךְ שְׂפָתָיו מַשְׂכִּיל׃
englishText: In the multitude of words there wanteth not transgression; But he that refraineth his lips is wise.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֶּסֶף נִבְחָר לְשׁוֹן צַדִּיק לֵב רְשָׁעִים כִּמְעָט׃
englishText: The tongue of the righteous is as choice silver; The heart of the wicked is little worth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׂפְתֵי צַדִּיק יִרְעוּ רַבִּים וֶאֱוִילִים בַּחֲסַר־לֵב יָמוּתוּ׃
englishText: The lips of the righteous feed many; But the foolish die for want of understanding. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּרְכַּת יְהוָה הִיא תַעֲשִׁיר וְלֹא־יוֹסִף עֶצֶב עִמָּהּ׃
englishText: The blessing of the LORD, it maketh rich, And toil addeth nothing thereto.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּשְׂחוֹק לִכְסִיל עֲשׂוֹת זִמָּה וְחָכְמָה לְאִישׁ תְּבוּנָה׃
englishText: It is as sport to a fool to do wickedness, And so is wisdom to a man of discernment.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְגוֹרַת רָשָׁע הִיא תְבוֹאֶנּוּ וְתַאֲוַת צַדִּיקִים יִתֵּן׃
englishText: The fear of the wicked, it shall come upon him; And the desire of the righteous shall be granted.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּעֲבוֹר סוּפָה וְאֵין רָשָׁע וְצַדִּיק יְסוֹד עוֹלָם׃
englishText: When the whirlwind passeth, the wicked is no more; But the righteous is an everlasting foundation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּחֹמֶץ לַשִּׁנַּיִם וְכֶעָשָׁן לָעֵינָיִם כֵּן הֶעָצֵל לְשֹׁלְחָיו׃
englishText: As vinegar to the teeth, and as smoke to the eyes, So is the sluggard to them that send him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִרְאַת יְהוָה תּוֹסִיף יָמִים וּשְׁנוֹת רְשָׁעִים תִּקְצֹרְנָה׃
englishText: The fear of the LORD prolongeth days; But the years of the wicked shall be shortened.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תּוֹחֶלֶת צַדִּיקִים שִׂמְחָה וְתִקְוַת רְשָׁעִים תֹּאבֵד׃
englishText: The hope of the righteous is gladness; But the expectation of the wicked shall perish.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מָעוֹז לַתֹּם דֶּרֶךְ יְהוָה וּמְחִתָּה לְפֹעֲלֵי אָוֶן׃
englishText: The way of the LORD is a stronghold to the upright, But ruin to the workers of iniquity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צַדִּיק לְעוֹלָם בַּל־יִמּוֹט וּרְשָׁעִים לֹא יִשְׁכְּנוּ־אָרֶץ׃
englishText: The righteous shall never be moved; But the wicked shall not inhabit the land.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פִּי־צַדִּיק יָנוּב חָכְמָה וּלְשׁוֹן תַּהְפֻּכוֹת תִּכָּרֵת׃
englishText: The mouth of the righteous buddeth with wisdom; But the froward tongue shall be cut off.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׂפְתֵי צַדִּיק יֵדְעוּן רָצוֹן וּפִי רְשָׁעִים תַּהְפֻּכוֹת׃
englishText: The lips of the righteous know what is acceptable; But the mouth of the wicked is all frowardness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֹאזְנֵי מִרְמָה תּוֹעֲבַת יְהוָה וְאֶבֶן שְׁלֵמָה רְצוֹנוֹ׃
englishText: A false balance is an abomination to the LORD; But a perfect weight is His delight.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּא־זָדוֹן וַיָּבֹא קָלוֹן וְאֶת־צְנוּעִים חָכְמָה׃
englishText: When pride cometh, then cometh shame; But with the lowly is wisdom.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תֻּמַּת יְשָׁרִים תַּנְחֵם וְסֶלֶף בּוֹגְדִים ושדם [יְשָׁדֵּם׃]
englishText: The integrity of the upright shall guide them; But the perverseness of the faithless shall destroy them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יוֹעִיל הוֹן בְּיוֹם עֶבְרָה וּצְדָקָה תַּצִּיל מִמָּוֶת׃
englishText: Riches profit not in the day of wrath; But righteousness delivereth from death.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צִדְקַת תָּמִים תְּיַשֵּׁר דַּרְכּוֹ וּבְרִשְׁעָתוֹ יִפֹּל רָשָׁע׃
englishText: The righteousness of the sincere shall make straight his way; But the wicked shall fall by his own wickedness. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צִדְקַת יְשָׁרִים תַּצִּילֵם וּבְהַוַּת בֹּגְדִים יִלָּכֵדוּ׃
englishText: The righteousness of the upright shall deliver them; But the faithless shall be trapped in their own crafty device.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּמוֹת אָדָם רָשָׁע תֹּאבַד תִּקְוָה וְתוֹחֶלֶת אוֹנִים אָבָדָה׃
englishText: When a wicked man dieth, his expectation shall perish, And the hope of strength perisheth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צַדִּיק מִצָּרָה נֶחֱלָץ וַיָּבֹא רָשָׁע תַּחְתָּיו׃
englishText: The righteous is delivered out of trouble, And the wicked cometh in his stead.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּפֶה חָנֵף יַשְׁחִת רֵעֵהוּ וּבְדַעַת צַדִּיקִים יֵחָלֵצוּ׃
englishText: With his mouth the impious man destroyeth his neighbour; But through knowledge shall the righteous be delivered.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּטוּב צַדִּיקִים תַּעֲלֹץ קִרְיָה וּבַאֲבֹד רְשָׁעִים רִנָּה׃
englishText: When it goeth well with the righteous, the city rejoiceth; And when the wicked perish, there is joy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּבִרְכַּת יְשָׁרִים תָּרוּם קָרֶת וּבְפִי רְשָׁעִים תֵּהָרֵס׃
englishText: By the blessing of the upright a city is exalted; But it is overthrown by the mouth of the wicked.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּז־לְרֵעֵהוּ חֲסַר־לֵב וְאִישׁ תְּבוּנוֹת יַחֲרִישׁ׃
englishText: He that despiseth his neighbour lacketh understanding; But a man of discernment holdeth his peace.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹלֵךְ רָכִיל מְגַלֶּה־סּוֹד וְנֶאֱמַן־רוּחַ מְכַסֶּה דָבָר׃
englishText: He that goeth about as a talebearer revealeth secrets; But he that is of a faithful spirit concealeth a matter.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּאֵין תַּחְבֻּלוֹת יִפָּל־עָם וּתְשׁוּעָה בְּרֹב יוֹעֵץ׃
englishText: Where no wise direction is, a people falleth; But in the multitude of counsellors there is safety.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַע־יֵרוֹעַ כִּי־עָרַב זָר וְשֹׂנֵא תֹקְעִים בּוֹטֵחַ׃
englishText: He that is surety for a stranger shall smart for it; But he that hateth them that strike hands is secure.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵשֶׁת־חֵן תִּתְמֹךְ כָּבוֹד וְעָרִיצִים יִתְמְכוּ־עֹשֶׁר׃
englishText: A gracious woman obtaineth honour; And strong men obtain riches.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גֹּמֵל נַפְשׁוֹ אִישׁ חָסֶד וְעֹכֵר שְׁאֵרוֹ אַכְזָרִי׃
englishText: The merciful man doeth good to his own soul; But he that is cruel troubleth his own flesh.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָשָׁע עֹשֶׂה פְעֻלַּת־שָׁקֶר וְזֹרֵעַ צְדָקָה שֶׂכֶר אֱמֶת׃
englishText: The wicked earneth deceitful wages; But he that soweth righteousness hath a sure reward.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֵּן־צְדָקָה לְחַיִּים וּמְרַדֵּף רָעָה לְמוֹתוֹ׃
englishText: Stedfast righteousness tendeth to life; But he that pursueth evil pursueth it to his own death.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תּוֹעֲבַת יְהוָה עִקְּשֵׁי־לֵב וּרְצוֹנוֹ תְּמִימֵי דָרֶךְ׃
englishText: They that are perverse in heart are an abomination to the LORD; But such as are upright in their way are His delight.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָד לְיָד לֹא־יִנָּקֶה רָּע וְזֶרַע צַדִּיקִים נִמְלָט׃
englishText: My hand upon it! the evil man shall not be unpunished; But the seed of the righteous shall escape. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֶזֶם זָהָב בְּאַף חֲזִיר אִשָּׁה יָפָה וְסָרַת טָעַם׃
englishText: As a ring of gold in a swine’s snout, so is a fair woman that turneth aside from discretion.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּאֲוַת צַדִּיקִים אַךְ־טוֹב תִּקְוַת רְשָׁעִים עֶבְרָה׃
englishText: The desire of the righteous is only good; But the expectation of the wicked is wrath.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵשׁ מְפַזֵּר וְנוֹסָף עוֹד וְחוֹשֵׂךְ מִיֹּשֶׁר אַךְ־לְמַחְסוֹר׃
englishText: There is that scattereth, and yet increaseth; And there is that withholdeth more than is meet, but it tendeth only to want.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֶפֶשׁ־בְּרָכָה תְדֻשָּׁן וּמַרְוֶה גַּם־הוּא יוֹרֶא׃
englishText: The beneficent soul shall be made rich, and he that satisfieth abundantly shall be satisfied also himself.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֹנֵעַ בָּר יִקְּבֻהוּ לְאוֹם וּבְרָכָה לְרֹאשׁ מַשְׁבִּיר׃
englishText: He that withholdeth corn, the people shall curse him; But blessing shall be upon the head of him that selleth it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֹׁחֵר טוֹב יְבַקֵּשׁ רָצוֹן וְדֹרֵשׁ רָעָה תְבוֹאֶנּוּ׃
englishText: He that diligently seeketh good seeketh favour; But he that searcheth for evil, it shall come unto him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בּוֹטֵחַ בְּעָשְׁרוֹ הוּא יִפֹּל וְכֶעָלֶה צַדִּיקִים יִפְרָחוּ׃
englishText: He that trusteth in his riches shall fall; But the righteous shall flourish as foliage.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עוֹכֵר בֵּיתוֹ יִנְחַל־רוּחַ וְעֶבֶד אֱוִיל לַחֲכַם־לֵב׃
englishText: He that troubleth his own house shall inherit the wind; And the foolish shall be servant to the wise of heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פְּרִי־צַדִּיק עֵץ חַיִּים וְלֹקֵחַ נְפָשׂוֹת חָכָם׃
englishText: The fruit of the righteous is a tree of life; And he that is wise winneth souls.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵן צַדִּיק בָּאָרֶץ יְשֻׁלָּם אַף כִּי־רָשָׁע וְחוֹטֵא׃
englishText: Behold, the righteous shall be requited in the earth; How much more the wicked and the sinner!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֹהֵב מוּסָר אֹהֵב דָּעַת וְשֹׂנֵא תוֹכַחַת בָּעַר׃
englishText: Whoso loveth knowledge loveth correction; But he that is brutish hateth reproof.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב יָפִיק רָצוֹן מֵיְהוָה וְאִישׁ מְזִמּוֹת יַרְשִׁיעַ׃
englishText: A good man shall obtain favour of the LORD; But a man of wicked devices will He condemn.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יִכּוֹן אָדָם בְּרֶשַׁע וְשֹׁרֶשׁ צַדִּיקִים בַּל־יִמּוֹט׃
englishText: A man shall not be established by wickedness; But the root of the righteous shall never be moved.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵשֶׁת־חַיִל עֲטֶרֶת בַּעְלָהּ וּכְרָקָב בְּעַצְמוֹתָיו מְבִישָׁה׃
englishText: A virtuous woman is a crown to her husband; But she that doeth shamefully is as rottenness in his bones.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַחְשְׁבוֹת צַדִּיקִים מִשְׁפָּט תַּחְבֻּלוֹת רְשָׁעִים מִרְמָה׃
englishText: The thoughts of the righteous are right; But the counsels of the wicked are deceit.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דִּבְרֵי רְשָׁעִים אֱרָב־דָּם וּפִי יְשָׁרִים יַצִּילֵם׃
englishText: The words of the wicked are to lie in wait for blood; But the mouth of the upright shall deliver them. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָפוֹךְ רְשָׁעִים וְאֵינָם וּבֵית צַדִּיקִים יַעֲמֹד׃
englishText: The wicked are overthrown, and are not; But the house of the righteous shall stand.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְפִי־שִׂכְלוֹ יְהֻלַּל־אִישׁ וְנַעֲוֵה־לֵב יִהְיֶה לָבוּז׃
englishText: A man shall be commended according to his intelligence; But he that is of a distorted understanding shall be despised.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב נִקְלֶה וְעֶבֶד לוֹ מִמְּתַכַּבֵּד וַחֲסַר־לָחֶם׃
englishText: Better is he that is lightly esteemed, and hath a servant, Than he that playeth the man of rank, and lacketh bread.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹדֵעַ צַדִּיק נֶפֶשׁ בְּהֶמְתּוֹ וְרַחֲמֵי רְשָׁעִים אַכְזָרִי׃
englishText: A righteous man regardeth the life of his beast; But the tender mercies of the wicked are cruel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֹבֵד אַדְמָתוֹ יִשְׂבַּע־לָחֶם וּמְרַדֵּף רֵיקִים חֲסַר־לֵב׃
englishText: He that tilleth his ground shall have plenty of bread; But he that followeth after vain things is void of understanding.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָמַד רָשָׁע מְצוֹד רָעִים וְשֹׁרֶשׁ צַדִּיקִים יִתֵּן׃
englishText: The wicked desireth the prey of evil men; But the root of the righteous yieldeth fruit.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּפֶשַׁע שְׂפָתַיִם מוֹקֵשׁ רָע וַיֵּצֵא מִצָּרָה צַדִּיק׃
englishText: In the transgression of the lips is a snare to the evil man; But the righteous cometh out of trouble.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִפְּרִי פִי־אִישׁ יִשְׂבַּע־טוֹב וּגְמוּל יְדֵי־אָדָם ישוב [יָשִׁיב] לוֹ׃
englishText: A man shall be satisfied with good by the fruit of his mouth, And the doings of a man’s hands shall be rendered unto him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דֶּרֶךְ אֱוִיל יָשָׁר בְּעֵינָיו וְשֹׁמֵעַ לְעֵצָה חָכָם׃
englishText: The way of a fool is straight in his own eyes; But he that is wise hearkeneth unto counsel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱוִיל בַּיּוֹם יִוָּדַע כַּעְסוֹ וְכֹסֶה קָלוֹן עָרוּם׃
englishText: A fool’s vexation is presently known; But a prudent man concealeth shame.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָפִיחַ אֱמוּנָה יַגִּיד צֶדֶק וְעֵד שְׁקָרִים מִרְמָה׃
englishText: He that breatheth forth truth uttereth righteousness; But a false witness deceit.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵשׁ בּוֹטֶה כְּמַדְקְרוֹת חָרֶב וּלְשׁוֹן חֲכָמִים מַרְפֵּא׃
