englishText: There is that speaketh like the piercings of a sword; But the tongue of the wise is health.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׂפַת־אֱמֶת תִּכּוֹן לָעַד וְעַד־אַרְגִּיעָה לְשׁוֹן שָׁקֶר׃
englishText: The lip of truth shall be established for ever; But a lying tongue is but for a moment.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִרְמָה בְּלֶב־חֹרְשֵׁי רָע וּלְיֹעֲצֵי שָׁלוֹם שִׂמְחָה׃
englishText: Deceit is in the heart of them that devise evil; But to the counsellors of peace is joy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יְאֻנֶּה לַצַּדִּיק כָּל־אָוֶן וּרְשָׁעִים מָלְאוּ רָע׃
englishText: There shall no mischief befall the righteous; But the wicked are filled with evil.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תּוֹעֲבַת יְהוָה שִׂפְתֵי־שָׁקֶר וְעֹשֵׂי אֱמוּנָה רְצוֹנוֹ׃
englishText: Lying lips are an abomination to the LORD; But they that deal truly are His delight. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָדָם עָרוּם כֹּסֶה דָּעַת וְלֵב כְּסִילִים יִקְרָא אִוֶּלֶת׃
englishText: A prudent man concealeth knowledge; But the heart of fools proclaimeth foolishness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַד־חָרוּצִים תִּמְשׁוֹל ורְמִיָּה תִּהְיֶה לָמַס׃
englishText: The hand of the diligent shall bear rule; But the slothful shall be under tribute.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דְּאָגָה בְלֶב־אִישׁ יַשְׁחֶנָּה וְדָבָר טוֹב יְשַׂמְּחֶנָּה׃
englishText: Care in the heart of a man boweth it down; But a good word maketh it glad.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָתֵר מֵרֵעֵהוּ צַדִּיק וְדֶרֶךְ רְשָׁעִים תַּתְעֵם׃
englishText: The righteous is guided by his friend; But the way of the wicked leadeth them astray.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יַחֲרֹךְ רְמִיָּה צֵידוֹ וְהוֹן־אָדָם יָקָר חָרוּץ׃
englishText: The slothful man shall not hunt his prey; But the precious substance of men is to be diligent.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּאֹרַח־צְדָקָה חַיִּים וְדֶרֶךְ נְתִיבָה אַל־מָוֶת׃
englishText: In the way of righteousness is life, And in the pathway thereof there is no death.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֵּן חָכָם מוּסַר אָב וְלֵץ לֹא־שָׁמַע גְּעָרָה׃
englishText: A wise son is instructed of his father; But a scorner heareth not rebuke.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִפְּרִי פִי־אִישׁ יֹאכַל טוֹב וְנֶפֶשׁ בֹּגְדִים חָמָס׃
englishText: A man shall eat good from the fruit of his mouth; But the desire of the faithless is violence.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֹצֵר פִּיו שֹׁמֵר נַפְשׁוֹ פֹּשֵׂק שְׂפָתָיו מְחִתָּה־לוֹ׃
englishText: He that guardeth his mouth keepeth his life; But for him that openeth wide his lips there shall be ruin.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִתְאַוָּה וָאַיִן נַפְשׁוֹ עָצֵל וְנֶפֶשׁ חָרֻצִים תְּדֻשָּׁן׃
englishText: The soul of the sluggard desireth, and hath nothing; But the soul of the diligent shall be abundantly gratified.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דְּבַר־שֶׁקֶר יִשְׂנָא צַדִּיק וְרָשָׁע יַבְאִישׁ וְיַחְפִּיר׃
englishText: A righteous man hateth lying; But a wicked man behaveth vilely and shamefully.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צְדָקָה תִּצֹּר תָּם־דָּרֶךְ וְרִשְׁעָה תְּסַלֵּף חַטָּאת׃
englishText: Righteousness guardeth him that is upright in the way; But wickedness overthroweth the sinner.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵשׁ מִתְעַשֵּׁר וְאֵין כֹּל מִתְרוֹשֵׁשׁ וְהוֹן רָב׃
englishText: There is that pretendeth himself rich, yet hath nothing; There is that pretendeth himself poor, yet hath great wealth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֹּפֶר נֶפֶשׁ־אִישׁ עָשְׁרוֹ וְרָשׁ לֹא־שָׁמַע גְּעָרָה׃
englishText: The ransom of a man’s life are his riches; But the poor heareth no threatening.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹר־צַדִּיקִים יִשְׂמָח וְנֵר רְשָׁעִים יִדְעָךְ׃
englishText: The light of the righteous rejoiceth; But the lamp of the wicked shall be put out.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַק־בְּזָדוֹן יִתֵּן מַצָּה וְאֶת־נוֹעָצִים חָכְמָה׃
englishText: By pride cometh only contention; But with the well-advised is wisdom.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹן מֵהֶבֶל יִמְעָט וְקֹבֵץ עַל־יָד יַרְבֶּה׃
englishText: Wealth gotten by vanity shall be diminished; But he that gathereth little by little shall increase. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תּוֹחֶלֶת מְמֻשָּׁכָה מַחֲלָה־לֵב וְעֵץ חַיִּים תַּאֲוָה בָאָה׃
englishText: Hope deferred maketh the heart sick; But desire fulfilled is a tree of life.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּז לְדָבָר יֵחָבֶל לוֹ וִירֵא מִצְוָה הוּא יְשֻׁלָּם׃
englishText: Whoso despiseth the word shall suffer thereby; But he that feareth the commandment shall be rewarded.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תּוֹרַת חָכָם מְקוֹר חַיִּים לָסוּר מִמֹּקְשֵׁי מָוֶת׃
englishText: The teaching of the wise is a fountain of life, To depart from the snares of death.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֵׂכֶל־טוֹב יִתֶּן־חֵן וְדֶרֶךְ בֹּגְדִים אֵיתָן׃
englishText: Good understanding giveth grace; But the way of the faithless is harsh.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־עָרוּם יַעֲשֶׂה בְדָעַת וּכְסִיל יִפְרֹשׂ אִוֶּלֶת׃
englishText: Every prudent man dealeth with forethought; But a fool unfoldeth folly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַלְאָךְ רָשָׁע יִפֹּל בְּרָע וְצִיר אֱמוּנִים מַרְפֵּא׃
englishText: A wicked messenger falleth into evil; But a faithful ambassador is health.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רֵישׁ וְקָלוֹן פּוֹרֵעַ מוּסָר וְשׁוֹמֵר תּוֹכַחַת יְכֻבָּד׃
englishText: Poverty and shame shall be to him that refuseth instruction; But he that regardeth reproof shall be honoured.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּאֲוָה נִהְיָה תֶּעֱרַב לְנָפֶשׁ וְתוֹעֲבַת כְּסִילִים סוּר מֵרָע׃
englishText: The desire accomplished is sweet to the soul; And it is an abomination to fools to depart from evil.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הלוך [הוֹלֵךְ] אֶת־חֲכָמִים וחכם [יֶחְכָּם] וְרֹעֶה כְסִילִים יֵרוֹעַ׃
englishText: He that walketh with wise men shall be wise; But the companion of fools shall smart for it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַטָּאִים תְּרַדֵּף רָעָה וְאֶת־צַדִּיקִים יְשַׁלֶּם־טוֹב׃
englishText: Evil pursueth sinners; But to the righteous good shall be repaid.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב יַנְחִיל בְּנֵי־בָנִים וְצָפוּן לַצַּדִּיק חֵיל חוֹטֵא׃
englishText: A good man leaveth an inheritance to his children’s children; And the wealth of the sinner is laid up for the righteous.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָב־אֹכֶל נִיר רָאשִׁים וְיֵשׁ נִסְפֶּה בְּלֹא מִשְׁפָּט׃
englishText: Much food is in the tillage of the poor; But there is that is swept away by want of righteousness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חוֹשֵׂךְ שִׁבְטוֹ שׂוֹנֵא בְנוֹ וְאֹהֲבוֹ שִׁחֲרוֹ מוּסָר׃
englishText: He that spareth his rod hateth his son; But he that loveth him chasteneth him betimes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צַדִּיק אֹכֵל לְשֹׂבַע נַפְשׁוֹ וּבֶטֶן רְשָׁעִים תֶּחְסָר׃
englishText: The righteous eateth to the satisfying of his desire; But the belly of the wicked shall want.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַכְמוֹת נָשִׁים בָּנְתָה בֵיתָהּ וְאִוֶּלֶת בְּיָדֶיהָ תֶהֶרְסֶנּוּ׃
englishText: Every wise woman buildeth her house; But the foolish plucketh it down with her hands.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹלֵךְ בְּיָשְׁרוֹ יְרֵא יְהוָה וּנְלוֹז דְּרָכָיו בּוֹזֵהוּ׃
englishText: He that walketh in his uprightness feareth the LORD; But he that is perverse in his ways despiseth Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּפִי־אֱוִיל חֹטֶר גַּאֲוָה וְשִׂפְתֵי חֲכָמִים תִּשְׁמוּרֵם׃
englishText: In the mouth of the foolish is a rod of pride; But the lips of the wise shall preserve them. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּאֵין אֲלָפִים אֵבוּס בָּר וְרָב־תְּבוּאוֹת בְּכֹחַ שׁוֹר׃
englishText: Where no oxen are, the crib is clean; But much increase is by the strength of the ox.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵד אֱמוּנִים לֹא יְכַזֵּב וְיָפִיחַ כְּזָבִים עֵד שָׁקֶר׃
englishText: A faithful witness will not lie; But a false witness breatheth forth lies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּקֶּשׁ־לֵץ חָכְמָה וָאָיִן וְדַעַת לְנָבוֹן נָקָל׃
englishText: A scorner seeketh wisdom, and findeth it not; But knowledge is easy unto him that hath discernment.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֵךְ מִנֶּגֶד לְאִישׁ כְּסִיל וּבַל־יָדַעְתָּ שִׂפְתֵי־דָעַת׃
englishText: Go from the presence of a foolish man, for thou wilt not perceive the lips of knowledge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָכְמַת עָרוּם הָבִין דַּרְכּוֹ וְאִוֶּלֶת כְּסִילִים מִרְמָה׃
englishText: The wisdom of the prudent is to look well to his way; But the folly of fools is deceit.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱוִלִים יָלִיץ אָשָׁם וּבֵין יְשָׁרִים רָצוֹן׃
englishText: Amends pleadeth for fools; But among the upright there is good will.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֵב יוֹדֵעַ מָרַּת נַפְשׁוֹ וּבְשִׂמְחָתוֹ לֹא־יִתְעָרַב זָר׃
englishText: The heart knoweth its own bitterness; And with its joy no stranger can intermeddle.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֵּית רְשָׁעִים יִשָּׁמֵד וְאֹהֶל יְשָׁרִים יַפְרִיחַ׃
englishText: The house of the wicked shall be overthrown; But the tent of the upright shall flourish.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵשׁ דֶּרֶךְ יָשָׁר לִפְנֵי־אִישׁ וְאַחֲרִיתָהּ דַּרְכֵי־מָוֶת׃
englishText: There is a way which seemeth right unto a man, But the end thereof are the ways of death.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־בִּשְׂחוֹק יִכְאַב־לֵב וְאַחֲרִיתָהּ שִׂמְחָה תוּגָה׃
englishText: Even in laughter the heart acheth; And the end of mirth is heaviness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִדְּרָכָיו יִשְׂבַּע סוּג לֵב וּמֵעָלָיו אִישׁ טוֹב׃
englishText: The dissembler in heart shall have his fill from his own ways; And a good man shall be satisfied from himself.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פֶּתִי יַאֲמִין לְכָל־דָּבָר וְעָרוּם יָבִין לַאֲשֻׁרוֹ׃
englishText: The thoughtless believeth every word; But the prudent man looketh well to his going.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָכָם יָרֵא וְסָר מֵרָע וּכְסִיל מִתְעַבֵּר וּבוֹטֵחַ׃
englishText: A wise man feareth, and departeth from evil; But the fool behaveth overbearingly, and is confident.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קְצַר־אַפַּיִם יַעֲשֶׂה אִוֶּלֶת וְאִישׁ מְזִמּוֹת יִשָּׂנֵא׃
englishText: He that is soon angry dealeth foolishly; And a man of wicked devices is hated.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָחֲלוּ פְתָאיִם אִוֶּלֶת וַעֲרוּמִים יַכְתִּרוּ דָעַת׃
englishText: The thoughtless come into possession of folly; But the prudent are crowned with knowledge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שַׁחוּ רָעִים לִפְנֵי טוֹבִים וּרְשָׁעִים עַל־שַׁעֲרֵי צַדִּיק׃
englishText: The evil bow before the good, And the wicked at the gates of the righteous.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־לְרֵעֵהוּ יִשָּׂנֵא רָשׁ וְאֹהֲבֵי עָשִׁיר רַבִּים׃
englishText: The poor is hated even of his own neighbour; But the rich hath many friends. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּז־לְרֵעֵהוּ חוֹטֵא וּמְחוֹנֵן עניים [עֲנָוִים] אַשְׁרָיו׃
englishText: He that despiseth his neighbour sinneth; But he that is gracious unto the humble, happy is he.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲ‍לוֹא־יִתְעוּ חֹרְשֵׁי רָע וְחֶסֶד וֶאֱמֶת חֹרְשֵׁי טוֹב׃
englishText: Shall they not go astray that devise evil? But mercy and truth shall be for them that devise good.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּכָל־עֶצֶב יִהְיֶה מוֹתָר וּדְבַר־שְׂפָתַיִם אַךְ־לְמַחְסוֹר׃
englishText: In all labour there is profit; But the talk of the lips tendeth only to penury.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֲטֶרֶת חֲכָמִים עָשְׁרָם אִוֶּלֶת כְּסִילִים אִוֶּלֶת׃
englishText: The crown of the wise is their riches; But the folly of fools remaineth folly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַצִּיל נְפָשׁוֹת עֵד אֱמֶת וְיָפִחַ כְּזָבִים מִרְמָה׃
englishText: A true witness delivereth souls; But he that breatheth forth lies is all deceit.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּיִרְאַת יְהוָה מִבְטַח־עֹז וּלְבָנָיו יִהְיֶה מַחְסֶה׃
englishText: In the fear of the LORD a man hath strong confidence; And his children shall have a place of refuge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִרְאַת יְהוָה מְקוֹר חַיִּים לָסוּר מִמֹּקְשֵׁי מָוֶת׃
englishText: The fear of the LORD is a fountain of life, to depart from the snares of death.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּרָב־עָם הַדְרַת־מֶלֶךְ וּבְאֶפֶס לְאֹם מְחִתַּת רָזוֹן׃
englishText: In the multitude of people is the king’s glory; But in the want of people is the ruin of the prince.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶרֶךְ אַפַּיִם רַב־תְּבוּנָה וּקְצַר־רוּחַ מֵרִים אִוֶּלֶת׃
englishText: He that is slow to anger is of great understanding; But he that is hasty of spirit exalteth folly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַיֵּי בְשָׂרִים לֵב מַרְפֵּא וּרְקַב עֲצָמוֹת קִנְאָה׃
englishText: A tranquil heart is the life of the flesh; But envy is the rottenness of the bones.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֹשֵׁק־דָּל חֵרֵף עֹשֵׂהוּ וּמְכַבְּדוֹ חֹנֵן אֶבְיוֹן׃
englishText: He that oppresseth the poor blasphemeth his Maker; But he that is gracious unto the needy honoureth Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּרָעָתוֹ יִדָּחֶה רָשָׁע וְחֹסֶה בְמוֹתוֹ צַדִּיק׃
englishText: The wicked is thrust down in his misfortune; But the righteous, even when he is brought to death, hath hope.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּלֵב נָבוֹן תָּנוּחַ חָכְמָה וּבְקֶרֶב כְּסִילִים תִּוָּדֵעַ׃
englishText: In the heart of him that hath discernment wisdom resteth; But in the inward part of fools it maketh itself known.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צְדָקָה תְרוֹמֵם־גּוֹי וְחֶסֶד לְאֻמִּים חַטָּאת׃
englishText: Righteousness exalteth a nation; But sin is a reproach to any people.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רְצוֹן־מֶלֶךְ לְעֶבֶד מַשְׂכִּיל וְעֶבְרָתוֹ תִּהְיֶה מֵבִישׁ׃
englishText: The king’s favour is toward a servant that dealeth wisely; But his wrath striketh him that dealeth shamefully.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַעֲנֶה־רַּךְ יָשִׁיב חֵמָה וּדְבַר־עֶצֶב יַעֲלֶה־אָף׃
englishText: A soft answer turneth away wrath; But a grievous word stirreth up anger.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְשׁוֹן חֲכָמִים תֵּיטִיב דָּעַת וּפִי כְסִילִים יַבִּיעַ אִוֶּלֶת׃
englishText: The tongue of the wise useth knowledge aright; But the mouth of fools poureth out foolishness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּכָל־מָקוֹם עֵינֵי יְהוָה צֹפוֹת רָעִים וטוֹבִים׃
englishText: The eyes of the LORD are in every place, Keeping watch upon the evil and the good.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַרְפֵּא לָשׁוֹן עֵץ חַיִּים וְסֶלֶף בָּהּ שֶׁבֶר בְּרוּחַ׃
englishText: A soothing tongue is a tree of life; But perverseness therein is a wound to the spirit.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱוִיל יִנְאַץ מוּסַר אָבִיו וְשֹׁמֵר תּוֹכַחַת יַעְרִם׃
englishText: A fool despiseth his father’s correction; But he that regardeth reproof is prudent.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֵּית צַדִּיק חֹסֶן רָב וּבִתְבוּאַת רָשָׁע נֶעְכָּרֶת׃
englishText: In the house of the righteous is much treasure; But in the revenues of the wicked is trouble.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׂפְתֵי חֲכָמִים יְזָרוּ דָעַת וְלֵב כְּסִילִים לֹא־כֵן׃
englishText: The lips of the wise disperse knowledge; But the heart of the foolish is not stedfast.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֶבַח רְשָׁעִים תּוֹעֲבַת יְהוָה וּתְפִלַּת יְשָׁרִים רְצוֹנוֹ׃
englishText: The sacrifice of the wicked is an abomination to the LORD; But the prayer of the upright is His delight.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תּוֹעֲבַת יְהוָה דֶּרֶךְ רָשָׁע וּמְרַדֵּף צְדָקָה יֶאֱהָב׃
englishText: The way of the wicked is an abomination to the LORD; But He loveth him that followeth after righteousness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מוּסָר רָע לְעֹזֵב אֹרַח שׂוֹנֵא תוֹכַחַת יָמוּת׃
englishText: There is grievous correction for him that forsaketh the way; And he that hateth reproof shall die.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁאוֹל וַאֲבַדּוֹן נֶגֶד יְהוָה אַף כִּי־לִבּוֹת בְּנֵי־אָדָם׃
englishText: The nether-world and Destruction are before the LORD; How much more then the hearts of the children of men!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא יֶאֱהַב־לֵץ הוֹכֵחַ לוֹ אֶל־חֲכָמִים לֹא יֵלֵךְ׃
englishText: A scorner loveth not to be reproved; He will not go unto the wise.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֵב שָׂמֵחַ יֵיטִב פָּנִים וּבְעַצְּבַת־לֵב רוּחַ נְכֵאָה׃
englishText: A merry heart maketh a cheerful countenance; But by sorrow of heart the spirit is broken.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֵב נָבוֹן יְבַקֶּשׁ־דָּעַת ופני [וּפִי] כְסִילִים יִרְעֶה אִוֶּלֶת׃
englishText: The heart of him that hath discernment seeketh knowledge; But the mouth of fools feedeth on folly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־יְמֵי עָנִי רָעִים וְטוֹב־לֵב מִשְׁתֶּה תָמִיד׃
englishText: All the days of the poor are evil; But he that is of a merry heart hath a continual feast.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב־מְעַט בְּיִרְאַת יְהוָה מֵאוֹצָר רָב וּמְהוּמָה בוֹ׃
englishText: Better is little with the fear of the LORD, Than great treasure and turmoil therewith.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב אֲרֻחַת יָרָק וְאַהֲבָה־שָׁם מִשּׁוֹר אָבוּס וְשִׂנְאָה־בוֹ׃
englishText: Better is a dinner of herbs where love is, Than a stalled ox and hatred therewith.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִישׁ חֵמָה יְגָרֶה מָדוֹן וְאֶרֶך אַפַּיִם יַשְׁקִיט רִיב׃
englishText: A wrathful man stirreth up discord; But he that is slow to anger appeaseth strife.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דֶּרֶךְ עָצֵל כִּמְשֻׂכַת חָדֶק וְאֹרַח יְשָׁרִים סְלֻלָה׃
englishText: The way of the sluggard is as though hedged by thorns; But the path of the upright is even.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֵּן חָכָם יְשַׂמַּח־אָב וּכְסִיל אָדָם בּוֹזֶה אִמּוֹ׃
englishText: A wise son maketh a glad father; But a foolish man despiseth his mother.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִוֶּלֶת שִׂמְחָה לַחֲסַר־לֵב וְאִישׁ תְּבוּנָה יְיַשֶׁר־לָכֶת׃
englishText: Folly is joy to him that lacketh understanding; But a man of discernment walketh straightforwards.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָפֵר מַחֲשָׁבוֹת בְּאֵין סוֹד וּבְרֹב יוֹעֲצִים תָּקוּם׃
englishText: For want of counsel purposes are frustrated; But in the multitude of counsellors they are established.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׂמְחָה לָאִישׁ בְּמַעֲנֵה־פִיו וְדָבָר בְּעִתּוֹ מַה־טּוֹב׃
englishText: A man hath joy in the answer of his mouth; And a word in due season, how good is it!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֹרַח חַיִּים לְמַעְלָה לְמַשְׂכִּיל לְמַעַן סוּר מִשְּׁאוֹל מָטָּה׃
englishText: The path of life goeth upward for the wise, that he may depart from the nether-world beneath.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֵּית גֵּאִים יִסַּח יְהוָה וְיַצֵּב גְּבוּל אַלְמָנָה׃
englishText: The LORD will pluck up the house of the proud; But He will establish the border of the widow.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תּוֹעֲבַת יְהוָה מַחְשְׁבוֹת רָע וּטְהֹרִים אִמְרֵי־נֹעַם׃
englishText: The thoughts of wickedness are an abomination to the LORD; But words of pleasantness are pure.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֹכֵר בֵּיתוֹ בּוֹצֵעַ בָּצַע וְשׂוֹנֵא מַתָּנֹת יִחְיֶה׃
englishText: He that is greedy of gain troubleth his own house; But he that hateth gifts shall live.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֵב צַדִּיק יֶהְגֶּה לַעֲנוֹת וּפִי רְשָׁעִים יַבִּיעַ רָעוֹת׃
englishText: The heart of the righteous studieth to answer; But the mouth of the wicked poureth out evil things.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָחוֹק יְהוָה מֵרְשָׁעִים וּתְפִלַּת צַדִּיקִים יִשְׁמָע׃
englishText: The LORD is far from the wicked; But He heareth the prayer of the righteous.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְאוֹר־עֵינַיִם יְשַׂמַּח־לֵב שְׁמוּעָה טוֹבָה תְּדַשֶּׁן־עָצֶם׃
englishText: The light of the eyes rejoiceth the heart; And a good report maketh the bones fat.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֹזֶן שֹׁמַעַת תּוֹכַחַת חַיִּים בְּקֶרֶב חֲכָמִים תָּלִין׃
englishText: The ear that hearkeneth to the reproof of life abideth among the wise.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פּוֹרֵעַ מוּסָר מוֹאֵס נַפְשׁוֹ וְשׁוֹמֵעַ תּוֹכַחַת קוֹנֶה לֵּב׃
englishText: He that refuseth correction despiseth his own soul; But he that hearkeneth to reproof getteth understanding.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִרְאַת יְהוָה מוּסַר חָכְמָה וְלִפְנֵי כָבוֹד עֲנָוָה׃
englishText: The fear of the LORD is the instruction of wisdom; And before honour goeth humility.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְאָדָם מַעַרְכֵי־לֵב וּמֵיְהוָה מַעֲנֵה לָשׁוֹן׃
englishText: The preparations of the heart are man’s, But the answer of the tongue is from the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־דַּרְכֵי־אִישׁ זַךְ בְּעֵינָיו וְתֹכֵן רוּחוֹת יְהוָה׃
englishText: All the ways of a man are clean in his own eyes; But the LORD weigheth the spirits.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גֹּל אֶל־יְהוָה מַעֲשֶׂיךָ וְיִכֹּנוּ מַחְשְׁבֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: Commit thy works unto the LORD, And thy thoughts shall be established.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֹּל פָּעַל יְהוָה לַמַּעֲנֵהוּ וְגַם־רָשָׁע לְיוֹם רָעָה׃
englishText: The LORD hath made every things for His own purpose, Yea, even the wicked for the day of evil.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תּוֹעֲבַת יְהוָה כָּל־גְּבַהּ־לֵב יָד לְיָד לֹא יִנָּקֶה׃
englishText: Every one that is proud in heart is an abomination to the LORD; My hand upon it! he shall not be unpunished.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּחֶסֶד וֶאֱמֶת יְכֻפַּר עָוֺן וּבְיִרְאַת יְהוָה סוּר מֵרָע׃
englishText: By mercy and truth iniquity is expiated; And by the fear of the LORD men depart from evil.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּרְצוֹת יְהוָה דַּרְכֵי־אִישׁ גַּם־אוֹיְבָיו יַשְׁלִם אִתּוֹ׃
englishText: When a man’s ways please the LORD, He maketh even his enemies to be at peace with him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב־מְעַט בִּצְדָקָה מֵרֹב תְּבוּאוֹת בְּלֹא מִשְׁפָּט׃
englishText: Better is a little with righteousness Than great revenues with injustice.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֵב אָדָם יְחַשֵּׁב דַּרְכּוֹ וַיהוָה יָכִין צַעֲדוֹ׃
englishText: A man’s heart deviseth his way; But the LORD directeth his steps.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קֶסֶם עַל־שִׂפְתֵי־מֶלֶךְ בְּמִשְׁפָּט לֹא יִמְעַל־פִּיו׃
englishText: A divine sentence is in the lips of the king; His mouth trespasseth not in judgment.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פֶּלֶס וּמֹאזְנֵי מִשְׁפָּט לַיהוָה מַעֲשֵׂהוּ כָּל־אַבְנֵי־כִיס׃
englishText: A just balance and scales are the LORD’S; All the weights of the bag are His work.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תּוֹעֲבַת מְלָכִים עֲשׂוֹת רֶשַׁע כִּי בִצְדָקָה יִכּוֹן כִּסֵּא׃
englishText: It is an abomination to kings to commit wickedness; For the throne is established by righteousness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רְצוֹן מְלָכִים שִׂפְתֵי־צֶדֶק וְדֹבֵר יְשָׁרִים יֶאֱהָב׃
englishText: Righteous lips are the delight of kings; And they love him that speaketh right.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֲמַת־מֶלֶךְ מַלְאֲכֵי־מָוֶת וְאִישׁ חָכָם יְכַפְּרֶנָּה׃
englishText: The wrath of a king is as messengers of death; But a wise man will pacify it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּאוֹר־פְּנֵי־מֶלֶךְ חַיִּים וּרְצוֹנוֹ כְּעָב מַלְקוֹשׁ׃
englishText: In the light of the king’s countenance is life; And his favour is as a cloud of the latter rain.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קְנֹה־חָכְמָה מַה־טּוֹב מֵחָרוּץ וּקְנוֹת בִּינָה נִבְחָר מִכָּסֶף׃
englishText: How much better is it to get wisdom than gold! Yea, to get understanding is rather to be chosen than silver.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְסִלַּת יְשָׁרִים סוּר מֵרָע שֹׁמֵר נַפְשׁוֹ נֹצֵר דַּרְכּוֹ׃
englishText: The highway of the upright is to depart from evil; He that keepeth his way preserveth his soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִפְנֵי־שֶׁבֶר גָּאוֹן וְלִפְנֵי כִשָּׁלוֹן גֹּבַהּ רוּחַ׃
englishText: Pride goeth before destruction, And a haughty spirit before a fall.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב שְׁפַל־רוּחַ אֶת־עניים [עֲנָוִים] מֵחַלֵּק שָׁלָל אֶת־גֵּאִים׃
englishText: Better it is to be of a lowly spirit with the humble, Than to divide the spoil with the proud.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַשְׂכִּיל עַל־דָּבָר יִמְצָא־טוֹב וּבוֹטֵחַ בַּיהוָה אַשְׁרָיו׃
englishText: He that giveth heed unto the word shall find good; And whoso trusteth in the LORD, happy is he.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַחֲכַם־לֵב יִקָּרֵא נָבוֹן וּמֶתֶק שְׂפָתַיִם יֹסִיף לֶקַח׃
englishText: The wise in heart is called a man of discernment; And the sweetness of the lips increaseth learning.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְקוֹר חַיִּים שֵׂכֶל בְּעָלָיו וּמוּסַר אֱוִלִים אִוֶּלֶת׃
englishText: Understanding is a fountain of life unto him that hath it; But folly is the chastisement of fools.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֵב חָכָם יַשְׂכִּיל פִּיהוּ וְעַל־שְׂפָתָיו יֹסִיף לֶקַח׃
englishText: The heart of the wise teacheth his mouth, And addeth learning to his lips.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צוּף־דְּבַשׁ אִמְרֵי־נֹעַם מָתוֹק לַנֶּפֶשׁ וּמַרְפֵּא לָעָצֶם׃
englishText: Pleasant words are as a honeycomb, Sweet to the soul, and health to the bones.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵשׁ דֶּרֶךְ יָשָׁר לִפְנֵי־אִישׁ וְאַחֲרִיתָהּ דַּרְכֵי־מָוֶת׃
englishText: There is a way which seemeth right unto a man, But the end thereof are the ways of death.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֶפֶשׁ עָמֵל עָמְלָה לּוֹ כִּי־אָכַף עָלָיו פִּיהוּ׃
englishText: The hunger of the labouring man laboureth for him; For his mouth compelleth him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִישׁ בְּלִיַּעַל כֹּרֶה רָעָה וְעַל־שפתיו [שְׂפָתוֹ] כְּאֵשׁ צָרָבֶת׃
englishText: An ungodly man diggeth up evil, And in his lips there is as a burning fire.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִישׁ תַּהְפֻּכוֹת יְשַׁלַּח מָדוֹן וְנִרְגָּן מַפְרִיד אַלּוּף׃
englishText: A froward man soweth strife; And a whisperer separateth familiar friends.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִישׁ חָמָס יְפַתֶּה רֵעֵהוּ וְהוֹלִיכוֹ בְּדֶרֶךְ לֹא־טוֹב׃
englishText: A man of violence enticeth his neighbour, And leadeth him into a way that is not good.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֹצֶה עֵינָיו לַחְשֹׁב תַּהְפֻּכוֹת קֹרֵץ שְׂפָתָיו כִּלָּה רָעָה׃
englishText: He shutteth his eyes, it is to devise froward things; He that biteth his lips bringeth evil to pass.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֲטֶרֶת תִּפְאֶרֶת שֵׂיבָה בְּדֶרֶךְ צְדָקָה תִּמָּצֵא׃
englishText: The hoary head is a crown of glory, It is found in the way of righteousness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב אֶרֶךְ אַפַּיִם מִגִּבּוֹר וּמֹשֵׁל בְּרוּחוֹ מִלֹּכֵד עִיר׃
englishText: He that is slow to anger is better than the mighty; And he that ruleth his spirit than he that taketh a city.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּחֵיק יוּטַל אֶת־הַגּוֹרָל וּמֵיְהוָה כָּל־מִשְׁפָּטוֹ׃
englishText: The lot is cast into the lap; But the whole disposing thereof is of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב פַּת חֲרֵבָה וְשַׁלְוָה־בָהּ מִבַּיִת מָלֵא זִבְחֵי־רִיב׃
englishText: Better is a dry morsel and quietness therewith, Than a house full of feasting with strife.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֶבֶד־מַשְׂכִּיל יִמְשֹׁל בְּבֵן מֵבִישׁ וּבְתוֹךְ אַחִים יַחֲלֹק נַחֲלָה׃
englishText: A servant that dealeth wisely shall have rule over a son that dealeth shamefully, And shall have part of the inheritance among the brethren.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַצְרֵף לַכֶּסֶף וְכוּר לַזָּהָב וּבֹחֵן לִבּוֹת יְהוָה׃
englishText: The refining pot is for silver, and the furnace for gold; But the LORD trieth the hearts. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֵרַע מַקְשִׁיב עַל־שְׂפַת־אָוֶן שֶׁקֶר מֵזִין עַל־לְשׁוֹן הַוֺּת׃
englishText: A evil-doer giveth heed to wicked lips; And a liar giveth ear to a mischievous tongue.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹעֵג לָרָשׁ חֵרֵף עֹשֵׂהוּ שָׂמֵחַ לְאֵיד לֹא יִנָּקֶה׃
englishText: Whoso mocketh the poor blasphemeth his Maker; And he that is glad at calamity shall not be unpunished.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֲטֶרֶת זְקֵנִים בְּנֵי בָנִים וְתִפְאֶרֶת בָּנִים אֲבוֹתָם׃
englishText: Children’s children are the crown of old men; And the glory of children are their fathers.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־נָאוָה לְנָבָל שְׂפַת־יֶתֶר אַף כִּי־לְנָדִיב שְׂפַת־שָׁקֶר׃
englishText: Overbearing speech becometh not a churl; Much less do lying lips a prince.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶבֶן־חֵן הַשֹּׁחַד בְּעֵינֵי בְעָלָיו אֶל־כָּל־אֲשֶׁר יִפְנֶה יַשְׂכִּיל׃
englishText: A gift is as a precious stone in the eyes of him that hath it; Whithersoever he turneth, he prospereth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְכַסֶּה־פֶּשַׁע מְבַקֵּשׁ אַהֲבָה וְשֹׁנֶה בְדָבָר מַפְרִיד אַלּוּף׃
englishText: He that covereth a transgression seeketh love; But he that harpeth on a matter estrangeth a familiar friend.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תֵּחַת גְּעָרָה בְמֵבִין מֵהַכּוֹת כְּסִיל מֵאָה׃
englishText: A rebuke entereth deeper into a man of understanding Than a hundred stripes into a fool.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ־מְרִי יְבַקֶּשׁ־רָע וּמַלְאָךְ אַכְזָרִי יְשֻׁלַּח־בּוֹ׃
englishText: A rebellious man seeketh only evil; Therefore a cruel messenger shall be sent against him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פָּגוֹשׁ דֹּב שַׁכּוּל בְּאִישׁ וְאַל־כְּסִיל בְּאִוַּלְתּוֹ׃
englishText: Let a bear robbed of her whelps meet a man, Rather than a fool in his folly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֵשִׁיב רָעָה תַּחַת טוֹבָה לֹא־תמיש [תָמוּשׁ] רָעָה מִבֵּיתוֹ׃
englishText: Whoso rewardeth evil for good, Evil shall not depart from his house.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פּוֹטֵר מַיִם רֵאשִׁית מָדוֹן וְלִפְנֵי הִתְגַּלַּע הָרִיב נְטוֹשׁ׃
englishText: The beginning of strife is as when one letteth out water; Therefore leave off contention, before the quarrel break out.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַצְדִּיק רָשָׁע וּמַרְשִׁיעַ צַדִּיק תּוֹעֲבַת יְהוָה גַּם־שְׁנֵיהֶם׃
englishText: He that justifieth the wicked, and he that condemneth the righteous, Even they both are an abomination to the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָמָּה־זֶּה מְחִיר בְּיַד־כְּסִיל לִקְנוֹת חָכְמָה וְלֶב־אָיִן׃
englishText: Wherefore is there a price in the hand of a fool To buy wisdom, seeing he hath no understanding?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּכָל־עֵת אֹהֵב הָרֵעַ וְאָח לְצָרָה יִוָּלֵד׃
englishText: A friend loveth at all times, And a brother is born for adversity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָדָם חֲסַר־לֵב תּוֹקֵעַ כָּף עֹרֵב עֲרֻבָּה לִפְנֵי רֵעֵהוּ׃
englishText: A man void of understanding is he that striketh hands, And becometh surety in the presence of his neighbour.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֹהֵב פֶּשַׁע אֹהֵב מַצָּה מַגְבִּיהַּ פִּתְחוֹ מְבַקֶּשׁ־שָׁבֶר׃
englishText: He loveth transgression that loveth strife; He that exalteth his gate seeketh destruction.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עִקֶּשׁ־לֵב לֹא יִמְצָא־טוֹב וְנֶהְפָּךְ בִּלְשׁוֹנוֹ יִפּוֹל בְּרָעָה׃
englishText: He that hath a forward heart findeth no good; And he that hath a perverse tongue falleth into evil.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֹלֵד כְּסִיל לְתוּגָה לוֹ וְלֹא־יִשְׂמַח אֲבִי נָבָל׃
englishText: He that begetteth a fool doeth it to his sorrow; And the father of a churl hath no joy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֵב שָׂמֵחַ יֵיטִב גֵּהָה וְרוּחַ נְכֵאָה תְּיַבֶּשׁ־גָּרֶם׃
englishText: A merry heart is a good medicine; But a broken spirit drieth the bones.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֹׁחַד מֵחֵיק רָשָׁע יִקָּח לְהַטּוֹת אָרְחוֹת מִשְׁפָּט׃
englishText: A wicked man taketh a gift out of the bosom, To pervert the ways of justice.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶת־פְּנֵי מֵבִין חָכְמָה וְעֵינֵי כְסִיל בִּקְצֵה־אָרֶץ׃
englishText: Wisdom is before him that hath understanding; But the eyes of a fool are in the ends of the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּעַס לְאָבִיו בֵּן כְּסִיל וּמֶמֶר לְיוֹלַדְתּוֹ׃
englishText: A foolish son is vexation to his father, And bitterness to her that bore him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם עֲנוֹשׁ לַצַּדִּיק לֹא־טוֹב לְהַכּוֹת נְדִיבִים עַל־יֹשֶׁר׃
englishText: To punish also the righteous is not good, Nor to strike the noble for their uprightness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חוֹשֵׂךְ אֲמָרָיו יוֹדֵעַ דָּעַת וקר־[יְקַר־] רוּחַ אִישׁ תְּבוּנָה׃
englishText: He that spareth his words hath knowledge; And he that husbandeth his spirit is a man of discernment.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם אֱוִיל מַחֲרִישׁ חָכָם יֵחָשֵׁב אֹטֵם שְׂפָתָיו נָבוֹן׃
englishText: Even a fool, when he holdeth his peace, is counted wise; And he that shutteth his lips is esteemed as a man of understanding.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְתַאֲוָה יְבַקֵּשׁ נִפְרָד בְּכָל־תּוּשִׁיָּה יִתְגַּלָּע׃
englishText: He that separateth himself seeketh his own desire, And snarlest against all sound wisdom.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יַחְפֹּץ כְּסִיל בִּתְבוּנָה כִּי אִם־בְּהִתְגַּלּוֹת לִבּוֹ׃
englishText: A fool hath no delight in understanding, But only that his heart may lay itself bare.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּבוֹא־רָשָׁע בָּא גַם־בּוּז וְעִם־קָלוֹן חֶרְפָּה׃
englishText: When the wicked cometh, there cometh also contempt, And with ignominy reproach.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַיִם עֲמֻקִּים דִּבְרֵי פִי־אִישׁ נַחַל נֹבֵעַ מְקוֹר חָכְמָה׃
englishText: The words of a man’s mouth are as deep waters; A flowing brook, a fountain of wisdom.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׂאֵת פְּנֵי־רָשָׁע לֹא־טוֹב לְהַטּוֹת צַדִּיק בַּמִּשְׁפָּט׃
englishText: It is not good to respect the person of the wicked, So as to turn aside the righteous in judgment.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׂפְתֵי כְסִיל יָבֹאוּ בְרִיב וּפִיו לְמַהֲלֻמוֹת יִקְרָא׃
englishText: A fool’s lips enter into contention, And his mouth calleth for strokes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פִּי־כְסִיל מְחִתָּה־לוֹ וּשְׂפָתָיו מוֹקֵשׁ נַפְשׁוֹ׃
englishText: A fool’s mouth is his ruin, And his lips are the snare of his soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דִּבְרֵי נִרְגָּן כְּמִתְלַהֲמִים וְהֵם יָרְדוּ חַדְרֵי־בָטֶן׃
englishText: The words of a whisperer are as dainty morsels, And they go down into the innermost parts of the belly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם מִתְרַפֶּה בִמְלַאכְתּוֹ אָח הוּא לְבַעַל מַשְׁחִית׃
englishText: Even one that is slack in his work Is brother to him that is a destroyer. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִגְדַּל־עֹז שֵׁם יְהוָה בּוֹ־יָרוּץ צַדִּיק וְנִשְׂגָּב׃
englishText: The name of the LORD is a strong tower: The righteous runneth into it, and is set up on high.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹן עָשִׁיר קִרְיַת עֻזּוֹ וּכְחוֹמָה נִשְׂגָּבָה בְּמַשְׂכִּיתוֹ׃
englishText: The rich man’s wealth is his strong city, And as a high wall in his own conceit.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִפְנֵי־שֶׁבֶר יִגְבַּהּ לֵב־אִישׁ וְלִפְנֵי כָבוֹד עֲנָוָה׃
englishText: Before destruction the heart of a man is haughty, And before honour goeth humility.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֵשִׁיב דָּבָר בְּטֶרֶם יִשְׁמָע אִוֶּלֶת הִיא־לוֹ וּכְלִמָּה׃
englishText: He that giveth answer before he heareth, It is folly and confusion unto him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רוּחַ־אִישׁ יְכַלְכֵּל מַחֲלֵהוּ וְרוּחַ נְכֵאָה מִי יִשָּׂאֶנָּה׃
englishText: The spirit of a man will sustain his infirmity; But a broken spirit who can bear?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֵב נָבוֹן יִקְנֶה־דָּעַת וְאֹזֶן חֲכָמִים תְּבַקֶּשׁ־דָּעַת׃
englishText: The heart of the prudent getteth knowledge; And the ear of the wise seeketh knowledge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַתָּן אָדָם יַרְחִיב לוֹ וְלִפְנֵי גְדֹלִים יַנְחֶנּוּ׃
englishText: A man’s gift maketh room for him, And bringeth him before great men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צַדִּיק הָרִאשׁוֹן בְּרִיבוֹ יבא־[וּבָא־] רֵעֵהוּ וַחֲקָרוֹ׃
englishText: He that pleadeth his cause first seemeth just; But his neighbour cometh and searcheth him out.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִדְיָנִים יַשְׁבִּית הַגּוֹרָל וּבֵין עֲצוּמִים יַפְרִיד׃
englishText: The lot causeth strife to cease, And parteth asunder the contentious.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָח נִפְשָׁע מִקִּרְיַת־עֹז ומדונים [וּמִדְיָנִים] כִּבְרִיחַ אַרְמוֹן׃
englishText: A brother offended is harder to be won than a strong city; And their contentions are like the bars of a castle.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִפְּרִי פִי־אִישׁ תִּשְׂבַּע בִּטְנוֹ תְּבוּאַת שְׂפָתָיו יִשְׂבָּע׃
englishText: A man’s belly shall be filled with the fruit of his mouth; With the increase of his lips shall he be satisfied.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מָוֶת וְחַיִּים בְּיַד־לָשׁוֹן וְאֹהֲבֶיהָ יֹאכַל פִּרְיָהּ׃
englishText: Death and life are in the power of the tongue; And they that indulge it shall eat the fruit thereof.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מָצָא אִשָּׁה מָצָא טוֹב וַיָּפֶק רָצוֹן מֵיְהוָה׃
englishText: Whoso findeth a wife findeth a great good, And obtaineth favour of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּחֲנוּנִים יְדַבֶּר־רָשׁ וְעָשִׁיר יַעֲנֶה עַזּוֹת׃
englishText: The poor useth entreaties; But the rich answereth impudently.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִישׁ רֵעִים לְהִתְרֹעֵעַ וְיֵשׁ אֹהֵב דָּבֵק מֵאָח׃
englishText: There are friends that one hath to his own hurt; But there is a friend that sticketh closer than a brother.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב־רָשׁ הוֹלֵךְ בְּתֻמּוֹ מֵעִקֵּשׁ שְׂפָתָיו וְהוּא כְסִיל׃
englishText: Better is the poor that walketh in his integrity Than he that is perverse in his lips and a fool at the same time.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם בְּלֹא־דַעַת נֶפֶשׁ לֹא־טוֹב וְאָץ בְּרַגְלַיִם חוֹטֵא׃
englishText: Also, that the soul be without knowledge is not good; And he that hasteth with his feet sinneth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִוֶּלֶת אָדָם תְּסַלֵּף דַּרְכּוֹ וְעַל־יְהוָה יִזְעַף לִבּוֹ׃
englishText: The foolishness of man perverteth his way; And his heart fretteth against the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹן יֹסִיף רֵעִים רַבִּים וְדָל מֵרֵעהוּ יִפָּרֵד׃
englishText: Wealth addeth many friends; But as for the poor, his friend separateth himself from him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵד שְׁקָרִים לֹא יִנָּקֶה וְיָפִיחַ כְּזָבִים לֹא יִמָּלֵט׃
englishText: A false witness shall not be unpunished; And he that breatheth forth lies shall not escape.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַבִּים יְחַלּוּ פְנֵי־נָדִיב וְכָל־הָרֵעַ לְאִישׁ מַתָּן׃
englishText: Many will entreat the favour of the liberal man; And every man is a friend to him that giveth gifts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל אֲחֵי־רָשׁ שְׂנֵאֻהוּ אַף כִּי מְרֵעֵהוּ רָחֲקוּ מִמֶּנּוּ מְרַדֵּף אֲמָרִים לא־[לוֹ־] הֵמָּה׃
englishText: All the brethren of the poor do hate him; How much more do his friends go far from him! He that pursueth words, they turn against him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קֹנֶה־לֵּב אֹהֵב נַפְשׁוֹ שֹׁמֵר תְּבוּנָה לִמְצֹא־טוֹב׃
englishText: He that getteth wisdom loveth his own soul; He that keepeth understanding shall find good.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵד שְׁקָרִים לֹא יִנָּקֶה וְיָפִיחַ כְּזָבִים יֹאבֵד׃
englishText: A false witness shall not be unpunished; And he that breatheth forth lies shall perish.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־נָאוֶה לִכְסִיל תַּעֲנוּג אַף כִּי־לְעֶבֶד מְשֹׁל בְּשָׂרִים׃
englishText: Luxury is not seemly for a fool; Much less for a servant to have rule over princes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֵׂכֶל אָדָם הֶאֱרִיךְ אַפּוֹ וְתִפאַרְתּוֹ עֲבֹר עַל־פָּשַׁע׃
englishText: It is the discretion of a man to be slow to anger, And it is his glory to pass over a transgression.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נַהַם כַּכְּפִיר זַעַף מֶלֶךְ וּכְטַל עַל־עֵשֶׂב רְצוֹנוֹ׃
englishText: The king’s wrath is as the roaring of a lion; But his favour is as dew upon the grass.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַוֺּת לְאָבִיו בֵּן כְּסִיל וְדֶלֶף טֹרֵד מִדְיְנֵי אִשָּׁה׃
englishText: A foolish son is the calamity of his father; And the contentions of a wife are a continual dropping.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּיִת וָהוֹן נַחֲלַת אָבוֹת וּמֵיְהוָה אִשָּׁה מַשְׂכָּלֶת׃
englishText: House and riches are the inheritance of fathers; But a prudent wife is from the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַצְלָה תַּפִּיל תַּרְדֵּמָה וְנֶפֶשׁ רְמִיָּה תִרְעָב׃
englishText: Slothfulness casteth into a deep sleep; And the idle soul shall suffer hunger.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֹׁמֵר מִצְוָה שֹׁמֵר נַפְשׁוֹ בּוֹזֵה דְרָכָיו יומת [יָמוּת׃]
englishText: He that keepeth the commandment keepeth his soul; But he that despiseth His ways shall die.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַלְוֵה יְהוָה חוֹנֵן דָּל וּגְמֻלוֹ יְשַׁלֶּם־לוֹ׃
englishText: He that is gracious unto the poor lendeth unto the LORD; And his good deed will He repay unto him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַסֵּר בִּנְךָ כִּי־יֵשׁ תִּקְוָה וְאֶל־הֲמִיתוֹ אַל־תִּשָּׂא נַפְשֶׁךָ׃
englishText: Chasten thy son, for there is hope; But set not thy heart on his destruction. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גרל־[גְּדָל־] חֵמָה נֹשֵׂא עֹנֶשׁ כִּי אִם־תַּצִּיל וְעוֹד תּוֹסִף׃
englishText: A man of great wrath shall suffer punishment; For if thou interpose, thou wilt add thereto.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁמַע עֵצָה וְקַבֵּל מוּסָר לְמַעַן תֶּחְכַּם בְּאַחֲרִיתֶךָ׃
englishText: Hear counsel, and receive instruction, That thou mayest be wise in thy latter end.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַבּוֹת מַחֲשָׁבוֹת בְּלֶב־אִישׁ וַעֲצַת יְהוָה הִיא תָקוּם׃
englishText: There are many devices in a man’s heart; But the counsel of the LORD, that shall stand.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּאֲוַת אָדָם חַסְדּוֹ וְטוֹב־רָשׁ מֵאִישׁ כָּזָב׃
englishText: The lust of a man is his shame; And a poor man is better than a liar.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִרְאַת יְהוָה לְחַיִּים וְשָׂבֵעַ יָלִין בַּל־יִפָּקֶד רָע׃
englishText: The fear of the LORD tendeth to life; And he that hath it shall abide satisfied, He shall not be visited with evil.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טָמַן עָצֵל יָדוֹ בַּצַּלָּחַת גַּם־אֶל־פִּיהוּ לֹא יְשִׁיבֶנָּה׃
englishText: The sluggard burieth his hand in the dish, And will not so much as bring it back to his mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֵץ תַּכֶּה וּפֶתִי יַעְרִם וְהוֹכִיחַ לְנָבוֹן יָבִין דָּעַת׃
englishText: When thou smitest a scorner, the simple will become prudent; And when one that hath understanding is reproved, he will understand knowledge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְשַׁדֶּד־אָב יַבְרִיחַ אֵם בֵּן מֵבִישׁ וּמַחְפִּיר׃
englishText: A son that dealeth shamefully and reproachfully Will despoil his father, and chase away his mother.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַדַל־בְּנִי לִשְׁמֹעַ מוּסָר לִשְׁגוֹת מֵאִמְרֵי־דָעַת׃
englishText: Cease, my son, to hear the instruction That causeth to err from the words of knowledge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵד בְּלִיַּעַל יָלִיץ מִשְׁפָּט וּפִי רְשָׁעִים יְבַלַּע־אָוֶן׃
englishText: An ungodly witness mocketh at right; And the mouth of the wicked devoureth iniquity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָכוֹנוּ לַלֵּצִים שְׁפָטִים וּמַהֲלֻמוֹת לְגֵו כְּסִילִים׃
englishText: Judgments are prepared for scorners, And stripes for the back of fools.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֵץ הַיַּין הֹמֶה שֵׁכָר וְכָל־שֹׁגֶה בּוֹ לֹא יֶחְכָּם׃
englishText: Wine is a mocker, strong drink is riotous; and whosoever reeleth thereby is not wise.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נַהַם כַּכְּפִיר אֵימַת מֶלֶךְ מִתְעַבְּרוֹ חוֹטֵא נַפְשׁוֹ׃
englishText: The terror of a king is as the roaring of a lion: He that provoketh him to anger forfeiteth his life.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּבוֹד לָאִישׁ שֶׁבֶת מֵרִיב וְכָל־אֱוִיל יִתְגַּלָּע׃
englishText: It is an honour for a man to keep aloof from strife; but every fool will be snarling.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֵחֹרֶף עָצֵל לֹא־יַחֲרֹשׁ ישאל [וְשָׁאַל] בַּקָּצִיר וָאָיִן׃
englishText: The sluggard will not plow when winter setteth in; therefore he shall beg in harvest, and have nothing.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַיִם עֲמֻקִּים עֵצָה בְלֶב־אִישׁ וְאִישׁ תְּבוּנָה יִדְלֶנָּה׃
englishText: Counsel in the heart of man is like deep water; but a man of understanding will draw it out. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָב־אָדָם יִקְרָא אִישׁ חַסְדּוֹ וְאִישׁ אֱמוּנִים מִי יִמְצָא׃
englishText: Most men will proclaim every one his own goodness; but a faithful man who can find?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִתְהַלֵּךְ בְּתֻמּוֹ צַדִּיק אַשְׁרֵי בָנָיו אַחֲרָיו׃
englishText: He that walketh in his integrity as a just man, happy are his children after him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֶלֶךְ יוֹשֵׁב עַל־כִּסֵּא־דִין מְזָרֶה בְעֵינָיו כָּל־רָע׃
englishText: A king that sitteth on the throne of judgment scattereth away all evil with his eyes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־יֹאמַר זִכִּיתִי לִבִּי טָהַרְתִּי מֵחַטָּאתִי׃
englishText: Who can say: ‘I have made my heart clean, I am pure from my sin’?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶבֶן וָאֶבֶן אֵיפָה וְאֵיפָה תּוֹעֲבַת יְהוָה גַּם־שְׁנֵיהֶם׃
englishText: Divers weights, and divers measures, both of them alike are abomination to the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם בְּמַעֲלָלָיו יִתְנַכֶּר־נָעַר אִם־זַךְ וְאִם־יָשָׁר פָּעֳלוֹ׃
englishText: Even a child is known by his doings, whether his work be pure, and whether it be right.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֹזֶן שֹׁמַעַת וְעַיִן רֹאָה יְהוָה עָשָׂה גַם־שְׁנֵיהֶם׃
englishText: The hearing ear, and the seeing eye, the LORD hath made even both of them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תֶּאֱהַב שֵׁנָה פֶּן־תִּוָּרֵשׁ פְּקַח עֵינֶיךָ שְׂבַע־לָחֶם׃
englishText: Love not sleep, lest thou come to poverty; open thine eyes, and thou shalt have bread in plenty.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַע רַע יֹאמַר הַקּוֹנֶה וְאֹזֵל לוֹ אָז יִתְהַלָּל׃
englishText: ’It is bad, it is bad’, saith the buyer; but when he is gone his way, then he boasteth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵשׁ זָהָב וְרָב־פְּנִינִים וּכְלִי יְקָר שִׂפְתֵי־דָעַת׃
englishText: There is gold, and a multitude of rubies; but the lips of knowledge are a precious jewel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְקַח־בִּגְדוֹ כִּי־עָרַב זָר וּבְעַד נכרים [נָכְרִיָּה] חַבְלֵהוּ׃
englishText: Take his garment that is surety for a stranger; and hold him in pledge that is surety for an alien woman.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָרֵב לָאִישׁ לֶחֶם שָׁקֶר וְאַחַר יִמָּלֵא־פִיהוּ חָצָץ׃
englishText: Bread of falsehood is sweet to a man; but afterwards his mouth shall be filled with gravel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַחֲשָׁבוֹת בְּעֵצָה תִכּוֹן וּבְתַחְבֻּלוֹת עֲשֵׂה מִלְחָמָה׃
englishText: Every purpose is established by counsel; and with good advice carry on war.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גּוֹלֶה־סּוֹד הוֹלֵךְ רָכִיל וּלְפֹתֶה שְׂפָתָיו לֹא תִתְעָרָב׃
englishText: He that goeth about as a talebearer revealeth secrets; therefore meddle not with him that openeth wide his lips.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְקַלֵּל אָבִיו וְאִמּוֹ יִדְעַךְ נֵרוֹ באישון [בֶּאֱשׁוּן] חֹשֶׁךְ׃
englishText: Whoso curseth his father or his mother, his lamp shall be put out in the blackest darkness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נַחֲלָה מבחלת [מְבֹהֶלֶת] בָּרִאשֹׁנָה וְאַחֲרִיתָהּ לֹא תְבֹרָךְ׃
englishText: An estate may be gotten hastily at the beginning; but the end thereof shall not be blessed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תֹּאמַר אֲשַׁלְּמָה־רָע קַוֵּה לַיהוָה וְיֹשַׁע לָךְ׃
englishText: Say not thou: ‘I will requite evil’; wait for the LORD, and He will save thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תּוֹעֲבַת יְהוָה אֶבֶן וָאָבֶן וּמֹאזְנֵי מִרְמָה לֹא־טוֹב׃
englishText: Divers weights are an abomination to the LORD; and a false balance is not good.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֵיהוָה מִצְעֲדֵי־גָבֶר וְאָדָם מַה־יָּבִין דַּרְכּוֹ׃
englishText: A man’s goings are of the LORD; how then can man look to his way?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מוֹקֵשׁ אָדָם יָלַע קֹדֶשׁ וְאַחַר נְדָרִים לְבַקֵּר׃
englishText: It is a snare to a man rashly to say: ‘Holy’, and after vows to make inquiry.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְזָרֶה רְשָׁעִים מֶלֶךְ חָכָם וַיָּשֶׁב עֲלֵיהֶם אוֹפָן׃
englishText: A wise king sifteth the wicked, and turneth the wheel over them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֵר יְהוָה נִשְׁמַת אָדָם חֹפֵשׂ כָּל־חַדְרֵי־בָטֶן׃
englishText: The spirit of man is the lamp of the LORD, searching all the inward parts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֶסֶד וֶאֱמֶת יִצְּרוּ־מֶלֶךְ וְסָעַד בַּחֶסֶד כִּסְאוֹ׃
englishText: Mercy and truth preserve the king; and his throne is upheld by mercy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּפְאֶרֶת בַּחוּרִים כֹּחָם וַהֲדַר זְקֵנִים שֵׂיבָה׃
englishText: The glory of young men is their strength; and the beauty of old men is the hoary head.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַבֻּרוֹת פֶּצַע תמריק [תַּמְרוּק] בְּרָע וּמַכּוֹת חַדְרֵי־בָטֶן׃
englishText: Sharp wounds cleanse away evil; So do stripes that reach the inward parts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פַּלְגֵי־מַיִם לֶב־מֶלֶךְ בְּיַד־יְהוָה עַל־כָּל־אֲשֶׁר יַחְפֹּץ יַטֶּנּוּ׃
englishText: The king’s heart is in the hand of the LORD, as the watercourses: He turneth it whithersoever He will.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־דֶּרֶךְ־אִישׁ יָשָׁר בְּעֵינָיו וְתֹכֵן לִבּוֹת יְהוָה׃
englishText: Every way of a man is right in his own eyes; But the LORD weigheth the hearts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֲשֹׂה צְדָקָה וּמִשְׁפָּט נִבְחָר לַיהוָה מִזָּבַח׃
englishText: To do righteousness and justice Is more acceptable to the LORD than sacrifice.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רוּם־עֵינַיִם וּרְחַב־לֵב נִר רְשָׁעִים חַטָּאת׃
englishText: A haughty look, and a proud heart— The tillage of the wicked is sin.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַחְשְׁבוֹת חָרוּץ אַךְ־לְמוֹתָר וְכָל־אָץ אַךְ־לְמַחְסוֹר׃
englishText: The thoughts of the diligent tend only to plenteousness; But every one that is hasty hasteth only to want.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פֹּעַל אוֹצָרוֹת בִּלְשׁוֹן שָׁקֶר הֶבֶל נִדָּף מְבַקְשֵׁי־מָוֶת׃
englishText: The getting of treasures by a lying tongue Is a vapour driven to and fro; they [that seek them] seek death.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֹׁד־רְשָׁעִים יְגוֹרֵם כִּי מֵאֲנוּ לַעֲשׂוֹת מִשְׁפָּט׃
englishText: The violence of the wicked shall drag them away; Because they refuse to do justly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲפַכְפַּךְ דֶּרֶךְ אִישׁ וָזָר וְזַךְ יָשָׁר פָּעֳלוֹ׃
englishText: The way of man is froward and strange; But as for the pure, his work is right.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב לָשֶׁבֶת עַל־פִּנַּת־גָּג מֵאֵשֶׁת מִדְיָנִים וּבֵית חָבֶר׃
englishText: It is better to dwell in a corner of the housetop, Than in a house in common with a contentious woman.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֶפֶשׁ רָשָׁע אִוְּתָה־רָע לֹא־יֻחַן בְּעֵינָיו רֵעֵהוּ׃
englishText: The soul of the wicked desireth evil; His neighbour findeth no favour in his eyes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּעְנָשׁ־לֵץ יֶחְכַּם־פֶּתִי וּבְהַשְׂכִּיל לְחָכָם יִקַּח־דָּעַת׃
englishText: When the scorner is punished, the thoughtless is made wise; And when the wise is instructed, he receiveth knowledge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַשְׂכִּיל צַדִּיק לְבֵית רָשָׁע מְסַלֵּף רְשָׁעִים לָרָע׃
englishText: The Righteous One considereth the house of the wicked; Overthrowing the wicked to their ruin.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֹטֵם אָזְנוֹ מִזַּעֲקַת־דָּל גַּם־הוּא יִקְרָא וְלֹא יֵעָנֶה׃
englishText: Whoso stoppeth his ears at the cry of the poor, He also shall cry himself, but shall not be answered.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַתָּן בַּסֵּתֶר יִכְפֶּה־אָף וְשֹׁחַד בַּחֵק חֵמָה עַזָּה׃
englishText: A gift in secret pacifieth anger, And a present in the bosom strong wrath.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׂמְחָה לַצַּדִּיק עֲשׂוֹת מִשְׁפָּט וּמְחִתָּה לְפֹעֲלֵי אָוֶן׃
englishText: To do justly is joy to the righteous, But ruin to the workers of iniquity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָדָם תּוֹעֶה מִדֶּרֶךְ הַשְׂכֵּל בִּקְהַל רְפָאִים יָנוּחַ׃
englishText: The man that strayeth out of the way of understanding Shall rest in the congregation of the shades.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִישׁ מַחְסוֹר אֹהֵב שִׂמְחָה אֹהֵב יַיִן־וָשֶׁמֶן לֹא יַעֲשִׁיר׃
englishText: He that loveth pleasure shall be a poor man; He that loveth wine and oil shall not be rich.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֹּפֶר לַצַּדִּיק רָשָׁע וְתַחַת יְשָׁרִים בּוֹגֵד׃
englishText: The wicked is a ransom for the righteous; And the faithless cometh in the stead of the upright.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב שֶׁבֶת בְּאֶרֶץ־מִדְבָּר מֵאֵשֶׁת מדונים [מִדְיָנִים] וָכָעַס׃
englishText: It is better to dwell in a desert land, Than with a contentious and fretful woman.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹצָר נֶחְמָד וָשֶׁמֶן בִּנְוֵה חָכָם וּכְסִיל אָדָם יְבַלְּעֶנּוּ׃
englishText: There is desirable treasure and oil in the dwelling of the wise; But a foolish man swalloweth it up.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רֹדֵף צְדָקָה וָחָסֶד יִמְצָא חַיִּים צְדָקָה וְכָבוֹד׃
englishText: He that followeth after righteousness and mercy Findeth life, prosperity, and honour.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עִיר גִּבֹּרִים עָלָה חָכָם וַיֹּרֶד עֹז מִבְטֶחָה׃
englishText: A wise man scaleth the city of the mighty, And bringeth down the stronghold wherein it trusteth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֹׁמֵר פִּיו וּלְשׁוֹנוֹ שֹׁמֵר מִצָּרוֹת נַפְשׁוֹ׃
englishText: Whoso keepeth his mouth and his tongue Keepeth his soul from troubles.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֵד יָהִיר לֵץ שְׁמוֹ עוֹשֶׂה בְּעֶבְרַת זָדוֹן׃
englishText: A proud and haughty man, scorner is his name, Even he that dealeth in overbearing pride.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּאֲוַת עָצֵל תְּמִיתֶנּוּ כִּי־מֵאֲנוּ יָדָיו לַעֲשׂוֹת׃
englishText: The desire of the slothful killeth him; For his hands refuse to labour.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־הַיּוֹם הִתְאַוָּה תַאֲוָה וְצַדִּיק יִתֵּן וְלֹא יַחְשֹׂךְ׃
englishText: There is that coveteth greedily all the day long; But the righteous giveth and spareth not.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֶבַח רְשָׁעִים תּוֹעֵבָה אַף כִּי־בְזִמָּה יְבִיאֶנּוּ׃
englishText: The sacrifice of the wicked is an abomination; How much more, when he bringeth it with the proceeds of wickedness?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵד־כְּזָבִים יֹאבֵד וְאִישׁ שׁוֹמֵעַ לָנֶצַח יְדַבֵּר׃
englishText: A false witness shall perish; But the man that obeyeth shall speak unchallenged.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵעֵז אִישׁ רָשָׁע בְּפָנָיו וְיָשָׁר הוּא יכין [יָבִין] דרכיו [דַּרְכּוֹ׃]
englishText: A wicked man hardeneth his face; But as for the upright, he looketh well to his way.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵין חָכְמָה וְאֵין תְּבוּנָה וְאֵין עֵצָה לְנֶגֶד יְהוָה׃
englishText: There is no wisdom nor understanding Nor counsel against the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סוּס מוּכָן לְיוֹם מִלְחָמָה וְלַיהוָה הַתְּשׁוּעָה׃
englishText: The horse is prepared against the day of battle; But victory is of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נִבְחָר שֵׁם מֵעֹשֶׁר רָב מִכֶּסֶף וּמִזָּהָב חֵן טוֹב׃
englishText: A good name is rather to be chosen than great riches, And loving favour rather than silver and gold.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָשִׁיר וָרָשׁ נִפְגָּשׁוּ עֹשֵׂה כֻלָּם יְהוָה׃
englishText: The rich and the poor meet together— The LORD is the maker of them all.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָרוּם רָאָה רָעָה ויסתר [וְנִסְתָּר] וּפְתָיִים עָבְרוּ וְנֶעֱנָשׁוּ׃
englishText: A prudent man seeth the evil, and hideth himself; But the thoughtless pass on, and are punished.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵקֶב עֲנָוָה יִרְאַת יְהוָה עֹשֶׁר וְכָבוֹד וְחַיִּים׃
englishText: The reward of humility is the fear of the LORD, Even riches, and honour, and life.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צִנִּים פַּחִים בְּדֶרֶךְ עִקֵּשׁ שׁוֹמֵר נַפְשׁוֹ יִרְחַק מֵהֶם׃
englishText: Thorns and snares are in the way of the froward; He that keepeth his soul holdeth himself far from them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֲנֹךְ לַנַּעַר עַל־פִּי דַרְכּוֹ גַּם כִּי־יַזְקִין לֹא־יָסוּר מִמֶּנָּה׃
englishText: Train up a child in the way he should go, And even when he is old, he will not depart from it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָשִׁיר בְּרָשִׁים יִמְשׁוֹל וְעֶבֶד לֹוֶה לְאִישׁ מַלְוֶה׃
englishText: The rich ruleth over the poor, And the borrower is servant to the lender.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זוֹרֵעַ עַוְלָה יקצור־[יִקְצָר־] אָוֶן וְשֵׁבֶט עֶבְרָתוֹ יִכְלֶה׃
englishText: He that soweth iniquity shall reap vanity; And the rod of his wrath shall fail.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב־עַיִן הוּא יְבֹרָךְ כִּי־נָתַן מִלַּחְמוֹ לַדָּל׃
englishText: He that hath a bountiful eye shall be blessed; For he giveth of his bread to the poor.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גָּרֵשׁ לֵץ וְיֵצֵא מָדוֹן וְיִשְׁבֹּת דִּין וְקָלוֹן׃
englishText: Cast out the scorner, and contention will go out; Yea, strife and shame will cease.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֹהֵב טהור־[טְהָר־] לֵב חֵן שְׂפָתָיו רֵעֵהוּ מֶלֶךְ׃
englishText: He that loveth pureness of heart, That hath grace in his lips, the king shall be his friend.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵינֵי יְהוָה נָצְרוּ דָעַת וַיְסַלֵּף דִּבְרֵי בֹגֵד׃
englishText: The eyes of the LORD preserve him that hath knowledge, But He overthroweth the words of the faithless man.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָמַר עָצֵל אֲרִי בַחוּץ בְּתוֹךְ רְחֹבוֹת אֵרָצֵחַ׃
englishText: The sluggard saith: ‘There is a lion without; I shall be slain in the streets.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שׁוּחָה עֲמֻקָּה פִּי זָרוֹת זְעוּם יְהוָה יפול־[יִפָּל־] שָׁם׃
englishText: The mouth of strange women is a deep pit: He that is abhorred of the LORD shall fall therein.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִוֶּלֶת קְשׁוּרָה בְלֶב־נָעַר שֵׁבֶט מוּסָר יַרְחִיקֶנָּה מִמֶּנּוּ׃
englishText: Foolishness is bound up in the heart of a child; But the rod of correction shall drive it far from him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֹשֵׁק דָּל לְהַרְבּוֹת לוֹ נֹתֵן לְעָשִׁיר אַךְ־לְמַחְסוֹר׃
englishText: One may oppress the poor, yet will their gain increase; One may give to the rich, yet will want come.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַט אָזְנְךָ וּשְׁמַע דִּבְרֵי חֲכָמִים וְלִבְּךָ תָּשִׁית לְדַעְתִּי׃
englishText: Incline thine ear, and hear the words of the wise, And apply thy heart unto my knowledge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־נָעִים כִּי־תִשְׁמְרֵם בְּבִטְנֶךָ יִכֹּנוּ יַחְדָּו עַל־שְׂפָתֶיךָ׃
englishText: For it is a pleasant thing if thou keep them within thee; Let them be established altogether upon thy lips.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִהְיוֹת בַּיהוָה מִבְטַחֶךָ הוֹדַעְתִּיךָ הַיּוֹם אַף־אָתָּה׃
englishText: That thy trust may be in the LORD, I have made them known to thee this day, even to thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲלֹא כָתַבְתִּי לְךָ שלשום [שָׁלִישִׁים] בְּמוֹעֵצֹת וָדָעַת׃
englishText: Have not I written unto thee excellent things Of counsels and knowledge;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְהוֹדִיעֲךָ קֹשְׁטְ אִמְרֵי אֱמֶת לְהָשִׁיב אֲמָרִים אֱמֶת לְשֹׁלְחֶיךָ׃
englishText: That I might make thee know the certainty of the words of truth, That thou mightest bring back words of truth to them that send thee?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּגְזָל־דָּל כִּי דַל־הוּא וְאַל־תְּדַכֵּא עָנִי בַשָּׁעַר׃
englishText: Rob not the weak, because he is weak, Neither crush the poor in the gate;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־יְהוָה יָרִיב רִיבָם וְקָבַע אֶת־קֹבְעֵיהֶם נָפֶשׁ׃
englishText: For the LORD will plead their cause, And despoil of life those that despoil them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּתְרַע אֶת־בַּעַל אָף וְאֶת־אִישׁ חֵמוֹת לֹא תָבוֹא׃
englishText: Make no friendship with a man that is given to anger; And with a wrathful man thou shalt not go;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פֶּן־תֶּאֱלַף ארחתו [אֹרְחֹתָיו] וְלָקַחְתָּ מוֹקֵשׁ לְנַפְשֶׁךָ׃
englishText: Lest thou learn his ways, And get a snare to thy soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תְּהִי בְתֹקְעֵי־כָף בַּעֹרְבִים מַשָּׁאוֹת׃
englishText: Be thou not of them that strike hands, Or of them that are sureties for debts;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־אֵין־לְךָ לְשַׁלֵּם לָמָּה יִקַּח מִשְׁכָּבְךָ מִתַּחְתֶּיךָ׃
englishText: If thou hast not wherewith to pay, Why should he take away thy bed from under thee?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תַּסֵּג גְּבוּל עוֹלָם אֲשֶׁר עָשׂוּ אֲבוֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: Remove not the ancient landmark, Which thy fathers have set.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָזִיתָ אִישׁ מָהִיר בִּמְלַאכְתּוֹ לִפְנֵי־מְלָכִים יִתְיַצָּב בַּל־יִתְיַצֵּב לִפְנֵי חֲשֻׁכִּים׃
englishText: Seest thou a man diligent in his business? he shall stand before kings; He shall not stand before mean men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־תֵשֵׁב לִלְחוֹם אֶת־מוֹשֵׁל בִּין תָּבִין אֶת־אֲשֶׁר לְפָנֶיךָ׃
englishText: When thou sittest to eat with a ruler, consider well him that is before thee;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְשַׂמְתָּ שַׂכִּין בְּלֹעֶךָ אִם־בַּעַל נֶפֶשׁ אָתָּה׃
englishText: And put a knife to thy throat, if thou be a man given to appetite.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּתְאָו לְמַטְעַמּוֹתָיו וְהוּא לֶחֶם כְּזָבִים׃
englishText: Be not desirous of his dainties; seeing they are deceitful food.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּיגַע לְהַעֲשִׁיר מִבִּינָתְךָ חֲדָל׃
englishText: Weary not thyself to be rich; Cease from thine own wisdom. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: התעוף [הֲתָעִיף] עֵינֶיךָ בּוֹ וְאֵינֶנּוּ כִּי עָשֹׂה יַעֲשֶׂה־לּוֹ כְנָפַיִם כְּנֶשֶׁר ועיף [יָעוּף] הַשָּׁמָיִם׃
englishText: Wilt thou set thine eyes upon it? it is gone; For riches certainly make themselves wings, Like an eagle that flieth toward heaven.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּלְחַם אֶת־לֶחֶם רַע עָיִן וְאַל־תתאו [תִּתְאָיו] לְמַטְעַמֹּתָיו׃
englishText: Eat thou not the bread of him that hath an evil eye, Neither desire thou his dainties;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי כְּמוֹ־שָׁעַר בְּנַפְשׁוֹ כֶּן־הוּא אֱכֹל וּשְׁתֵה יֹאמַר לָךְ וְלִבּוֹ בַּל־עִמָּךְ׃
englishText: For as one that hath reckoned within himself, so is he: ‘Eat and drink’, saith he to thee; But his heart is not with thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פִּתְּךָ־אָכַלְתָּ תְקִיאֶנָּה וְשִׁחַתָּ דְּבָרֶיךָ הַנְּעִימִים׃
englishText: The morsel which thou hast eaten shalt thou vomit up, And lose thy sweet words.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּאָזְנֵי כְסִיל אַל־תְּדַבֵּר כִּי־יָבוּז לְשֵׂכֶל מִלֶּיךָ׃
englishText: Speak not in the ears of a fool; for he will despise the wisdom of thy words.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תַּסֵּג גְּבוּל עוֹלָם וּבִשְׂדֵי יְתוֹמִים אַל־תָּבֹא׃
englishText: Remove not the ancient landmark; and enter not into the fields of the fatherless;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־גֹאֲלָם חָזָק הוּא־יָרִיב אֶת־רִיבָם אִתָּךְ׃
englishText: For their Redeemer is strong; He will plead their cause with thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָבִיאָה לַמּוּסָר לִבֶּךָ וְאָזְנֶךָ לְאִמְרֵי־דָעַת׃
englishText: Apply thy heart unto instruction, And thine ears to the words of knowledge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּמְנַע מִנַּעַר מוּסָר כִּי־תַכֶּנּוּ בַשֵּׁבֶט לֹא יָמוּת׃
englishText: Withhold not correction from the child; For though thou beat him with the rod, he will not die.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַתָּה בַּשֵּׁבֶט תַּכֶּנּוּ וְנַפְשׁוֹ מִשְּׁאוֹל תַּצִּיל׃
englishText: Thou beatest him with the rod, And wilt deliver his soul from the nether-world.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנִי אִם־חָכַם לִבֶּךָ יִשְׂמַח לִבִּי גַם־אָנִי׃
englishText: My son, if thy heart be wise, My heart will be glad, even mine;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְתַעְלֹזְנָה כִלְיוֹתָי בְּדַבֵּר שְׂפָתֶיךָ מֵישָׁרִים׃
englishText: Yea, my reins will rejoice, When thy lips speak right things.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־יְקַנֵּא לִבְּךָ בַּחַטָּאִים כִּי אִם־בְּיִרְאַת־יְהוָה כָּל־הַיּוֹם׃
englishText: Let not thy heart envy sinners, But be in the fear of the LORD all the day;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אִם־יֵשׁ אַחֲרִית וְתִקְוָתְךָ לֹא תִכָּרֵת׃
englishText: For surely there is a future; And thy hope shall not be cut off.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁמַע־אַתָּה בְנִי וַחֲכָם וְאַשֵּׁר בַּדֶּרֶךְ לִבֶּךָ׃
englishText: Hear thou, my son, and be wise, And guide thy heart in the way.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תְּהִי בְסֹבְאֵי־יָיִן בְּזֹלֲלֵי בָשָׂר לָמוֹ׃
englishText: Be not among winebibbers; Among gluttonous eaters of flesh;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־סֹבֵא וְזוֹלֵל יִוָּרֵשׁ וּקְרָעִים תַּלְבִּישׁ נוּמָה׃
englishText: For the drunkard and the glutton shall come to poverty; And drowsiness shall clothe a man with rags.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁמַע לְאָבִיךָ זֶה יְלָדֶךָ וְאַל־תָּבוּז כִּי־זָקְנָה אִמֶּךָ׃
englishText: Hearken unto thy father that begot thee, And despise not thy mother when she is old.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱמֶת קְנֵה וְאַל־תִּמְכֹּר חָכְמָה וּמוּסָר וּבִינָה׃
englishText: Buy the truth, and sell it not; also wisdom, and instruction, and understanding.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גול [גִּיל] יגול [יָגִיל] אֲבִי צַדִּיק יולד [וְיוֹלֵד] חָכָם וישמח־[יִשְׂמַח־] בּוֹ׃
