englishText: The father of the righteous will greatly rejoice; and he that begetteth a wise child will have joy of him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׂמַח־אָבִיךָ וְאִמֶּךָ וְתָגֵל יוֹלַדְתֶּךָ׃
englishText: Let thy father and thy mother be glad, and let her that bore thee rejoice.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּנָה־בְנִי לִבְּךָ לִי וְעֵינֶיךָ דְּרָכַי תרצנה [תִּצֹּרְנָה׃]
englishText: My son, give me thy heart, and let thine eyes observe my ways. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־שׁוּחָה עֲמֻקָּה זוֹנָה וּבְאֵר צָרָה נָכְרִיָּה׃
englishText: For a harlot is a deep ditch; and an alien woman is a narrow pit.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַף־הִיא כְּחֶתֶף תֶּאֱרֹב וּבוֹגְדִים בְּאָדָם תּוֹסִף׃
englishText: She also lieth in wait as a robber, and increaseth the faithless among men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְמִי אוֹי לְמִי אֲבוֹי לְמִי מדונים [מִדְיָנִים ] לְמִי שִׂיחַ לְמִי פְּצָעִים חִנָּם לְמִי חַכְלִלוּת עֵינָיִם׃
englishText: Who crieth: ‘Woe’? who: ‘Alas’? Who hath contentions? who hath raving? Who hath wounds without cause? Who hath redness of eyes?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְאַחֲרִים עַל־הַיָּיִן לַבָּאִים לַחְקֹר מִמְסָךְ׃
englishText: They that tarry long at the wine; They that go to try mixed wine.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תֵּרֶא יַיִן כִּי יִתְאַדָּם כִּי־יִתֵּן בכיס [בַּכּוֹס] עֵינוֹ יִתְהַלֵּךְ בְּמֵישָׁרִים׃
englishText: Look not thou upon the wine when it is red, when it giveth its colour in the cup, When it glideth down smoothly;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַחֲרִיתוֹ כְּנָחָשׁ יִשָּׁךְ וּכְצִפְעֹנִי יַפְרִשׁ׃
englishText: At the last it biteth like a serpent, and stingeth like a basilisk.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵינֶיךָ יִרְאוּ זָרוֹת וְלִבְּךָ יְדַבֵּר תַּהְפֻּכוֹת׃
englishText: Thine eyes shall behold strange things, and thy heart shall utter confused things.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהָיִיתָ כְּשֹׁכֵב בְּלֶב־יָם וּכְשֹׁכֵב בְּרֹאשׁ חִבֵּל׃
englishText: Yea, thou shalt be as he that lieth down in the midst of the sea, or as he that lieth upon the top of a mast.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִכּוּנִי בַל־חָלִיתִי הֲלָמוּנִי בַּל־יָדָעְתִּי מָתַי אָקִיץ אוֹסִיף אֲבַקְשֶׁנּוּ עוֹד׃
englishText: ’They have struck me, and I felt it not, they have beaten me, and I knew it not; when shall I awake? I will seek it yet again.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תְּקַנֵּא בְּאַנְשֵׁי רָעָה וְאַל־תתאו [תִּתְאָיו] לִהְיוֹת אִתָּם׃
englishText: Be not thou envious of evil men, Neither desire to be with them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־שֹׁד יֶהְגֶּה לִבָּם וְעָמָל שִׂפְתֵיהֶם תְּדַבֵּרְנָה׃
englishText: For their heart studieth destruction, And their lips talk of mischief.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּחָכְמָה יִבָּנֶה בָּיִת וּבִתְבוּנָה יִתְכּוֹנָן׃
englishText: Through wisdom is a house builded; And by understanding it is established;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְדַעַת חֲדָרִים יִמָּלְאוּ כָּל־הוֹן יָקָר וְנָעִים׃
englishText: And by knowledge are the chambers filled With all precious and pleasant riches.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גֶּבֶר־חָכָם בַּעוֹז וְאִישׁ־דַּעַת מְאַמֶּץ־כֹּחַ׃
englishText: A wise man is strong; Yea, a man of knowledge increaseth strength.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי בְתַחְבֻּלוֹת תַּעֲשֶׂה־לְּךָ מִלְחָמָה וּתְשׁוּעָה בְּרֹב יוֹעֵץ׃
englishText: For with wise advice thou shalt make thy war; And in the multitude of counsellors there is safety.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָאמוֹת לֶאֱוִיל חָכְמוֹת בַּשַּׁעַר לֹא יִפְתַּח־פִּיהוּ׃
englishText: Wisdom is as unattainable to a fool as corals; He openeth not his mouth in the gate.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְחַשֵּׁב לְהָרֵעַ לוֹ בַּעַל־מְזִמּוֹת יִקְרָאוּ׃
englishText: He that deviseth to do evil, Men shall call him a mischievous person.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זִמַּת אִוֶּלֶת חַטָּאת וְתוֹעֲבַת לְאָדָם לֵץ׃
englishText: The thought of foolishness is sin; And the scorner is an abomination to men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִתְרַפִּיתָ בְּיוֹם צָרָה צַר כֹּחֶכָה׃
englishText: If thou faint in the day of adversity, Thy strength is small indeed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַצֵּל לְקֻחִים לַמָּוֶת וּמָטִים לַהֶרֶג אִם־תַּחְשׂוֹךְ׃
englishText: Deliver them that are drawn unto death; And those that are ready to be slain wilt thou forbear to rescue?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־תֹאמַר הֵן לֹא־יָדַעְנוּ זֶה הֲ‍לֹא־תֹכֵן לִבּוֹת הוּא־יָבִין וְנֹצֵר נַפְשְׁךָ הוּא יֵדָע וְהֵשִׁיב לְאָדָם כְּפָעֳלוֹ׃
englishText: If thou sayest: ‘Behold, we knew not this’, Doth not He that weigheth the hearts consider it? And He that keepeth thy soul, doth not He know it? And shall not He render to every man according to his works?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱכָל־בְּנִי דְבַשׁ כִּי־טוֹב וְנֹפֶת מָתוֹק עַל־חִכֶּךָ׃
englishText: My son, eat thou honey, for it is good, And the honeycomb is sweet to thy taste;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֵּן דְּעֶה חָכְמָה לְנַפְשֶׁךָ אִם־מָצָאתָ וְיֵשׁ אַחֲרִית וְתִקְוָתְךָ לֹא תִכָּרֵת׃
englishText: So know thou wisdom to be unto thy soul; If thou hast found it, then shall there be a future, And thy hope shall not be cut off.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תֶּאֱרֹב רָשָׁע לִנְוֵה צַדִּיק אַל־תְּשַׁדֵּד רִבְצוֹ׃
englishText: Lie not in wait, O wicked man, against the dwelling of the righteous, Spoil not his resting-place;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי שֶׁבַע יִפּוֹל צַדִּיק וָקָם וּרְשָׁעִים יִכָּשְׁלוּ בְרָעָה׃
englishText: For a righteous man falleth seven times, and riseth up again, But the wicked stumble under adversity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּנְפֹל אויביך [אוֹיִבְךָ] אַל־תִּשְׂמָח וּבִכָּשְׁלוֹ אַל־יָגֵל לִבֶּךָ׃
englishText: Rejoice not when thine enemy falleth, And let not thy heart be glad when he stumbleth;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פֶּן־יִרְאֶה יְהוָה וְרַע בְּעֵינָיו וְהֵשִׁיב מֵעָלָיו אַפּוֹ׃
englishText: Lest the LORD see it, and it displease Him, And He turn away His wrath from him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּתְחַר בַּמְּרֵעִים אַל־תְּקַנֵּא בָּרְשָׁעִים׃
englishText: Fret not thyself because of evildoers, Neither be thou envious at the wicked;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא־תִהְיֶה אַחֲרִית לָרָע נֵר רְשָׁעִים יִדְעָךְ׃
englishText: For there will be no future to the evil man, The lamp of the wicked shall be put out.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְרָא־אֶת־יְהוָה בְּנִי וָמֶלֶךְ עִם־שׁוֹנִים אַל־תִּתְעָרָב׃
englishText: My son, fear thou the LORD and the king, And meddle not with them that are given to change;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־פִתְאֹם יָקוּם אֵידָם וּפִיד שְׁנֵיהֶם מִי יוֹדֵעַ׃
englishText: For their calamity shall rise suddenly; And who knoweth the ruin from them both?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־אֵלֶּה לַחֲכָמִים הַכֵּר־פָּנִים בְּמִשְׁפָּט בַּל־טוֹב׃
englishText: These also are sayings of the wise. To have respect of persons in judgment is not good.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֹמֵר לְרָשָׁע צַדִּיק אָתָּה יִקְּבֻהוּ עַמִּים יִזְעָמוּהוּ לְאֻמִּים׃
englishText: He that saith unto the wicked: ‘Thou art righteous’, Peoples shall curse him, nations shall execrate him;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלַמּוֹכִיחִים יִנְעָם וַעֲלֵיהֶם תָּבוֹא בִרְכַּת־טוֹב׃
englishText: But to them that decide justly shall be delight, And a good blessing shall come upon them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׂפָתַיִם יִשָּׁק מֵשִׁיב דְּבָרִים נְכֹחִים׃
englishText: He kisseth the lips That giveth a right answer.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָכֵן בַּחוּץ מְלַאכְתֶּךָ וְעַתְּדָהּ בַּשָּׂדֶה לָךְ אַחַר וּבָנִיתָ בֵיתֶךָ׃
englishText: Prepare thy work without, And make it fit for thyself in the field; And afterwards build thy house.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תְּהִי עֵד־חִנָּם בְּרֵעֶךָ וַהֲפִתִּיתָ בִּשְׂפָתֶיךָ׃
englishText: Be not a witness against thy neighbour without cause; And deceive not with thy lips.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תֹּאמַר כַּאֲשֶׁר עָשָׂה־לִי כֵּן אֶעֱשֶׂה־לּוֹ אָשִׁיב לָאִישׁ כְּפָעֳלוֹ׃
englishText: Say not: ‘I will do so to him as he hath done to me; I will render to the man according to his work.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־שְׂדֵה אִישׁ־עָצֵל עָבַרְתִּי וְעַל־כֶּרֶם אָדָם חֲסַר־לֵב׃
englishText: I went by the field of the slothful, And by the vineyard of the man void of understanding;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהִנֵּה עָלָה כֻלּוֹ קִמְּשֹׂנִים כָּסּוּ פָנָיו חֲרֻלִּים וְגֶדֶר אֲבָנָיו נֶהֱרָסָה׃
englishText: And, lo, it was all grown over with thistles, The face thereof was covered with nettles, And the stone wall thereof was broken down.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וָאֶחֱזֶה אָנֹכִי אָשִׁית לִבִּי רָאִיתִי לָקַחְתִּי מוּסָר׃
englishText: Then I beheld, and considered well; I saw, and received instruction.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְעַט שֵׁנוֹת מְעַט תְּנוּמוֹת מְעַט חִבֻּק יָדַיִם לִשְׁכָּב׃
englishText: ’Yet a little sleep, a little slumber, A little folding of the hands to sleep’—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבָא־מִתְהַלֵּךְ רֵישֶׁךָ וּמַחְסֹרֶיךָ כְּאִישׁ מָגֵן׃
englishText: So shall thy poverty come as a runner, And thy want as an armed man.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־אֵלֶּה מִשְׁלֵי שְׁלֹמֹה אֲשֶׁר הֶעְתִּיקוּ אַנְשֵׁי חִזְקִיָּה מֶלֶךְ־יְהוּדָה׃
englishText: These also are proverbs of Solomon, which the men of Hezekiah king of Judah copied out.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּבֹד אֱלֹהִים הַסְתֵּר דָּבָר וּכְבֹד מְלָכִים חֲקֹר דָּבָר׃
englishText: It is the glory of God to conceal a thing; but the glory of kings is to search out a matter.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁמַיִם לָרוּם וָאָרֶץ לָעֹמֶק וְלֵב מְלָכִים אֵין חֵקֶר׃
englishText: The heaven for height, and the earth for depth, and the heart of kings is unsearchable.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָגוֹ סִיגִים מִכָּסֶף וַיֵּצֵא לַצֹּרֵף כֶּלִי׃
englishText: Take away the dross from the silver, and there cometh forth a vessel for the refiner;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָגוֹ רָשָׁע לִפְנֵי־מֶלֶךְ וְיִכּוֹן בַּצֶּדֶק כִּסְאוֹ׃
englishText: Take away the wicked from before the king, and his throne shall be established in righteousness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּתְהַדַּר לִפְנֵי־מֶלֶךְ וּבִמְקוֹם גְּדֹלִים אַל־תַּעֲמֹד׃
englishText: Glorify not thyself in the presence of the king, and stand not in the place of great men;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי טוֹב אֲמָר־לְךָ עֲ‍לֵה הֵנָּה מֵהַשְׁפִּילְךָ לִפְנֵי נָדִיב אֲשֶׁר רָאוּ עֵינֶיךָ׃
englishText: For better is it that it be said unto thee: ‘Come up hither’, than that thou shouldest be put lower in the presence of the prince, whom thine eyes have seen.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תֵּצֵא לָרִב מַהֵר פֶּן מַה־תַּעֲשֶׂה בְּאַחֲרִיתָהּ בְּהַכְלִים אֹתְךָ רֵעֶךָ׃
englishText: Go not forth hastily to strive, lest thou know not what to do in the end thereof, when thy neighbour hath put thee to shame.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רִיבְךָ רִיב אֶת־רֵעֶךָ וְסוֹד אַחֵר אַל־תְּגָל׃
englishText: Debate thy cause with thy neighbour, but reveal not the secret of another;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פֶּן־יְחַסֶּדְךָ שֹׁמֵעַ וְדִבָּתְךָ לֹא תָשׁוּב׃
englishText: Lest he that heareth it revile thee, and thine infamy turn not away.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּפּוּחֵי זָהָב בְּמַשְׂכִּיּוֹת כָּסֶף דָּבָר דָּבֻר עַל־אָפְנָיו׃
englishText: A word fitly spoken Is like apples of gold in settings of silver.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֶזֶם זָהָב וַחֲלִי־כָתֶם מוֹכִיחַ חָכָם עַל־אֹזֶן שֹׁמָעַת׃
englishText: As an ear-ring of gold, and an ornament of fine gold, So is a wise reprover upon an obedient ear.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּצִנַּת־שֶׁלֶג בְּיוֹם קָצִיר צִיר נֶאֱמָן לְשֹׁלְחָיו וְנֶפֶשׁ אֲדֹנָיו יָשִׁיב׃
englishText: As the cold of snow in the time of harvest, So is a faithful messenger to him that sendeth him; For he refresheth the soul of his master. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נְשִׂיאִים וְרוּחַ וְגֶשֶׁם אָיִן אִישׁ מִתְהַלֵּל בְּמַתַּת־שָׁקֶר׃
englishText: As vapours and wind without rain, So is he that boasteth himself of a false gift.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּאֹרֶךְ אַפַּיִם יְפֻתֶּה קָצִין וְלָשׁוֹן רַכָּה תִּשְׁבָּר־גָּרֶם׃
englishText: By long forbearing is a ruler persuaded, And a soft tongue breaketh the bone.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דְּבַשׁ מָצָאתָ אֱכֹל דַּיֶּךָּ פֶּן־תִּשְׂבָּעֶנּוּ וַהֲקֵאתוֹ׃
englishText: Hast thou found honey? eat so much as is sufficient for thee, Lest thou be filled therewith, and vomit it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֹקַר רַגְלְךָ מִבֵּית רֵעֶךָ פֶּן־יִשְׂבָּעֲךָ וּשְׂנֵאֶךָ׃
englishText: Let thy foot be seldom in thy neighbour’s house; Lest he be sated with thee, and hate thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֵפִיץ וְחֶרֶב וְחֵץ שָׁנוּן אִישׁ עֹנֶה בְרֵעֵהוּ עֵד שָׁקֶר׃
englishText: As a maul, and a sword, and a sharp arrow, So is a man that beareth false witness against his neighbour.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֵׁן רֹעָה וְרֶגֶל מוּעָדֶת מִבְטָח בּוֹגֵד בְּיוֹם צָרָה׃
englishText: Confidence in an unfaithful man in time of trouble Is like a broken tooth, and a foot out of joint.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַעֲדֶה בֶּגֶד בְּיוֹם קָרָה חֹמֶץ עַל־נָתֶר וְשָׁר בַּשִּׁרִים עַל לֶב־רָע׃
englishText: As one that taketh off a garment in cold weather, and as vinegar upon nitre, So is he that singeth songs to a heavy heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־רָעֵב שֹׂנַאֲךָ הַאֲכִלֵהוּ לָחֶם וְאִם־צָמֵא הַשְׁקֵהוּ מָיִם׃
englishText: If thine enemy be hungry, give him bread to eat, And if he be thirsty, give him water to drink;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי גֶחָלִים אַתָּה חֹתֶה עַל־רֹאשׁוֹ וַיהוָה יְשַׁלֶּם־לָךְ׃
englishText: For thou wilt heap coals of fire upon his head, And the LORD will reward thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רוּחַ צָפוֹן תְּחוֹלֵל גָּשֶׁם וּפָנִים נִזְעָמִים לְשׁוֹן סָתֶר׃
englishText: The north wind bringeth forth rain, And a backbiting tongue an angry countenance.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב שֶׁבֶת עַל־פִּנַּת־גָּג מֵאֵשֶׁת מדונים [מִדְיָנִים] וּבֵית חָבֶר׃
englishText: It is better to dwell in a corner of the housetop, Than in a house in common with a contentious woman.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַיִם קָרִים עַל־נֶפֶשׁ עֲיֵפָה וּשְׁמוּעָה טוֹבָה מֵאֶרֶץ מֶרְחָק׃
englishText: As cold waters to a faint soul, So is good news from a far country.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַעְיָן נִרְפָּשׂ וּמָקוֹר מָשְׁחָת צַדִּיק מָט לִפְנֵי־רָשָׁע׃
englishText: As a troubled fountain, and a corrupted spring, So is a righteous man that giveth way before the wicked.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָכֹל דְּבַשׁ הַרְבּוֹת לֹא־טוֹב וְחֵקֶר כְּבֹדָם כָּבוֹד׃
englishText: It is not good to eat much honey; So for men to search out their own glory is not glory.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עִיר פְּרוּצָה אֵין חוֹמָה אִישׁ אֲשֶׁר אֵין מַעְצָר לְרוּחוֹ׃
englishText: Like a city broken down and without a wall, So is he whose spirit is without restraint.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּשֶּׁלֶג בַּקַּיִץ וְכַמָּטָר בַּקָּצִיר כֵּן לֹא־נָאוֶה לִכְסִיל כָּבוֹד׃
englishText: As snow in summer, and as rain in harvest, So honour is not seemly for a fool.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּצִּפּוֹר לָנוּד כַּדְּרוֹר לָעוּף כֵּן קִלְלַת חִנָּם לא [לוֹ] תָבֹא׃
englishText: As the wandering sparrow, as the flying swallow, So the curse that is causeless shall come home. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שׁוֹט לַסּוּס מֶתֶג לַחֲמוֹר וְשֵׁבֶט לְגֵו כְּסִילִים׃
englishText: A whip for the horse, a bridle for the ass, And a rod for the back of fools.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תַּעַן כְּסִיל כְּאִוַּלְתּוֹ פֶּן־תִּשְׁוֶה־לּוֹ גַם־אָתָּה׃
englishText: Answer not a fool according to his folly, Lest thou also be like unto him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֲנֵה כְסִיל כְּאִוַּלְתּוֹ פֶּן־יִהְיֶה חָכָם בְּעֵינָיו׃
englishText: Answer a fool according to his folly, Lest he be wise in his own eyes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְקַצֶּה רַגְלַיִם חָמָס שֹׁתֶה שֹׁלֵחַ דְּבָרִים בְּיַד־כְּסִיל׃
englishText: He that sendeth a message by the hand of a fool Cutteth off his own feet, and drinketh damage.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דַּלְיוּ שֹׁקַיִם מִפִּסֵּחַ וּמָשָׁל בְּפִי כְסִילִים׃
englishText: The legs hang limp from the lame; So is a parable in the mouth of fools.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּצְרוֹר אֶבֶן בְּמַרְגֵּמָה כֵּן־נוֹתֵן לִכְסִיל כָּבוֹד׃
englishText: As a small stone in a heap of stones, So is he that giveth honour to a fool.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חוֹחַ עָלָה בְיַד־שִׁכּוֹר וּמָשָׁל בְּפִי כְסִילִים׃
englishText: As a thorn that cometh into the hand of a drunkard, So is a parable in the mouth of fools.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַב מְחוֹלֵל־כֹּל וְשֹׂכֵר כְּסִיל וְשֹׂכֵר עֹבְרִים׃
englishText: A master performeth all things; But he that stoppeth a fool is as one that stoppeth a flood.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּכֶלֶב שָׁב עַל־קֵאוֹ כְּסִיל שׁוֹנֶה בְאִוַּלְתּוֹ׃
englishText: As a dog that returneth to his vomit, So is a fool that repeateth his folly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָאִיתָ אִישׁ חָכָם בְּעֵינָיו תִּקְוָה לִכְסִיל מִמֶּנּוּ׃
englishText: Seest thou a man wise in his own eyes? There is more hope of a fool than of him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָמַר עָצֵל שַׁחַל בַּדָּרֶךְ אֲרִי בֵּין הָרְחֹבוֹת׃
englishText: The sluggard saith: ‘There is a lion in the way; Yea, a lion is in the streets.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַדֶּלֶת תִּסּוֹב עַל־צִירָהּ וְעָצֵל עַל־מִטָּתוֹ׃
englishText: The door is turning upon its hinges, And the sluggard is still upon his bed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טָמַן עָצֵל יָדוֹ בַּצַּלָּחַת נִלְאָה לַהֲשִׁיבָהּ אֶל־פִּיו׃
englishText: The sluggard burieth his hand in the dish; It wearieth him to bring it back to his mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָכָם עָצֵל בְּעֵינָיו מִשִּׁבְעָה מְשִׁיבֵי טָעַם׃
englishText: The sluggard is wiser in his own eyes Than seven men that give wise answer.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַחֲזִיק בְּאָזְנֵי־כָלֶב עֹבֵר מִתְעַבֵּר עַל־רִיב לֹּא־לוֹ׃
englishText: He that passeth by, and meddleth with strife not his own, Is like one that taketh a dog by the ears.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּמִתְלַהְלֵהַּ הַיֹּרֶה זִקִּים חִצִּים וָמָוֶת׃
englishText: As a madman who casteth firebrands, Arrows, and death;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֵּן־אִישׁ רִמָּה אֶת־רֵעֵהוּ וְאָמַר הֲ‍לֹא־מְשַׂחֵק אָנִי׃
englishText: So is the man that deceiveth his neighbour, And saith: ‘Am not I in sport?’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּאֶפֶס עֵצִים תִּכְבֶּה־אֵשׁ וּבְאֵין נִרְגָּן יִשְׁתֹּק מָדוֹן׃
englishText: Where no wood is, the fire goeth out; And where there is no whisperer, contention ceaseth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פֶּחָם לְגֶחָלִים וְעֵצִים לְאֵשׁ וְאִישׁ מדונים [מִדְיָנִים] לְחַרְחַר־רִיב׃
englishText: As coals are to burning coals, and wood to fire; So is a contentious man to kindle strife.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דִּבְרֵי נִרְגָּן כְּמִתְלַהֲמִים וְהֵם יָרְדוּ חַדְרֵי־בָטֶן׃
englishText: The words of a whisperer are as dainty morsels, And they go down into the innermost parts of the body.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֶּסֶף סִיגִים מְצֻפֶּה עַל־חָרֶשׂ שְׂפָתַיִם דֹּלְקִים וְלֶב־רָע׃
englishText: Burning lips and a wicked heart Are like an earthen vessel overlaid with silver dross.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בשפתו [בִּשְׂפָתָיו] יִנָּכֵר שׂוֹנֵא וּבְקִרְבּוֹ יָשִׁית מִרְמָה׃
englishText: He that hateth dissembleth with his lips, But he layeth up deceit within him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־יְחַנֵּן קוֹלוֹ אַל־תַּאֲמֶן־בּוֹ כִּי שֶׁבַע תּוֹעֵבוֹת בְּלִבּוֹ׃
englishText: When he speaketh fair, Believe him not; For there are seven abominations in his heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּכַּסֶּה שִׂנְאָה בְּמַשָּׁאוֹן תִּגָּלֶה רָעָתוֹ בְקָהָל׃
englishText: Though his hatred be concealed with deceit, His wickedness shall be revealed before the congregation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֹּרֶה־שַּׁחַת בָּהּ יִפֹּל וְגֹלֵל אֶבֶן אֵלָיו תָּשׁוּב׃
englishText: Whoso diggeth a pit shall fall therein; And he that rolleth a stone, it shall return upon him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְשׁוֹן־שֶׁקֶר יִשְׂנָא דַכָּיו וּפֶה חָלָק יַעֲשֶׂה מִדְחֶה׃
englishText: A lying tongue hateth those that are crushed by it; And a flattering mouth worketh ruin.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּתְהַלֵּל בְּיוֹם מָחָר כִּי לֹא־תֵדַע מַה־יֵּלֶד יוֹם׃
englishText: Boast not thyself of to- morrow; For thou knowest not what a day may bring forth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהַלֶּלְךָ זָר וְלֹא־פִיךָ נָכְרִי וְאַל־שְׂפָתֶיךָ׃
englishText: Let another man praise thee, and not thine own mouth; A stranger, and not thine own lips.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֹּבֶד־אֶבֶן וְנֵטֶל הַחוֹל וְכַעַס אֱוִיל כָּבֵד מִשְּׁנֵיהֶם׃
englishText: A stone is heavy, and the sand weighty; But a fool’s vexation is heavier than they both.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַכְזְרִיּוּת חֵמָה וְשֶׁטֶף אָף וּמִי יַעֲמֹד לִפְנֵי קִנְאָה׃
englishText: Wrath is cruel, and anger is overwhelming; But who is able to stand before jealousy?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹבָה תּוֹכַחַת מְגֻלָּה מֵאַהֲבָה מְסֻתָּרֶת׃
englishText: Better is open rebuke Than love that is hidden.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֶאֱמָנִים פִּצְעֵי אוֹהֵב וְנַעְתָּרוֹת נְשִׁיקוֹת שׂוֹנֵא׃
englishText: Faithful are the wounds of a friend; But the kisses of an enemy are importunate.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֶפֶשׁ שְׂבֵעָה תָּבוּס נֹפֶת וְנֶפֶשׁ רְעֵבָה כָּל־מַר מָתוֹק׃
englishText: The full soul loatheth a honeycomb; But to the hungry soul every bitter thing is sweet.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּצִפּוֹר נוֹדֶדֶת מִן־קִנָּהּ כֵּן־אִישׁ נוֹדֵד מִמְּקוֹמוֹ׃
englishText: As a bird that wandereth from her nest, So is a man that wandereth from his place.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֶׁמֶן וּקְטֹרֶת יְשַׂמַּח־לֵב וּמֶתֶק רֵעֵהוּ מֵעֲצַת־נָפֶשׁ׃
englishText: Ointment and perfume rejoice the heart; So doth the sweetness of a man’s friend by hearty counsel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רֵעֲךָ ורעה [וְרֵעַ] אָבִיךָ אַל־תַּעֲזֹב וּבֵית אָחִיךָ אַל־תָּבוֹא בְּיוֹם אֵידֶךָ טוֹב שָׁכֵן קָרוֹב מֵאָח רָחוֹק׃
englishText: Thine own friend, and thy father’s friend, forsake not; Neither go into thy brother’s house in the day of thy calamity; Better is a neighbour that is near than a brother far off.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֲכַם בְּנִי וְשַׂמַּח לִבִּי וְאָשִׁיבָה חֹרְפִי דָבָר׃
englishText: My son, be wise, and make my heart glad, That I may answer him that taunteth me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָרוּם רָאָה רָעָה נִסְתָּר פְּתָאיִם עָבְרוּ נֶעֱנָשׁוּ׃
englishText: A prudent man seeth the evil, and hideth himself; But the thoughtless pass on, and are punished.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קַח־בִּגְדוֹ כִּי־עָרַב זָר וּבְעַד נָכְרִיָּה חַבְלֵהוּ׃
englishText: Take his garment that is surety for a stranger; And hold him in pledge that is surety for an alien woman.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְבָרֵךְ רֵעֵהוּ בְּקוֹל גָּדוֹל בַּבֹּקֶר הַשְׁכֵּים קְלָלָה תֵּחָשֶׁב לוֹ׃
englishText: He that blesseth his friend with a loud voice, rising early in the morning, It shall be counted a curse to him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דֶּלֶף טוֹרֵד בְּיוֹם סַגְרִיר וְאֵשֶׁת מדונים [מִדְיָנִים] נִשְׁתָּוָה׃
englishText: A continual dropping in a very rainy day And a contentious woman are alike;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צֹפְנֶיהָ צָפַן־רוּחַ וְשֶׁמֶן יְמִינוֹ יִקְרָא׃
englishText: He that would hide her hideth the wind, And the ointment of his right hand betrayeth itself.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּרְזֶל בְּבַרְזֶל יָחַד וְאִישׁ יַחַד פְּנֵי־רֵעֵהוּ׃
englishText: Iron sharpeneth iron; So a man sharpeneth the countenance of his friend.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֹצֵר תְּאֵנָה יֹאכַל פִּרְיָהּ וְשֹׁמֵר אֲדֹנָיו יְכֻבָּד׃
englishText: Whoso keepeth the fig-tree shall eat the fruit thereof; And he that waiteth on his master shall be honoured.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּמַּיִם הַפָּנִים לַפָּנִים כֵּן לֵב־הָאָדָם לָאָדָם׃
englishText: As in water face answereth to face, So the heart of man to man.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁאוֹל ואבדה [וַאֲבַדּוֹ] לֹא תִשְׂבַּעְנָה וְעֵינֵי הָאָדָם לֹא תִשְׂבַּעְנָה׃
englishText: The nether-world and Destruction are never satiated; So the eyes of man are never satiated.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַצְרֵף לַכֶּסֶף וְכוּר לַזָּהָב וְאִישׁ לְפִי מַהֲלָלוֹ׃
englishText: The refining pot is for silver, and the furnace for gold, And a man is tried by his praise.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם תִּכְתּוֹשׁ־אֶת־הָאֱוִיל בַּמַּכְתֵּשׁ בְּתוֹךְ הָרִיפוֹת בַּעֱלִי לֹא־תָסוּר מֵעָלָיו אִוַּלְתּוֹ׃
englishText: Though thou shouldest bray a fool in a mortar with a pestle among groats, Yet will not his foolishness depart from him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָדֹעַ תֵּדַע פְּנֵי צֹאנֶךָ שִׁית לִבְּךָ לַעֲדָרִים׃
englishText: Be thou diligent to know the state of thy flocks, And look well to thy herds;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא לְעוֹלָם חֹסֶן וְאִם־נֵזֶר לְדוֹר דור [וָדוֹר׃]
englishText: For riches are not for ever; And doth the crown endure unto all generations?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גָּלָה חָצִיר וְנִרְאָה־דֶשֶׁא וְנֶאֶסְפוּ עִשְּׂבוֹת הָרִים׃
englishText: When the hay is mown, and the tender grass showeth itself, And the herbs of the mountains are gathered in;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּבָשִׂים לִלְבוּשֶׁךָ וּמְחִיר שָׂדֶה עַתּוּדִים׃
englishText: The lambs will be for thy clothing, And the goats the price for a field. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְדֵי חֲלֵב עִזִּים לְלַחְמְךָ לְלֶחֶם בֵּיתֶךָ וְחַיִּים לְנַעֲרוֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: And there will be goats’milk enough for thy food, for the food of thy household; And maintenance for thy maidens.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָסוּ וְאֵין־רֹדֵף רָשָׁע וְצַדִּיקִים כִּכְפִיר יִבְטָח׃
englishText: The wicked flee when no man pursueth; But the righteous are secure as a young lion.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּפֶשַׁע אֶרֶץ רַבִּים שָׂרֶיהָ וּבְאָדָם מֵבִין יֹדֵעַ כֵּן יַאֲרִיךְ׃
englishText: For the transgression of a land many are the princes thereof; But by a man of understanding and knowledge established order shall long continue.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גֶּבֶר רָשׁ וְעֹשֵׁק דַּלִּים מָטָר סֹחֵף וְאֵין לָחֶם׃
englishText: A poor man that oppresseth the weak Is like a sweeping rain which leaveth no food.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֹזְבֵי תוֹרָה יְהַלְלוּ רָשָׁע וְשֹׁמְרֵי תוֹרָה יִתְגָּרוּ בָם׃
englishText: They that forsake the law praise the wicked; But such as keep the law contend with them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַנְשֵׁי־רָע לֹא־יָבִינוּ מִשְׁפָּט וּמְבַקְשֵׁי יְהוָה יָבִינוּ כֹל׃
englishText: Evil men understand not justice; But they that seek the LORD understand all things.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב־רָשׁ הוֹלֵךְ בְּתֻמּוֹ מֵעִקֵּשׁ דְּרָכַיִם וְהוּא עָשִׁיר׃
englishText: Better is the poor that walketh in his integrity, Than he that is perverse in his ways, though he be rich.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נוֹצֵר תּוֹרָה בֵּן מֵבִין וְרֹעֶה זוֹלְלִים יַכְלִים אָבִיו׃
englishText: A wise son observeth the teaching; But he that is a companion of gluttonous men shameth his father.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַרְבֶּה הוֹנוֹ בְּנֶשֶׁךְ ובתרבית [וְתַרְבִּית] לְחוֹנֵן דַּלִּים יִקְבְּצֶנּוּ׃
englishText: He that augmenteth his substance by interest and increase, Gathereth it for him that is gracious to the poor.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֵסִיר אָזְנוֹ מִשְּׁמֹעַ תּוֹרָה גַּם־תְּפִלָּתוֹ תּוֹעֵבָה׃
englishText: He that turneth away his ear from hearing the law, Even his prayer is an abomination.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַשְׁגֶּה יְשָׁרִים בְּדֶרֶךְ רָע בִּשְׁחוּתוֹ הוּא־יִפּוֹל וּתְמִימִים יִנְחֲלוּ־טוֹב׃
englishText: Whoso causeth the upright to go astray in an evil way, He shall fall himself into his own pit; But the whole-hearted shall inherit good.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָכָם בְּעֵינָיו אִישׁ עָשִׁיר וְדַל מֵבִין יַחְקְרֶנּוּ׃
englishText: The rich man is wise in his own eyes; But the poor that hath understanding searcheth him through.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּעֲלֹץ צַדִּיקִים רַבָּה תִפְאָרֶת וּבְקוּם רְשָׁעִים יְחֻפַּשׂ אָדָם׃
englishText: When the righteous exult, there is great glory; But when the wicked rise, men must be sought for.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְכַסֶּה פְשָׁעָיו לֹא יַצְלִיחַ וּמוֹדֶה וְעֹזֵב יְרֻחָם׃
englishText: He that covereth his transgressions shall not prosper; But whoso confesseth and forsaketh them shall obtain mercy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׁרֵי אָדָם מְפַחֵד תָּמִיד וּמַקְשֶׁה לִבּוֹ יִפּוֹל בְּרָעָה׃
englishText: Happy is the man that feareth alway; But he that hardeneth his heart shall fall into evil.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲרִי־נֹהֵם וְדֹב שׁוֹקֵק מֹשֵׁל רָשָׁע עַל עַם־דָּל׃
englishText: As a roaring lion, and a ravenous bear; So is a wicked ruler over a poor people.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָגִיד חֲסַר תְּבוּנוֹת וְרַב מַעֲשַׁקּוֹת שנאי [שֹׂנֵא] בֶצַע יַאֲרִיךְ יָמִים׃
englishText: The prince that lacketh understanding is also a great oppressor; But he that hateth covetousness shall prolong his days.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָדָם עָשֻׁק בְּדַם־נָפֶשׁ עַד־בּוֹר יָנוּס אַל־יִתְמְכוּ־בוֹ׃
englishText: A man that is laden with the blood of any person Shall hasten his steps unto the pit; none will support him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹלֵךְ תָּמִים יִוָּשֵׁעַ וְנֶעְקַשׁ דְּרָכַיִם יִפּוֹל בְּאֶחָת׃
englishText: Whoso walketh uprightly shall be saved; But he that is perverse in his ways shall fall at once.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֹבֵד אַדְמָתוֹ יִשְׂבַּע־לָחֶם וּמְרַדֵּף רֵקִים יִשְׂבַּע־רִישׁ׃
englishText: He that tilleth his ground shall have plenty of bread; But he that followeth after vain things shall have poverty enough.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִישׁ אֱמוּנוֹת רַב־בְּרָכוֹת וְאָץ לְהַעֲשִׁיר לֹא יִנָּקֶה׃
englishText: A faithful man shall abound with blessings; But he that maketh haste to be rich shall not be unpunished.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַכֵּר־פָּנִים לֹא־טוֹב וְעַל־פַּת־לֶחֶם יִפְשַׁע־גָּבֶר׃
englishText: To have respect of persons is not good; For a man will transgress for a piece of bread.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נִבֳהָל לַהוֹן אִישׁ רַע עָיִן וְלֹא־יֵדַע כִּי־חֶסֶר יְבֹאֶנּוּ׃
englishText: He that hath an evil eye hasteneth after riches, And knoweth not that want shall come upon him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מוֹכִיחַ אָדָם אַחֲרַי חֵן יִמְצָא מִמַּחֲלִיק לָשׁוֹן׃
englishText: He that rebuketh a man shall in the end find more favour Than he that flattereth with the tongue.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גּוֹזֵל אָבִיו וְאִמּוֹ וְאֹמֵר אֵין־פָּשַׁע חָבֵר הוּא לְאִישׁ מַשְׁחִית׃
englishText: Whoso robbeth his father or his mother, and saith: ‘It is no transgression’, The same is the companion of a destroyer.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רְחַב־נֶפֶשׁ יְגָרֶה מָדוֹן וּבוֹטֵחַ עַל־יְהוָה יְדֻשָּׁן׃
englishText: He that is of a greedy spirit stirreth up strife; But he that putteth his trust in the LORD shall be abundantly gratified.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בּוֹטֵחַ בְּלִבּוֹ הוּא כְסִיל וְהוֹלֵךְ בְּחָכְמָה הוּא יִמָּלֵט׃
englishText: He that trusteth in his own heart is a fool; But whoso walketh wisely, he shall escape.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נוֹתֵן לָרָשׁ אֵין מַחְסוֹר וּמַעְלִים עֵינָיו רַב־מְאֵרוֹת׃
englishText: He that giveth unto the poor shall not lack; But he that hideth his eyes shall have many a curse.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּקוּם רְשָׁעִים יִסָּתֵר אָדָם וּבְאָבְדָם יִרְבּוּ צַדִּיקִים׃
englishText: When the wicked rise, men hide themselves; But when they perish, the righteous increase.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִישׁ תּוֹכָחוֹת מַקְשֶׁה־עֹרֶף פֶּתַע יִשָּׁבֵר וְאֵין מַרְפֵּא׃
englishText: He that being often reproved hardeneth his neck Shall suddenly be broken, and that without remedy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּרְבוֹת צַדִּיקִים יִשְׂמַח הָעָם וּבִמְשֹׁל רָשָׁע יֵאָנַח עָם׃
englishText: When the righteous are increased, the people rejoice; but when the wicked beareth rule, the people sigh.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִישׁ־אֹהֵב חָכְמָה יְשַׂמַּח אָבִיו וְרֹעֶה זוֹנוֹת יְאַבֶּד־הוֹן׃
englishText: Whoso loveth wisdom rejoiceth his father; but he that keepeth company with harlots wasteth his substance.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֶלֶךְ בְּמִשְׁפָּט יַעֲמִיד אָרֶץ וְאִישׁ תְּרוּמוֹת יֶהֶרְסֶנָּה׃
englishText: The king by justice establisheth the land; but he that exacteth gifts overthroweth it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גֶּבֶר מַחֲלִיק עַל־רֵעֵהוּ רֶשֶׁת פּוֹרֵשׂ עַל־פְּעָמָיו׃
englishText: A man that flattereth his neighbour spreadeth a net for his steps.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּפֶשַׁע אִישׁ רָע מוֹקֵשׁ וְצַדִּיק יָרוּן וְשָׂמֵחַ׃
englishText: In the transgression of an evil man there is a snare; but the righteous doth sing and rejoice.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֹדֵעַ צַדִּיק דִּין דַּלִּים רָשָׁע לֹא־יָבִין דָּעַת׃
englishText: The righteous taketh knowledge of the cause of the poor; the wicked understandeth not knowledge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַנְשֵׁי לָצוֹן יָפִיחוּ קִרְיָה וַחֲכָמִים יָשִׁיבוּ אָף׃
englishText: Scornful men set a city in a blaze; But wise men turn away wrath.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִישׁ־חָכָם נִשְׁפָּט אֶת־אִישׁ אֱוִיל וְרָגַז וְשָׂחַק וְאֵין נָחַת׃
englishText: If a wise man contendeth with a foolish man, Whether he be angry or laugh, there will be no rest.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַנְשֵׁי דָמִים יִשְׂנְאוּ־תָם וִישָׁרִים יְבַקְשׁוּ נַפְשׁוֹ׃
englishText: The men of blood hate him that is sincere; And as for the upright, they seek his life.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־רוּחוֹ יוֹצִיא כְסִיל וְחָכָם בְּאָחוֹר יְשַׁבְּחֶנָּה׃
englishText: A fool spendeth all his spirit; But a wise man stilleth it within him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֹשֵׁל מַקְשִׁיב עַל־דְּבַר־שָׁקֶר כָּל־מְשָׁרְתָיו רְשָׁעִים׃
englishText: If a ruler hearkeneth to falsehood, All his servants are wicked.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָשׁ וְאִישׁ תְּכָכִים נִפְגָּשׁוּ מֵאִיר־עֵינֵי שְׁנֵיהֶם יְהוָה׃
englishText: The poor man and the oppressor meet together; The LORD giveth light to the eyes of them both.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֶלֶךְ שׁוֹפֵט בֶּאֱמֶת דַּלִּים כִּסְאוֹ לָעַד יִכּוֹן׃
englishText: The king that faithfully judgeth the poor, His throne shall be established for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֵׁבֶט וְתוֹכַחַת יִתֵּן חָכְמָה וְנַעַר מְשֻׁלָּח מֵבִישׁ אִמּוֹ׃
englishText: The rod and reproof give wisdom; But a child left to himself causeth shame to his mother.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּרְבוֹת רְשָׁעִים יִרְבֶּה־פָּשַׁע וְצַדִּיקִים בְּמַפַּלְתָּם יִרְאוּ׃
englishText: When the wicked are increased, transgression increaseth; But the righteous shall gaze upon their fall.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַסֵּר בִּנְךָ וִינִיחֶךָ וְיִתֵּן מַעֲדַנִּים לְנַפְשֶׁךָ׃
englishText: Correct thy son, and he will give thee rest; Yea, he will give delight unto thy soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּאֵין חָזוֹן יִפָּרַע עָם וְשֹׁמֵר תּוֹרָה אַשְׁרֵהוּ׃
englishText: Where there is no vision, the people cast off restraint; But he that keepeth the law, happy is he.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּדְבָרִים לֹא־יִוָּסֶר עָבֶד כִּי־יָבִין וְאֵין מַעֲנֶה׃
englishText: A servant will not be corrected by words; For though he understand, there will be no response.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָזִיתָ אִישׁ אָץ בִּדְבָרָיו תִּקְוָה לִכְסִיל מִמֶּנּוּ׃
englishText: Seest thou a man that is hasty in his words? There is more hope for a fool than for him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְפַנֵּק מִנֹּעַר עַבְדּוֹ וְאַחֲרִיתוֹ יִהְיֶה מָנוֹן׃
englishText: He that delicately bringeth up his servant from a child Shall have him become master at the last.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִישׁ־אַף יְגָרֶה מָדוֹן וּבַעַל חֵמָה רַב־פָּשַׁע׃
englishText: An angry man stirreth up strife, And a wrathful man aboundeth in transgression.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּאֲוַת אָדָם תַּשְׁפִּילֶנּוּ וּשְׁפַל־רוּחַ יִתְמֹךְ כָּבוֹד׃
englishText: A man’s pride shall bring him low; but he that is of a lowly spirit shall attain to honour.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חוֹלֵק עִם־גַּנָּב שׂוֹנֵא נַפְשׁוֹ אָלָה יִשְׁמַע וְלֹא יַגִּיד׃
englishText: Whoso is partner with a thief hateth his own soul: He heareth the adjuration and uttereth nothing.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֶרְדַּת אָדָם יִתֵּן מוֹקֵשׁ וּבוֹטֵחַ בַּיהוָה יְשֻׂגָּב׃
englishText: The fear of man bringeth a snare; but whoso putteth his trust in the LORD shall be set up on high.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַבִּים מְבַקְשִׁים פְּנֵי־מוֹשֵׁל וּמֵיְהוָה מִשְׁפַּט־אִישׁ׃
englishText: Many seek the ruler’s favour; but a man’s judgment cometh from the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תּוֹעֲבַת צַדִּיקִים אִישׁ עָוֶל וְתוֹעֲבַת רָשָׁע יְשַׁר־דָּרֶךְ׃
englishText: An unjust man is an abomination to the righteous; and he that is upright in the way is an abomination to the wicked.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דִּבְרֵי אָגוּר בִּן־יָקֶה הַמַּשָּׂא נְאֻם הַגֶּבֶר לְאִיתִיאֵל לְאִיתִיאֵל וְאֻכָל׃
englishText: The words of Agur the son of Jakeh; the burden. The man saith unto Ithiel, unto Ithiel and Ucal:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי בַעַר אָנֹכִי מֵאִישׁ וְלֹא־בִינַת אָדָם לִי׃
englishText: Surely I am brutish, unlike a man, And have not the understanding of a man;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלֹא־לָמַדְתִּי חָכְמָה וְדַעַת קְדֹשִׁים אֵדָע׃
englishText: And I have not learned wisdom, That I should have the knowledge of the Holy One.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי עָלָה־שָׁמַיִם וַיֵּרַד מִי אָסַף־רוּחַ בְּחָפְנָיו מִי צָרַר־מַיִם בַּשִּׂמְלָה מִי הֵקִים כָּל־אַפְסֵי־אָרֶץ מַה־שְּׁמוֹ וּמַה־שֶּׁם־בְּנוֹ כִּי תֵדָע׃
englishText: Who hath ascended up into heaven, and descended? Who hath gathered the wind in his fists? Who hath bound the waters in his garment? Who hath established all the ends of the earth? What is his name, and what is his son’s name, if thou knowest?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־אִמְרַת אֱלוֹהַּ צְרוּפָה מָגֵן הוּא לַחֹסִים בּוֹ׃
englishText: Every word of God is tried; He is a shield unto them that take refuge in Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תּוֹסְףְּ עַל־דְּבָרָיו פֶּן־יוֹכִיחַ בְּךָ וְנִכְזָבְתָּ׃
englishText: Add thou not unto His words, Lest He reprove thee, and thou be found a liar.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁתַּיִם שָׁאַלְתִּי מֵאִתָּךְ אַל־תִּמְנַע מִמֶּנִּי בְּטֶרֶם אָמוּת׃
englishText: Two things have I asked of Thee; Deny me them not before I die:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁוְא וּדְבַר־כָּזָב הַרְחֵק מִמֶּנִּי רֵאשׁ וָעֹשֶׁר אַל־תִּתֶּן־לִי הַטְרִיפֵנִי לֶחֶם חֻקִּי׃
englishText: Remove far from me falsehood and lies; Give me neither poverty nor riches; feed me with mine allotted bread;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פֶּן אֶשְׂבַּע וְכִחַשְׁתִּי וְאָמַרְתִּי מִי יְהוָה וּפֶן־אִוָּרֵשׁ וְגָנַבְתִּי וְתָפַשְׂתִּי שֵׁם אֱלֹהָי׃
englishText: Lest I be full, and deny, and say: ‘Who is the LORD?’ Or lest I be poor, and steal, And profane the name of my God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תַּלְשֵׁן עֶבֶד אֶל־אדנו [אֲדֹנָיו] פֶּן־יְקַלֶּלְךָ וְאָשָׁמְתָּ׃
englishText: Slander not a servant unto his master, Lest he curse thee, and thou be found guilty.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דּוֹר אָבִיו יְקַלֵּל וְאֶת־אִמּוֹ לֹא יְבָרֵךְ׃
englishText: There is a generation that curse their father, And do not bless their mother.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דּוֹר טָהוֹר בְּעֵינָיו וּמִצֹּאָתוֹ לֹא רֻחָץ׃
englishText: There is a generation that are pure in their own eyes, And yet are not washed from their filthiness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דּוֹר מָה־רָמוּ עֵינָיו וְעַפְעַפָּיו יִנָּשֵׂאוּ׃
englishText: There is a generation, Oh how lofty are their eyes! And their eyelids are lifted up.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דּוֹר חֲרָבוֹת שִׁנָּיו וּמַאֲכָלוֹת מְתַלְּעֹתָיו לֶאֱכֹל עֲנִיִּים מֵאֶרֶץ וְאֶבְיוֹנִים מֵאָדָם׃
englishText: There is a generation whose teeth are as swords, and their great teeth as knives, To devour the poor from off the earth, and the needy from among men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַעֲלוּקָה שְׁתֵּי בָנוֹת הַב הַב שָׁלוֹשׁ הֵנָּה לֹא תִשְׂבַּעְנָה אַרְבַּע לֹא־אָמְרוּ הוֹן׃
englishText: The horseleech hath two daughters: ‘Give, give.’ There are three things that are never satisfied, Yea, four that say not: ‘Enough’:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁאוֹל וְעֹצֶר רָחַם אֶרֶץ לֹא־שָׂבְעָה מַּיִם וְאֵשׁ לֹא־אָמְרָה הוֹן׃
englishText: The grave; and the barren womb; The earth that is not satisfied with water; And the fire that saith not: ‘Enough.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַיִן תִּלְעַג לְאָב וְתָבוּז לִיקֲּהַת־אֵם יִקְּרוּהָ עֹרְבֵי־נַחַל וְיֹאכְלוּהָ בְנֵי־נָשֶׁר׃
englishText: The eye that mocketh at his father, And despiseth to obey his mother, The ravens of the valley shall pick it out, And the young vultures shall eat it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁלֹשָׁה הֵמָּה נִפְלְאוּ מִמֶּנִּי וארבע [וְאַרְבָּעָה] לֹא יְדַעְתִּים׃
englishText: There are three things which are too wonderful for me, Yea, four which I know not:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דֶּרֶךְ הַנֶּשֶׁר בַּשָּׁמַיִם דֶּרֶךְ נָחָשׁ עֲלֵי צוּר דֶּרֶךְ־אֳנִיָּה בְלֶב־יָם וְדֶרֶךְ גֶּבֶר בְּעַלְמָה׃
englishText: The way of an eagle in the air; The way of a serpent upon a rock; The way of a ship in the midst of the sea; And the way of a man with a young woman.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֵּן דֶּרֶךְ אִשָּׁה מְנָאָפֶת אָכְלָה וּמָחֲתָה פִיהָ וְאָמְרָה לֹא־פָעַלְתִּי אָוֶן׃
englishText: So is the way of an adulterous woman; She eateth, and wipeth her mouth, And saith: ‘I have done no wickedness.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּחַת שָׁלוֹשׁ רָגְזָה אֶרֶץ וְתַחַת אַרְבַּע לֹא־תוּכַל שְׂאֵת׃
englishText: For three things the earth doth quake, And for four it cannot endure:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּחַת־עֶבֶד כִּי יִמְלוֹךְ וְנָבָל כִּי יִשְׂבַּע־לָחֶם׃
englishText: For a servant when he reigneth; And a churl when he is filled with food;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּחַת שְׂנוּאָה כִּי תִבָּעֵל וְשִׁפְחָה כִּי־תִירַשׁ גְּבִרְתָּהּ׃
englishText: For an odious woman when she is married; And a handmaid that is heir to her mistress.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַרְבָּעָה הֵם קְטַנֵּי־אָרֶץ וְהֵמָּה חֲכָמִים מְחֻכָּמִים׃
englishText: There are four things which are little upon the earth, But they are exceeding wise:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַנְּמָלִים עַם לֹא־עָז וַיָּכִינוּ בַקַּיִץ לַחְמָם׃
englishText: The ants are a people not strong, Yet they provide their food in the summer;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁפַנִּים עַם לֹא־עָצוּם וַיָּשִׂימוּ בַסֶּלַע בֵּיתָם׃
englishText: The rock-badgers are but a feeble folk, Yet make they their houses in the crags;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֶלֶךְ אֵין לָאַרְבֶּה וַיֵּצֵא חֹצֵץ כֻּלּוֹ׃
englishText: The locusts have no king, Yet go they forth all of them by bands;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׂמָמִית בְּיָדַיִם תְּתַפֵּשׂ וְהִיא בְּהֵיכְלֵי מֶלֶךְ׃
englishText: The spider thou canst take with the hands, Yet is she in kings’palaces.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁלֹשָׁה הֵמָּה מֵיטִיבֵי צָעַד וְאַרְבָּעָה מֵיטִבֵי לָכֶת׃
englishText: There are three things which are stately in their march, Yea, four which are stately in going:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַיִשׁ גִּבּוֹר בַּבְּהֵמָה וְלֹא־יָשׁוּב מִפְּנֵי־כֹל׃
englishText: The lion, which is mightiest among beasts, And turneth not away for any;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זַרְזִיר מָתְנַיִם אוֹ־תָיִשׁ וּמֶלֶךְ אַלְקוּם עִמּוֹ׃
englishText: The greyhound; the he-goat also; And the king, against whom there is no rising up.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־נָבַלְתָּ בְהִתְנַשֵּׂא וְאִם־זַמּוֹתָ יָד לְפֶה׃
englishText: If thou hast done foolishly in lifting up thyself, Or if thou hast planned devices, lay thy hand upon thy mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי מִיץ חָלָב יוֹצִיא חֶמְאָה וּמִיץ־אַף יוֹצִיא דָם וּמִיץ אַפַּיִם יוֹצִיא רִיב׃
englishText: For the churning of milk bringeth forth curd, And the wringing of the nose bringeth forth blood; So the forcing of wrath bringeth forth strife.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דִּבְרֵי לְמוּאֵל מֶלֶךְ מַשָּׂא אֲ‍שֶׁר־יִסְּרַתּוּ אִמּוֹ׃
englishText: The words of king Lemuel; the burden wherewith his mother corrected him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַה־בְּרִי וּמַה־בַּר־בִּטְנִי וּמֶה בַּר־נְדָרָי׃
englishText: What, my son? and what, O son of my womb? And what, O son of my vows?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּתֵּן לַנָּשִׁים חֵילֶךָ וּדְרָכֶיךָ לַמְחוֹת מְלָכִין׃
englishText: Give not thy strength unto women, Nor thy ways to that which destroyeth kings.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל לַמְלָכִים לְמוֹאֵל אַל לַמְלָכִים שְׁתוֹ־יָיִן וּלְרוֹזְנִים או [אֵי] שֵׁכָר׃
englishText: It is not for kings, O Lemuel, it is not for kings to drink wine: Nor for princes to say: ‘Where is strong drink?’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פֶּן־יִשְׁתֶּה וְיִשְׁכַּח מְחֻקָּק וִישַׁנֶּה דִּין כָּל־בְּנֵי־עֹנִי׃
englishText: Lest they drink, and forget that which is decreed, And pervert the justice due to any that is afflicted.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּנוּ־שֵׁכָר לְאוֹבֵד וְיַיִן לְמָרֵי נָפֶשׁ׃
englishText: Give strong drink unto him that is ready to perish, And wine unto the bitter in soul;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׁתֶּה וְיִשְׁכַּח רִישׁוֹ וַעֲמָלוֹ לֹא יִזְכָּר־עוֹד׃
englishText: Let him drink, and forget his poverty, and remember his misery no more.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פְּתַח־פִּיךָ לְאִלֵּם אֶל־דִּין כָּל־בְּנֵי חֲלוֹף׃
englishText: Open thy mouth for the dumb, in the cause of all such as are appointed to destruction.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פְּתַח־פִּיךָ שְׁפָט־צֶדֶק וְדִין עָנִי וְאֶבְיוֹן׃
englishText: Open thy mouth, judge righteously, and plead the cause of the poor and needy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵשֶׁת־חַיִל מִי יִמְצָא וְרָחֹק מִפְּנִינִים מִכְרָהּ׃
englishText: A woman of valour who can find? For her price is far above rubies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּטַח בָּהּ לֵב בַּעְלָהּ וְשָׁלָל לֹא יֶחְסָר׃
englishText: The heart of her husband doth safely trust in her, and he hath no lack of gain.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גְּמָלַתְהוּ טוֹב וְלֹא־רָע כֹּל יְמֵי חַיֶּיה׃
englishText: She doeth him good and not evil all the days of her life.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דָּרְשָׁה צֶמֶר וּפִשְׁתִּים וַתַּעַשׂ בְּחֵפֶץ כַּפֶּיהָ׃
englishText: She seeketh wool and flax, and worketh willingly with her hands.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָיְתָה כָּאֳנִיּוֹת סוֹחֵר מִמֶּרְחָק תָּבִיא לַחְמָהּ׃
englishText: She is like the merchant-ships; she bringeth her food from afar.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתָּקָם בְּעוֹד לַיְלָה וַתִּתֵּן טֶרֶף לְבֵיתָהּ וְחֹק לְנַעֲרֹתֶיהָ׃
englishText: She riseth also while it is yet night, and giveth food to her household, and a portion to her maidens.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זָמְמָה שָׂדֶה וַתִּקָּחֵהוּ מִפְּרִי כַפֶּיהָ נטע [נָטְעָה] כָּרֶם׃
englishText: She considereth a field, and buyeth it; with the fruit of her hands she planteth a vineyard.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָגְרָה בְעוֹז מָתְנֶיהָ וַתְּאַמֵּץ זְרֹעוֹתֶיהָ׃
englishText: She girdeth her loins with strength, And maketh strong her arms.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טָעֲמָה כִּי־טוֹב סַחְרָהּ לֹא־יִכְבֶּה בליל [בַלַּיְלָה] נֵרָהּ׃
englishText: She perceiveth that her merchandise is good; Her lamp goeth not out by night.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָדֶיהָ שִׁלְּחָה בַכִּישׁוֹר וְכַפֶּיהָ תָּמְכוּ פָלֶךְ׃
englishText: She layeth her hands to the distaff, And her hands hold the spindle.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּפָּהּ פָּרְשָׂה לֶעָנִי וְיָדֶיהָ שִׁלְּחָה לָאֶבְיוֹן׃
englishText: She stretcheth out her hand to the poor; Yea, she reacheth forth her hands to the needy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־תִירָא לְבֵיתָהּ מִשָּׁלֶג כִּי כָל־בֵּיתָהּ לָבֻשׁ שָׁנִים׃
englishText: She is not afraid of the snow for her household; For all her household are clothed with scarlet.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַרְבַדִּים עָשְׂתָה־לָּהּ שֵׁשׁ וְאַרְגָּמָן לְבוּשָׁהּ׃
englishText: She maketh for herself coverlets; Her clothing is fine linen and purple.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נוֹדָע בַּשְּׁעָרִים בַּעְלָהּ בְּשִׁבְתּוֹ עִם־זִקְנֵי־אָרֶץ׃
englishText: Her husband is known in the gates, When he sitteth among the elders of the land.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סָדִין עָשְׂתָה וַתִּמְכֹּר וַחֲגוֹר נָתְנָה לַכְּנַעֲנִי׃
englishText: She maketh linen garments and selleth them; And delivereth girdles unto the merchant.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֹז־וְהָדָר לְבוּשָׁהּ וַתִּשְׂחַק לְיוֹם אַחֲרוֹן׃
englishText: Strength and dignity are her clothing; And she laugheth at the time to come.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פִּיהָ פָּתְחָה בְחָכְמָה וְתוֹרַת־חֶסֶד עַל־לְשׁוֹנָהּ׃
englishText: She openeth her mouth with wisdom; And the law of kindness is on her tongue.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צוֹפִיָּה הֲלִיכוֹת בֵּיתָהּ וְלֶחֶם עַצְלוּת לֹא תֹאכֵל׃
englishText: She looketh well to the ways of her household, And eateth not the bread of idleness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קָמוּ בָנֶיהָ וַיְאַשְּׁרוּהָ בַּעְלָהּ וַיְהַלְלָהּ׃
englishText: Her children rise up, and call her blessed; Her husband also, and he praiseth her:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַבּוֹת בָּנוֹת עָשׂוּ חָיִל וְאַתְּ עָלִית עַל־כֻּלָּנָה׃
englishText: ’Many daughters have done valiantly, But thou excellest them all.’
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֶׁקֶר הַחֵן וְהֶבֶל הַיֹּפִי אִשָּׁה יִרְאַת־יְהוָה הִיא תִתְהַלָּל׃
englishText: Grace is deceitful, and beauty is vain; But a woman that feareth the LORD, she shall be praised.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּנוּ־לָהּ מִפְּרִי יָדֶיהָ וִיהַלְלוּהָ בַשְּׁעָרִים מַעֲשֶׂיהָ׃
englishText: Give her of the fruit of her hands; And let her works praise her in the gates.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)
